raw: the invention relates to a system and a method for detecting broken rails for a railway line, designed to detect the breakage by means of electrical discontinuity in at least one rail (r). the system comprises an emitting node (1), a receiving node (2), and connection means for generating an electrical circuit between both nodes (1, 2) and the section of rails (r), of up to 7km between both nodes (1, 2), whereinto the emitting node (1) injects an alternating electrical signal. the system also comprises a detector (s) associated with each rail (r) in order to detect the alternating electrical signal through the corresponding rail (r), and control means that receive the detected signals and determine whether there is electrical discontinuity in the electrical circuit, identifying the broken rail (r). in the event of double-track railway lines, the broken rail (r) is also identified and the break area is estimated.
rewritten: the invention pertains to a system and method for detecting broken rails on a railway line by identifying electrical discontinuities in at least one rail (r). the system includes an emitting node (1), a receiving node (2), and connection means that establish an electrical circuit between these nodes (1, 2) and the rail section (r) spanning up to 7 km between them. the emitting node (1) injects an alternating electrical signal into the circuit. furthermore, the system is equipped with a detector (s) associated with each rail (r) to sense the alternating signal along the corresponding rail (r), and a control unit that processes these detected signals to determine whether there is an electrical discontinuity—thus pinpointing the broken rail (r). for double-track railway lines, the system additionally identifies the specific broken rail (r) and estimates the location of the break area.

raw: epure m., prior d. and serarols c. assessing technology-based spin-offs from university support units, regional studies. this paper takes a regional studies approach to assess spin-offs from a university-based technology transfer network. it first detects the regional objectives, inputs and outputs needed to assess spin-offs from support programmes. it then provides evidence on regional mechanisms for firm creation. spin-offs created at catalan universities are analysed and it is found that many efficient spin-offs have formal technology transfer agreements, and emerge from technology-oriented universities. it is also found that higher innovation levels and experience from the parent university are associated with higher efficiency, which is positively related to future fundamental profitability. finally, regional policy-making and research directions are proposed.
rewritten: epure, m., prior, d., and serarols, c. evaluate technology-based spin-offs emerging from university support units through a regional studies framework. the paper adopts a regional perspective to examine spin-offs within a university’s technology transfer network. initially, it identifies the regional objectives, inputs, and outputs necessary for evaluating spin-offs from these support programs. it then presents evidence on the regional mechanisms that drive firm creation. an analysis of spin-offs from catalan universities reveals that many successful ventures have formal technology transfer agreements and originate from technology-driven institutions. additionally, the study finds that higher levels of innovation and greater experience from the parent university are associated with increased efficiency, which in turn is linked to higher future profitability. the paper concludes by proposing implications for regional policy-making and outlining directions for future research.

raw: urea sensor seal structure that is qualified for next round of competitions including electron tube and plastic head, is equipped with the flotation pontoon on the electron tube, be equipped with the electron plate in the electron tube, and the electron plate overcoat has the electron plate pipe, has the signal line to draw on the electron plate pipe, and the middle part is equipped with well plug in the electron tube, and the electron plate passes well plug, with well plug interference fit, the electron tube upper end is equipped with the plug, and the rubberizing is equipped with the signal line beyond the great wall and passes the hole, and signal line passing signal line passes the hole and passes the plug, and the signal line passes downthehole portion and is equipped with annular boss, and the internal diameter of annular boss is lighter than the line footpath of signal line, rubberizing portion has beyond the great wall irritated sealed gluey, the overhead sealing plug of being qualified for the next round of competitions that is equipped with of plastic, signal line wrap up wired bundle of crust outward, and the parcel has the signal line of pencil crust to pass the sealing plug of being qualified for the next round of competitions, the pencil crust and the sealing plug interference fit that is qualified for the next round of competitions, and the one end of signal line entering linear sealing stopper has been irritated sealed and has been glued. the utility model discloses it is sealed effectual.
rewritten: the urea sensor sealing structure, qualified for the next round of competitions, comprises an electron tube and a plastic head. the electron tube is fitted with a flotation pontoon and includes an electron plate, which is covered by an electron plate overcoat that features an electron plate pipe. a signal line is drawn through this pipe. in the middle of the electron tube, a well plug is installed through which the electron plate passes, creating an interference fit. at the upper end of the electron tube, a plug is provided. beyond a feature referred to as the “great wall,” a rubberized section holds the signal line, allowing it to pass through a hole and another plug. the signal line then continues into a down-the-hole area equipped with an annular boss, whose internal diameter is smaller than the cross-sectional width of the signal line. the rubberized part beyond the “great wall” is also coated with a glue-like sealant. additionally, a plastic sealing plug—also qualified for the next round of competitions—is installed at the top. here, the signal line is wrapped with a wired bundle crust that projects outward, and the portion of the signal line with a pencil crust passes through this sealing plug to form an interference fit. one end of the signal line entering a linear sealing stopper is further sealed with an irritant adhesive. the utility model demonstrates that this design achieves an effective sealing performance.

raw: the utility model provides a novel obviously adorn return air inlet formula air purifier, has ordinary return air inlet appearance structure, but the direct mount, the purification module of being connected including the return air inlet, with the power, wherein, purification module and return air inlet establish as an organic wholely, the return air inlet by the frame and with the inside casing of frame round pin hub connection constitute can open return air inlet including, be equipped with between the frame and prevent air current from the sealing member of the slot leakage between the interior frame, during the installation, the frame is by fixed, the inside casing rotates or is fixed along the round pin axle, in the frame, the inside casing inwards stand by as an outsider and to be equipped with air -inlet grille, coarse filtration net and to purify the module according to the preface. the utility model discloses it is convenient to maintain, opens the inside casing and can take out the purification module, the security is good, purifies the module and adopts whole encapsulation, encapsulates high pressure package and collection dirt part as an organic whole, and nos any high pressure contacts and exposes, the filter capacity is strong, can filter the pm2.5 particulate matter, low windage.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a novel, aesthetically pleasing air purifier with an innovative return air inlet design. although its return air inlet has a conventional external appearance, the purification module is directly mounted and connected to the return air inlet along with the power supply. in this design, the purification module and the return air inlet are integrated into a unified, organic whole. the return air inlet is composed of a frame and an inner casing that is connected to the frame via a round pin hub, forming an openable structure. a sealing member is installed between the frame and the casing to prevent air leakage through the gaps. during installation, the frame is fixed while the inner casing can either rotate or remain stationary around the round pin axle. inside the frame, the inner casing is positioned so that its inward side faces outward, and it is equipped with an air-inlet grille, a coarse filtration net, and the purification module as described. this design offers ease of maintenance since the inner casing can be opened to remove the purification module. safety is enhanced by the fact that the purification module is entirely encapsulated; the high-pressure packaging that collects particulate dirt is integrated as a single unit, with no high-pressure contacts or exposures. moreover, the device exhibits strong filtering capability, effectively filtering pm2.5 particles while maintaining low wind resistance.

raw: the invention provides an album-based social group establishment method and device. the method comprises the following steps: acquiring photos, and grouping the acquired photos to generate an album; creating an album-based social group and inviting friends to add the social group; providing an operation interface for operating the photos in the album for group members through the social group, and acquiring operation results of the group members in the social group to the photos by the social group, and when acquiring the operation result of any group member, displaying the operation result to all the group members in the social group. the social group is established on the basis of the album, and various social functions and various operations to the photos are realized conveniently.
rewritten: the invention introduces a method and device for establishing a social group based on an album. the method includes the following steps: first, collecting photos and organizing them to form an album; next, creating a social group centered around that album and inviting friends to join; then, providing an interface that allows group members to interact with the photos in the album, where the system records the actions taken by each member; and finally, whenever an action is recorded for any member, the result is displayed to all members of the group. this approach, which builds the social group around the album, allows for a range of social features and convenient photo interactions.

raw: in this paper, an intelligent scheme for detecting incipient defects in spur gears is presented. in fact, the study has been undertaken to determine these defects in a single propeller system of a small-sized unmanned helicopter. it is important to remark that although the study focused on this particular system, the obtained results could be extended to other systems known as auvs (autonomous unmanned vehicles), where the usage of polymer gears in the vehicle transmission is frequent. few studies have been carried out on these kinds of gears. in this paper, an experimental platform has been adapted for the study and several samples have been prepared. moreover, several vibration signals have been measured and their time-frequency characteristics have been taken as inputs to the diagnostic system. in fact, a diagnostic system based on an artificial intelligence strategy has been devised. furthermore, techniques based on several paradigms of the artificial intelligence (neural networks, fuzzy systems and genetic algorithms) have been applied altogether in order to design an efficient fault diagnostic system. a hybrid genetic neuro-fuzzy system has been developed, where it is possible, at the final stage of the learning process, to express the fault diagnostic system as a set of fuzzy rules. several trials have been carried out and satisfactory results have been achieved.
rewritten: this paper presents an intelligent approach for detecting early-stage defects in spur gears. the investigation specifically targeted defect detection in the single propeller system of a small unmanned helicopter. although the focus was on this unique system, the findings can be applied to other platforms such as autonomous unmanned vehicles (auvs), where polymer gears are commonly used in transmission systems—a subject with limited prior research. an experimental platform was modified for this study, and multiple samples were prepared. numerous vibration signals were recorded, and their time-frequency characteristics served as inputs to the diagnostic system. a diagnostic framework was then developed using an artificial intelligence strategy, integrating various ai paradigms—including neural networks, fuzzy systems, and genetic algorithms—to create an efficient fault detection system. the result is a hybrid genetic neuro-fuzzy system that, by the end of the training process, allows the fault diagnosis to be represented through a set of fuzzy rules. extensive trials were conducted, achieving satisfactory results.

raw: cholangiocarcinoma (cca) is a heterogeneous group of malignancies with features of biliary tract differentiation. cca is the second most common primary liver tumour and the incidence is increasing worldwide. cca has high mortality owing to its aggressiveness, late diagnosis and refractory nature. in may 2015, the "european network for the study of cholangiocarcinoma" (ens-cca: www.enscca.org or www.cholangiocarcinoma.eu) was created to promote and boost international research collaboration on the study of cca at basic, translational and clinical level. in this consensus statement, we aim to provide valuable information on classifications, pathological features, risk factors, cells of origin, genetic and epigenetic modifications and current therapies available for this cancer. moreover, future directions on basic and clinical investigations and plans for the ens-cca are highlighted.
rewritten: cholangiocarcinoma (cca) comprises a diverse group of malignancies that exhibit biliary tract differentiation. it ranks as the second most common primary liver tumor, and its incidence is rising globally. due to its aggressive nature, late detection, and resistance to treatment, cca has a high mortality rate. in may 2015, the european network for the study of cholangiocarcinoma (ens-cca: www.enscca.org or www.cholangiocarcinoma.eu) was established to foster international research collaboration on the disease across basic, translational, and clinical studies. this consensus statement offers essential insights into various aspects of cca, including its classifications, pathological characteristics, risk factors, cells of origin, genetic and epigenetic alterations, and the currently available therapeutic options. additionally, it outlines future directions for both basic and clinical research and details upcoming plans for ens-cca.

raw: the utility model discloses an ore material blanking discharge apparatus, it includes the storage silo, the middle part of storage silo is provided with a center post, the center post is hollow structure, a plurality of feed ports have been seted up all around at the center post, the inside toper arch that is provided with of center post, the top of center post is provided with a centrifugal discharge apparatus, centrifugal discharge apparatus include drive arrangement, the feeder hopper, unloading pipe and the toper wheel of unloading, unloading pipe upper end is connected with the feeder hopper, unloading pipe lower extreme and toper are unloaded and round are connected, unloading pipe lower extreme is provided with a plurality of discharge openings, the toper is unloaded and is installed a plurality of guide plates on the conical surface of wheel, a plurality of discharge openings have been seted up on the bottom surface of storage silo, be provided with a dam device in the discharge opening, dam device comprises with the driving motor that the drive picture peg inserted the discharge opening the picture peg, the picture peg level is inserted in the discharge opening, driving motor is connected with the controller. the beneficial effects of the utility model are that: it has that the ore material handling capacity is big, low in labor strength and the advantage that can fix a point to unload.
rewritten: the utility model discloses an ore material blanking discharge apparatus comprising a storage silo with a centrally positioned, hollow center post. this center post features several feed ports arranged around its circumference and contains an arch-shaped toper within its interior. atop the center post, a centrifugal discharge apparatus is installed. this apparatus includes a drive arrangement, a feeder hopper, an unloading pipe, and an unloading toper wheel. the feeder hopper connects to the upper end of the unloading pipe, while its lower end links in a circular fashion to the toper. the unloading pipe is equipped with multiple discharge openings near its lower end, and the toper wheel has several guide plates installed on its conical surface to facilitate proper discharge. additionally, the bottom surface of the storage silo has several discharge openings, each fitted with a dam device. this dam device consists of a driving motor that actuates a picture peg inserted into the discharge opening; the picture peg spans the opening at the same level and is connected to a controller. the advantages of this design include a high capacity for handling ore material, reduced labor intensity, and the capability to discharge material at a fixed point.

raw: the emergence of social enterprises (ses) within criminal justice jurisdictions across europe has increased significantly in recent years. prison- and community-based income-generating businesses are providing employment for those who find it most difficult to secure jobs as a result of their previous criminal lifestyles. combining a business model with a social mission, ses are particularly attractive to those working with offenders, as securing employment plays a key role in recidivism rates. despite the proven successes of ses in criminal justice sectors across europe, they remain uncharted territory here in ireland. based on primary research conducted with key stakeholders from the department of justice, the irish prison service, the probation service and the community and voluntary sector, this paper explores the factors that support or hinder the development of ses across the irish criminal justice system. it concludes by proposing possible next steps to addressing the factors that have delayed their development up to this point.
rewritten: in recent years, there has been a notable growth in the presence of social enterprises (ses) within the criminal justice systems across europe. both prison-based and community-oriented income-generating ventures are now offering employment opportunities to individuals who struggle to secure work due to their criminal pasts. by blending commercial strategies with a social purpose, these enterprises are especially valued by professionals working with offenders, as stable employment is crucial for reducing recidivism. although social enterprises have proven effective in various criminal justice contexts throughout europe, they largely remain unexplored in ireland. this paper, based on primary research involving key figures from the department of justice, the irish prison service, the probation service, and the community and voluntary sector, examines the elements that either foster or impede the expansion of ses within the irish criminal justice framework. it concludes by suggesting potential steps to overcome the obstacles that have thus far hindered their development.

raw: the invention relates to a laser engraving manufacturing process for a fine circuit. the manufacturing process comprises the following steps: step 1, preparing a thin circuit with a width of less than or equal to 0.1 mm through a laser engraving manner in an lds plastic part by utilizing an lds laser; step 2, mounting the laser engraved plastic part on a jig that combines a roller and a suspension frame; step 3, performing chemical plating treatment on the laser engraved plastic part to obtain a required metal layer on the circuit; and step 4, performing electrical logging on the circuit after the metal layer is obtained. by adoption of the laser engraving manufacturing process for the fine circuit, large-scale production of the fine circuit with the thickness of less than or equal to 0.1 mm can be realized, and the applied range of the lds process is expanded.
rewritten: the present invention concerns a laser engraving manufacturing process for fine circuits. the process includes the following steps: 1. preparing a fine circuit with a width of 0.1 mm or less by laser engraving an lds plastic part using an lds laser. 2. securing the laser-engraved plastic part onto a jig that integrates a roller with a suspension frame. 3. conducting a chemical plating treatment on the laser-engraved plastic part to form the required metal layer on the circuit. 4. performing electrical logging on the circuit once the metal layer has been applied. by employing this laser engraving method for fine circuits, it becomes possible to achieve large-scale production of circuits with a thickness of 0.1 mm or less, thereby broadening the range of applications for the lds process.

raw: combining the strengths of an advanced mathematical model of human physiology and a thermal manikin is a new paradigm for simulating thermal behaviour of humans. however, the forerunners of such adaptive manikins showed some substantial limitations. this project aimed to determine the opportunities and constraints of the existing thermal manikins when dynamically controlled by a mathematical model of human thermal physiology. four thermal manikins were selected and evaluated for their heat flux measurement uncertainty including lateral heat flows between manikin body parts and the response of each sector to the frequent change of the set-point temperature typical when using a physiological model for control. in general, all evaluated manikins are suitable for coupling with a physiological model with some recommendations for further improvement of manikin dynamic performance. the proposed methodology is useful to improve the performance of the adaptive manikins and help to provide a reliable and versatile tool for the broad research and development domain of clothing, automotive and building engineering.
rewritten: integrating an advanced mathematical model of human physiology with a thermal manikin represents a novel approach for simulating human thermal behavior. early versions of these adaptive manikins, however, demonstrated some significant shortcomings. this project sought to identify both the opportunities and the constraints of the current thermal manikins when they are dynamically controlled by a mathematical model of human thermal physiology. four thermal manikins were chosen and assessed for uncertainties in heat flux measurements, including lateral heat flows between different body parts and how each segment responds to the frequent changes in set-point temperature typical of a physiological model. overall, the evaluated manikins are generally appropriate for integration with a physiological model, though there are recommendations for further enhancing their dynamic performance. the methodology outlined here can be instrumental in improving adaptive manikin performance and in providing a reliable, versatile tool for extensive research and development in clothing, automotive, and building engineering.

raw: in order to establish networks of cooperation looking for not to duplicate research and even to make use of existing research in a remote form, it is necessary to identify and classify (around the world) the researchers and laboratories, that are researching in the topic of solar refrigeration by absorption/adsorption. the methodology consists in: i) the technology's classification, ii) technological trajectory identification, iii) a thematic bibliographic review, and iv) patent's analysis. in this way, with the previous determination of keywords, will be identified main authors and their respective institutions. with the same keywords, are determined the licensed patents (in certain span of time). in addition, the analysis of publications, patents, and commercial products give us an opportunity to establish comparisons between prototypes and tests (in several conditions). the larger results implicate the use of actor's network and the remote access to the data and tests, for a collaborative research, overcoming the lack of laboratory resource and accelerating the knowledge acquisition.
rewritten: to create collaborative networks that avoid redundant research and allow the remote utilization of existing studies, it is essential to identify and categorize researchers and laboratories worldwide working on solar refrigeration through absorption/adsorption. the methodology involves: i) classifying the technology, ii) mapping its technological trajectory, iii) conducting a thematic bibliographic review, and iv) analyzing patents. by using a predetermined set of keywords, key authors and their respective institutions can be identified, and licensed patents (within a given time frame) determined using the same keywords. furthermore, examining publications, patents, and commercial products provides an opportunity to compare various prototypes and test conditions. ultimately, these efforts support the creation of networks among stakeholders and enable remote access to data and experimental results, fostering collaborative research, mitigating the lack of laboratory resources, and accelerating the acquisition of knowledge.

raw: abstract multiple shallow-sediment cores were obtained from the pilot valley playa, the location of a lake bonneville sub-basin. analyses of stratigraphy, ostracods, mineralogy, chemistry, total inorganic carbon, total organic carbon, and stable isotopes were performed to place these sediments into proper context with respect to the lake bonneville cycle. results showed that the pilot valley playa contains a full sequence of lake bonneville deposits, in addition to sediments deposited before and after the lake bonneville cycle. within the bonneville marl is a sequence of algal-laminated mud. five calibrated 14c ages, ranging from 25.5 to 17.0 cal ka bp, determined from algae filaments in the laminated marl, in addition to its stratigraphic position near the base of the sequence, place it the early transgressive phase of lake bonneville. oolitic sand occurring below the bonneville marl indicates the existence of a shallow (
rewritten: multiple shallow sediment cores were collected from the pilot valley playa, situated within a lake bonneville sub-basin. to contextualize the sediments in relation to the lake bonneville cycle, analyses were performed on aspects such as stratigraphy, ostracods, mineralogy, chemistry, total inorganic carbon, total organic carbon, and stable isotopes. the findings indicate that the pilot valley playa preserves an entire sequence of lake bonneville deposits, along with sediment layers deposited both before and after the lake bonneville cycle. within the bonneville marl lies a sequence of algal-laminated mud. five calibrated radiocarbon ages, ranging from 25.5 to 17.0 cal ka bp and derived from algal filaments in the laminated marl, combined with its low stratigraphic position, assign it to the early transgressive phase of lake bonneville. additionally, the presence of oolitic sand beneath the bonneville marl suggests the occurrence of a shallow...

raw: envelope tracking power converter circuitry is configured to receive a supply voltage and simultaneously provide two envelope tracking power supply signals, an envelope tracking power supply signal and an average power tracking power supply signal, or a single envelope tracking power supply signal with improved efficiency. when providing a single envelope tracking power supply signal, an envelope tracking power supply signal is provided to a parallel amplifier in the envelope tracking power converter circuitry to provide multiple levels of envelope tracking which improves efficiency.
rewritten: the envelope tracking power converter circuitry is designed to accept a supply voltage and can simultaneously output either two envelope tracking power supply signals—one for envelope tracking and another for average power tracking—or a single, more efficient envelope tracking power supply signal. in the case of a single signal, it is provided to a parallel amplifier within the converter circuitry, enabling multiple envelope tracking levels that enhance efficiency.

raw: the utility model provides a protective structure of electrodynamic balance car belongs to mechanical technical field. it has solved problem how to protect the balance car to avoid the harm. the electrodynamic balance car includes the automobile body and is located two running -boards on the automobile body upper surface, and this protective structure is including setting up the protection pad no. 1 and protection pad no. 2 in every running -board both sides respectively, and equal threaded connection has a card post on the automobile body of every running -board both sides, protection pad no. 1 and protection pad no. 2 all with the card post joint cooperation that corresponds, protection pad no. 1 and protection pad can cover on the top or the lower surface of cladding at the automobile body of automobile body upper surface through magic subsides connection between two. through this protection architecture for this balance car all obtains fine protection when using or not using, prevent that the balance car from receiving unexpected harm, simultaneously, this protective structure easy dismounting, simple structure.
rewritten: this utility model offers a protective structure for an electrodynamic balance car in the field of mechanical technology. it addresses the issue of safeguarding the balance car from potential damage. the electrodynamic balance car consists of an automobile body with two running boards positioned on its upper surface. the protective structure features two protective pads—protection pad no. 1 and protection pad no. 2—arranged on opposite sides of each running board. on each side of the running boards, a card post is fixedly attached to the automobile body, and both protective pads are designed to connect with these card posts using an equal threaded connection. additionally, the protective pads can cover either the top or the lower surface of the cladding on the automobile body through a magnetic coupling connection. this design provides excellent protection for the balance car, whether it is in use or not, preventing it from sustaining unexpected damage. moreover, the protective structure is simple in design and easy to disassemble.

raw: in this work we characterize the rf modulation characteristics and the dynamic range of a iii-v-on-silicon dfb laser. the direct modulation of this laser is demonstrated with a 1gbps radio-over-fiber link at a carrier frequency up to 24 ghz using qpsk modulation. 480mbps 64-qam transmission at 3.5 ghz carrier frequency is demonstrated as well. in the 480 mbps experiment both the transmitter and receiver are silicon photonic components, providing a sfdr of about 90 dbhz2/3 for the complete optical link including receiver electronics as well.
rewritten: in this study, we examine the rf modulation characteristics and dynamic range of a iii-v-on-silicon dfb laser. we demonstrate the laser’s direct modulation through a 1 gbps radio-over-fiber link using qpsk modulation, achieving a carrier frequency of up to 24 ghz. additionally, we present a 480 mbps 64-qam transmission at a 3.5 ghz carrier frequency. for this 480 mbps experiment, both the transmitter and receiver are silicon photonic components, resulting in an sfdr of approximately 90 db·hz²/³ for the entire optical link, including the receiver electronics.

raw: this study aims to determine the efficiency of water use between cultivars and identify the root system, drought- tolerant upland rice physiology. implemented in plastic house in north aceh, in january 2015 until may 2015. using a split plot design (split-plot) with three replications, and two factors: the first factor is drought stress (c) consisting of 4 levels of field capacity is : c1: 20% (300 ml / day), c2: 40% (600 ml / day), c3: 60% (900 ml / day) and the c4: 80% (1200 ml / day). the second factor is the 10 varieties of upland rice varieties consists of 3 groups (the result of screening with peg 6000), namely (tolerant varieties) consists of inpago 9, inpago 4, inpago 8. (moderate varieties) which consists of inpago 5, situ bangendit, inpago7, towuti, and (sensitive varieties) which consists of inpari 6 jate, inpari 33 and sintanur. materials used are topsoil, manure, phonska + urea compound fertilizer dose (300 kg / ha + urea 200 kg / ha), polybags size 40 cm x 50 cm. the tools used include: soil ph and dm 15 mouisture tester, digital thermometer, chlorophyll meter spad, spectrophotometer, meter, digital scales, label, signage and all the tools that support research. drought stress causes decreased root weight, root crown ratio, proline content of leaves and total leaf chlorophyll, but led to increased root length. results of the study showed avoidance mechanism varieties tolerant to drought stress in different ways varieties inpago 4 through increasing root length, root weight, root crown ratio and the amount of leaf proline. ciapus varieties through an increase in the amount of chlorophyll. moderate varieties inpago 7, situbangendit unidentified able to adapt to the conditions of drought stress on field capacity 20% and 40% on content of proline and root length. susceptible inpari varieties 6 jete and inpari 33 gave the highest content of chlorophyll and proline.
rewritten: this research aimed to evaluate water use efficiency across different cultivars and to characterize the root systems and drought physiology of upland rice. the experiment was carried out in a greenhouse in north aceh from january to may 2015. a split-plot design with three replications was used, involving two factors: 1. drought stress at four levels of field capacity: • c1: 20% (300 ml/day) • c2: 40% (600 ml/day) • c3: 60% (900 ml/day) • c4: 80% (1200 ml/day) 2. ten upland rice varieties, grouped by their performance in a peg 6000 screening into: • drought-tolerant: inpago 9, inpago 4, inpago 8 • moderately tolerant: inpago 5, situ bangendit, inpago 7, towuti • drought-sensitive: inpari 6 jate, inpari 33, sintanur the study used topsoil, manure, and a combination of phonska and urea fertilizers (applied at 300 kg/ha and 200 kg/ha, respectively) along with polybags measuring 40 cm x 50 cm. tools included a soil ph and moisture tester (dm15), digital thermometer, spad chlorophyll meter, spectrophotometer, measuring tape, digital scales, labels, signage, and various supporting equipment. the results showed that drought stress reduced root weight, the root crown ratio, leaf proline content, and total leaf chlorophyll, while increasing root length. varieties displayed different avoidance mechanisms: the drought-tolerant inpago 4 increased its root length, root weight, root crown ratio, and leaf proline levels; the ciapus variety responded with increased chlorophyll content; and the moderately tolerant varieties inpago 7 and situ bangendit adapted better at 20% and 40% field capacity by enhancing proline content and root length. in contrast, the drought-sensitive varieties inpari 6 jete and inpari 33 exhibited the highest levels of chlorophyll and proline.

raw: the results of extensive measurements of fracture mechanics parameters of cast iron materials under static, dynamic and cyclic loading at the institute of materials engineering (iwt) at the tu bergakademie freiberg are shown. a special attention for this group of materials must be given to the microstructural influence on the crack resistance behavior and thus the component reliability. in collaboration with the institute of mechanics and fluid dynamics (imfd) of the tu bergakademie it was shown for castings, such as components of wind turbines made of ductile cast iron, railway wheels made of adi or transport casks for spent nuclear fuel assemblies that the fracture mechanical strength analysis including possible casting defects extends the conventional strength analysis.
rewritten: the document presents extensive measurements of fracture mechanics parameters for cast iron materials under static, dynamic, and cyclic loading, conducted at the institute of materials engineering (iwt) at tu bergakademie freiberg. special attention must be paid to these materials due to the significant influence of their microstructural characteristics on crack resistance behavior and overall component reliability. in collaboration with the institute of mechanics and fluid dynamics (imfd) at tu bergakademie freiberg, it has been demonstrated for various castings—such as wind turbine components made of ductile cast iron, railway wheels made of adi, and transport casks for spent nuclear fuel assemblies—that incorporating potential casting defects into the fracture mechanical strength analysis provides a more comprehensive understanding than conventional strength analysis alone.

raw: the utility model discloses an electric cabinet of hoist, the electric cabinet includes the box, the inside cavity that is used for installing electrical components that is provided with of box, be provided with a region on the front end wall of box, be provided with the dead slot in the end wall of half part on the left side of box, the front end wall of box and left end wall juncture and first pulley is all installed to the end wall of box and the dead slot of left end wall juncture upper end, the front end wall of box and left end wall juncture and the end wall of box all installs the second pulley with the dead slot lower extreme of left end wall juncture, bobbin and lower bobbin are installed respectively to the dead slot upper end and the lower extreme of the end wall middle part of box, go up and to install driving motor on the box roof directly over the bobbin, driving motor's drive shaft with go up bobbin and lower bobbin fixed connection, install the flexible sealing board in the door region.
rewritten: the utility model discloses an electric hoist cabinet. the cabinet comprises a box with an interior cavity designed for mounting electrical components. a designated area is provided on the front end wall of the box, and a dead slot is incorporated in the middle portion of the left end wall. at the junction of the front and left end walls, a first pulley is installed at the upper end of the dead slot, while a second pulley is installed at the lower end of that same slot. a bobbin is mounted at the upper part of the middle section of the box’s end wall, with a lower bobbin mounted at the lower part. additionally, a driving motor is installed on the box roof directly above the bobbin, with its drive shaft fixedly connected to both the upper and lower bobbins. a flexible sealing board is also installed in the door area.

raw: dna-binding protein a (dbpa) has been reported associated with the pathogenesis and development of various cancers. however, no evidence showed the gene expression profiling alternation involved in dbpa knockdown in colorectal cancer (crc) cells. small interference rna (sirna) method was used to knock down dbpa expression in sw620 cells. the changes of gene expression profiles in dbpa knockdown sw620 cells were determined by microarray analysis and western blot. a total of 578 genes expressed differentially (twofold change), 181 genes were up-regulated, and 397 down-regulated in the dbpa knockdown group in comparison with the control group. the discrimination reliability was further verified by principal component analysis and pearson correlation. gene ontology (go) pathway analysis and kyoto encyclopedia of genes and genomes (kegg) pathway analysis showed that the most significantly expressed genes were linked to mapk signaling pathway. furthermore, western blot verified that dbpa knockdown directly inhibited the activations of tak1, p38, and jnk in crc cells. in conclusion, dbpa knockdown in sw620 cells altered the expression of carcinogenesis-associated genes in crc and the involvement of dbpa on crc might through mapk signaling pathway, which might provide valuable evidence to further investigate the correlation between dbpa expression and crc development.
rewritten: dna-binding protein a (dbpa) has been linked to the pathogenesis and progression of several cancers. however, there has been no evidence showing changes in gene expression profiles resulting from dbpa knockdown in colorectal cancer (crc) cells. in this study, we employed small interfering rna (sirna) to reduce dbpa expression in sw620 cells, and then used microarray analysis alongside western blotting to assess the resulting gene expression changes. our analysis revealed a total of 578 genes with differential expression (defined as a twofold change): 181 genes were upregulated, and 397 were downregulated in the dbpa knockdown group compared with the control group. the reliability of these findings was further supported by principal component analysis and pearson correlation. additionally, gene ontology (go) and kyoto encyclopedia of genes and genomes (kegg) pathway analyses showed that many of the significantly affected genes were involved in the mapk signaling pathway. western blot results further confirmed that the reduced expression of dbpa directly inhibited the activation of tak1, p38, and jnk in crc cells. in summary, knocking down dbpa in sw620 cells led to changes in the expression of genes associated with carcinogenesis, potentially through the mapk signaling pathway, which provides useful insights for further exploring the relationship between dbpa expression and crc development.

raw: hydrometric folding rod is composed of at least two hollow rod aluminum rectangular profile (1), which follow each other through the connecting pin (2) catered by a first screw (3). the hollow aluminum rod of rectangular profiles (1) have a calibration mark (4) and the numeral marks (5). at the rod of aluminum rectangular profile (1) is attached sliding system heads (6) for retaining the hydrometric propellers (13).
rewritten: the hydrometric folding rod is made up of at least two hollow aluminum rods with a rectangular profile (1) that connect in sequence via a connecting pin (2) secured by a first screw (3). these hollow rods (1) are marked with both a calibration indicator (4) and numeral labels (5). additionally, sliding system heads (6) are attached to the aluminum rectangular profiles (1) to hold the hydrometric propellers (13).

raw: selecting a profession suitable to students` expectations implies taking into account multiple factors. despite its usefulness and high impact, there are shortcomings in current university major recommendation models. among these limitations are the lack of flexible models, the dependence on historical information and the inadequate weighting of the factors involved. in this paper, a new college degree recommendation model based on psychological student profiling and the analytical hierarchical process is presented. it includes database construction, student profiling, college degree information filtering and recommendation generation. its implementation made it possible to improve reliability in the recommendation process of college degree. a case study is shown to demonstrate the model applicability.
rewritten: selecting a profession that aligns with students' expectations requires considering multiple factors. although current models for recommending university majors are both useful and impactful, they exhibit several shortcomings. these include the absence of flexible models, an over-reliance on historical data, and inadequate weighting of various factors. in this paper, we introduce a new college degree recommendation model that integrates psychological student profiling with the analytical hierarchical process. this approach encompasses constructing a database, profiling students, filtering college degree information, and generating recommendations. its implementation has enhanced the reliability of the college degree recommendation process, a point further validated by a case study demonstrating the model's applicability.

raw: the utility model discloses a dismounting device of counting currency machine display screen, including casing and display screen, the casing is equipped with the joint frame, the joint has erect the joint groove, the bottom in joint groove is equipped with the public affairs that are connected with the circuit board and inserts, the display screen is equipped with the connector, the connector be equipped with with joint groove matched with joint piece, the joint piece is equipped with mother and inserts, works as when the joint inslot is arranged in through the joint piece to the connector, public affairs are inserted to insert with mother and are connected, and the counting currency machine can be dismantled the display screen when the transportation in advance from the casing, effectively avoid the display screen to receive collision or extrusion, and the transportation of being convenient for prevents that the transportation from receiving the damage, when needs use, the joint inslot is arranged in through the joint piece to the connector, public affairs are inserted to insert with mother and are connected, realize that the display screen assembles with the casing mutually.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a detachable display screen for a currency-counting machine, which comprises a casing and a display screen. the casing features a joint frame with an erected joint groove, and a connector—linked to a circuit board and an insert—is installed at the bottom of this groove. the display screen itself is equipped with a connector that corresponds to a joint piece provided with male and female components. in use, the joint piece is inserted via the joint groove into the connector, allowing the male and female components to engage and establish a connection. this design enables the display screen to be removed from the casing prior to transportation, effectively protecting it from impact or compression damage during transit. when assembly is required, the display screen is reattached by inserting the joint piece into the connector, thereby reuniting the display screen with the casing.

raw: abstract this article explores the challenges online teachers face in establishing a teaching persona. while many online teachers believe that they create and control their teaching presence, drawing on transactional distance theory and relational distance theory, this paper argues that such an assumption can result in increased distance between teacher and students. this increased distance makes it more difficult for online students to accurately sense who their teacher is. problematically, this sense of who the teacher is can be a powerful element to help online students succeed within the course. to help students to perceive, more clearly, who the teacher of the course is, the article recommends frequent and varied communication between teacher and students, the utilization of multimodal communication methods to provide differing opportunities for students to make meaning, for teachers to share who they are with students, and to proactively encourage the formation of relationships between course participants through course design.
rewritten: abstract: this article examines the difficulties online instructors encounter in creating a distinct teaching persona. although many online educators believe they can craft and manage their teaching presence, drawing on transactional and relational distance theories, the paper argues that this assumption may actually widen the gap between teachers and students. as a result, online learners might struggle to accurately perceive who their instructor really is—a perception that plays a key role in student success. to enhance students’ clarity about the teacher’s identity, the article recommends maintaining frequent, varied communication; employing multiple forms of communication to offer diverse ways for students to understand the content; and designing courses that actively encourage relationship-building among all participants.

raw: the study aimed to verify the vitamin c supplementation on performance and gonadal development of nile tilapia. 160 fingerlings distributed in 16 tanks with 65 l capacity and constant water renewal in a closed recirculation system were used. the design was completely randomized with four treatments (0, 150, 300, and 600 mg of monophosphate l-ascorbic acid kg -1 diet) and four replications. we evaluated the weight gain parameters, apparent feed conversion, apparent feed intake and carcass yield to evaluate of production performance. we analyzed the sexual maturation stage and gonadosomatic index (gsi) to evaluate reproductive performance. there was no statistical difference in the performance parameters. it was observed significant difference to the gsi. no significance was found regarding other reproduction parameters. we recommend the use of 150 mg kg -1 of vitamin c to the diet of nile tilapia from to the reproductive index.
rewritten: the study aimed to assess the impact of vitamin c supplementation on performance and gonadal development in nile tilapia. a total of 160 fingerlings were allocated to 16 tanks (65 l each) within a closed recirculation system that provided constant water renewal. the completely randomized design involved four treatments (0, 150, 300, and 600 mg of monophosphate l-ascorbic acid per kg of diet) with four replications each. production performance was evaluated using weight gain, feed conversion, feed intake, and carcass yield, while reproductive performance was assessed based on the sexual maturation stage and gonadosomatic index (gsi). although no significant differences were detected in the performance parameters, a significant difference was noted for the gsi, with no significant changes observed in the other reproductive parameters. based on these findings, it is recommended to include 150 mg/kg of vitamin c in the diets of nile tilapia to improve the reproductive index.

raw: background since the first successful use of donated oocytes in 1984, the number of oocyte donation cycles in europe and the usa has dramatically increased. consequently, there has been increasing interest in the impact of oocyte donation on maternal and fetal outcomes. objective and rationale the aim of this review was to summarize the literature regarding maternal and fetal outcomes from pregnancies conceived through oocyte donation. search methods identification of relevant publications was through research within the embase medline and pubmed databases, the google-indexed scientific literature and periodic specialized magazines from the on-line library service of the university of milan. outcomes oocyte donation seems to be independently associated with a higher rate of pregnancy-induced hypertension and pre-eclampsia. an explanatory hypothesis is that an immunological maladaptation causes placenta-mediated disorders in oocyte donation pregnancies. the risks are even higher in twin pregnancies. oocyte donation also seems to be associated with lower fetal birthweight. however, after adjusting for obstetric complications, most studies report less pronounced differences in birthweight or no dissimilarities. the incidence of cesarean section is increased without clear clinical indications. wider implications oocyte donation pregnancies are associated with a higher rate of placental disorders of pregnancy, such as gestational hypertension and pre-eclampsia. the risk of poorer neonatal outcomes is increased in oocyte donation pregnancies compared to other in-vitro fertilization pregnancies. poorer outcomes have been demonstrated especially for twin pregnancies and in association with previous chronic pathologies or the development of obstetrics complications.
rewritten: background: since the first successful use of donated oocytes in 1984, the number of oocyte donation cycles in europe and the usa has risen dramatically. this increase has spurred greater interest in understanding how oocyte donation affects both maternal and fetal outcomes. objective and rationale: this review was conducted to compile and summarize existing literature on the maternal and fetal outcomes associated with pregnancies achieved through oocyte donation. search methods: relevant publications were identified by conducting searches in the embase, medline, and pubmed databases, exploring scientific literature indexed by google, and reviewing specialized periodicals available through the university of milan’s online library service. outcomes: evidence suggests that oocyte donation is independently linked to a higher incidence of pregnancy-induced hypertension and pre-eclampsia, possibly due to an immunological maladaptation that results in placenta-mediated complications. these risks are even more pronounced in twin pregnancies. additionally, oocyte donation appears to be associated with lower fetal birthweights; however, when adjustments are made for obstetric complications, most studies report only modest differences or no significant variation in birthweight. moreover, there is an increased rate of cesarean sections, often occurring without clear clinical justification. wider implications: pregnancies resulting from oocyte donation are associated with a higher prevalence of placental disorders, including gestational hypertension and pre-eclampsia, and exhibit poorer neonatal outcomes compared to other in-vitro fertilization pregnancies. these adverse outcomes are particularly evident in twin pregnancies and in cases where there is a preexisting chronic condition or the development of additional obstetric complications.

raw: a radar level gauge system comprising: a transceiver arrangement; a first probe to guide a first transmit signal through a surrounding medium towards a product in the tank, and to return a first surface echo signal, the first probe being configured to guide the first transmit signal with a first propagation velocity exhibiting a first dependence on a dielectric constant of the surrounding medium; a second probe to guide a second transmit signal through the surrounding medium towards the product, and to return a second surface echo signal, the second probe being configured to guide the second transmit signal with a second propagation velocity exhibiting a second dependence, different from the first dependence, on the dielectric constant of the surrounding medium; and processing circuitry for determining the filling level based on the first surface echo signal, the second surface echo signal, and a known relation between the first dependence and the second dependence.
rewritten: a radar level gauge system comprises a transceiver arrangement, a first probe, a second probe, and processing circuitry. the first probe is designed to transmit a first signal through a surrounding medium toward a product in a tank and then receive a first echo from the product's surface. this probe guides the first transmit signal at a propagation speed that is dependent on the dielectric constant of the surrounding medium in a specific way. similarly, the second probe transmits a second signal through the surrounding medium toward the product and receives a second echo signal from its surface. however, the second probe guides its transmit signal at a different propagation speed, characterized by a different dependence on the dielectric constant of the surrounding medium. the processing circuitry determines the filling level by analyzing both echo signals in conjunction with the known relationship between the two different dependencies.

raw: abstract coupled thermal/fluid/chemical analysis for the surface ablation of charring materials in a vehicle during hypersonic reentry has been conducted. the pyrolysis layer model is presented to simulate the thermal responses of the material, the relations of the normal shock wave are adopted to obtain the aerodynamic parameters in the boundary layer, and the counterflow diffusion model considering chemical mechanisms of hydrocarbons is proposed to solve the combustion of the pyrolysis gases. meanwhile, the gas-solid chemical reactions of surface char are coupled with the thermal responses, the aerodynamic parameters and the combustion of the pyrolysis gases. the new equations of surface ablation for the charring materials are discretized by the central and the up-wind difference formats. a coupled mechanism of surface ablation is simulated by using our computer codes. numerical results indicate that the consumption of oxygen in the combustion of the pyrolysis gases can protect charring materials from the surface ablation in some degree. furthermore, selecting charring materials with larger activation energy and smaller frequency factor can effectively improve the thermal protection performance of charring materials. this study will be helpful for the design of the thermal protection system in reentry vehicles.
rewritten: a comprehensive, integrated thermal, fluid, and chemical analysis has been performed to investigate the surface ablation of charring materials on a vehicle during hypersonic reentry. the study introduces a pyrolysis layer model that simulates the material's thermal responses, while aerodynamic parameters in the boundary layer are determined using relationships from normal shock wave theory. additionally, a counterflow diffusion model incorporating the chemical mechanisms of hydrocarbons is employed to resolve the combustion processes of pyrolysis gases. simultaneously, the gas–solid chemical reactions occurring within the surface char are coupled with thermal responses, aerodynamic characteristics, and the combustion of the pyrolysis gases. new surface ablation equations for charring materials have been discretized using both central and upwind difference schemes. the integrated surface ablation mechanism is then simulated using proprietary computer codes. numerical results suggest that the consumption of oxygen during the pyrolysis gas combustion phase can partially shield charring materials against surface ablation. furthermore, choosing charring materials with a higher activation energy and a lower frequency factor can significantly enhance their thermal protection performance. this research is expected to support the design of thermal protection systems for reentry vehicles.

raw: the invention discloses a multifunctional temperature regulating panel. the multifunctional temperature regulating panel comprises a temperature controller panel, a temperature control plate, a refrigerator master control plate and a temperature sensor, wherein a knob is arranged on the temperature controller panel; the temperature control plate is mounted on the temperature controller panel and is in communication connection with the master control plate; the temperature control plate comprises a potentiometer and a comparator; the knob is connected with a regulating part of the potentiometer; the comparator receives temperature signals of the temperature sensor and temperature setting signals output from the potentiometer, and compares control signals and outputs the control signals to the master control plate; a quick-freezing button is further arranged on the temperature controller panel and is connected with a quick-freezing switch; and the quick-freezing switch is connected with the master control plate. after the temperature of the temperature regulating panel is set by the knob type potentiometer, the control mode of the temperature regulating panel is the same with the control mode of a traditional mechanical temperature controller, and therefore, users can use the temperature regulating panel conveniently. the multifunctional temperature regulating panel has advantages of the mechanical temperature controller and advantages of an electronic temperature controller, advantages on the cost can be guaranteed, and furthermore, temperature can be controlled more precisely.
rewritten: the invention presents a multifunctional temperature regulating panel comprising a temperature controller panel, a temperature control plate, a refrigerator master control plate, and a temperature sensor. a knob is provided on the temperature controller panel, and the temperature control plate is mounted on this panel while being connected to the master control plate. the temperature control plate houses both a potentiometer and a comparator, with the knob linked to an adjustable part of the potentiometer. the comparator receives signals from the temperature sensor as well as temperature setting signals from the potentiometer, compares these signals, and sends corresponding control commands to the master control plate. additionally, a quick-freezing button is installed on the temperature controller panel and is connected to a quick-freezing switch, which in turn is linked to the master control plate. once the temperature is set using the knob-type potentiometer, the panel operates in the same manner as a traditional mechanical temperature controller, ensuring ease of use. overall, the multifunctional temperature regulating panel combines the advantages of both mechanical and electronic controllers, offers cost benefits, and allows for more precise temperature control.

raw: the invention provides an applying platform facilitating online material submitting of a client. the applying platform comprises a main server and a client side. a cloud memory module is arranged on the main server. various kinds of patent literature at home and abroad are recorded in the cloud memory module. the client side comprises a login module, a patent retrieval module and a patent applying module. the client can easily achieve retrieval and case applying through an internet trading platform, and can supervise a case in an office, so that time and labor are saved. for a patent agency, the traditional mode that a clerk advertises himself to multiple enterprises through phones is overturned, the clerk advertises himself to more clients through the internet trading platform, the dynamic state can be updated in real time, the client knows the process and later guarantee of patent applying more visually through all the functional modules of the platform, the advertising strength is larger, and the applying platform is suitable for the mainstream marketing mode of the current society.
rewritten: the invention introduces an application platform that facilitates online material submissions for clients. this platform consists of a main server and a client side. on the main server, a cloud memory module is installed, which stores a variety of domestic and international patent literature. meanwhile, the client side features modules for login, patent retrieval, and patent application. clients can easily search for patents and submit cases through an internet trading platform, with the added convenience of supervising their cases in an office environment, thereby saving both time and effort. for patent agencies, the traditional practice of clerks contacting multiple companies via phone is revolutionized, as clerks can now reach a broader client base through the internet trading platform. the platform allows real-time updates of dynamic statuses, enabling clients to visually track the process and subsequent steps of their patent applications through its various functional modules. this enhanced promotional capability aligns with the contemporary mainstream marketing approach.

raw: we present evidence on the health impacts and mechanisms of a large expansion in non-contributory health insurance in mexico. the seguro popular (sp) was rolled out in 2002-2010 across municipalities, providing exogenous variation in access to health services without co-pays. our intent-to-treat estimates show that sp reduced child mortality by 7% in poor municipalities, saving 861 children/year. the decline is driven mainly by deaths due to preventable causes, such as diarrhea and respiratory infections. we also document an increase in hospital care for children with the same conditions. our findings have important implications for the ongoing health insurance expansions.
rewritten: we provide evidence on the health effects and underlying mechanisms of a significant expansion of non-contributory health insurance in mexico. the seguro popular (sp) program was implemented across municipalities between 2002 and 2010, creating an exogenous variation in access to health services without co-payments. our intent-to-treat analysis indicates that sp reduced child mortality by 7% in impoverished municipalities—equating to 861 lives saved per year—with declines primarily observed in deaths from preventable causes, such as diarrhea and respiratory infections. additionally, we observed an increase in hospital care utilization for children suffering from these conditions. these results carry important implications for current expansions in health insurance coverage.

raw: background primary sjogren syndrome (pss) is a progressive autoimmune disease that primarily affects exocrine glands. the clinical presentation of pss may vary from an asymptomatic condition to severe skin symptom, resulting in a difficult and challenging diagnosis and treatment. methods and results here, we report a 47-year-old chinese woman who lost vision in the right eye for 7 days. she had been misdiagnosed with primary optic neuritis for 3 months. after 3 months, the results of immunohistochemistry, salivary gland scintigraphy, and antibody tests proved the diagnosis of pss. after an iv methylprednisolone treatment for 3 days (1.0 g/d), her final visual and perimetry outcome were satisfactory. a review of the relevant english literature based on pubmed encompassing dates up to july 2016 has been discussed. conclusion our finding and the literature review suggest that an early treatment may be beneficial but long-term disease may cause permanent irreparable damage.
rewritten: background: primary sjögren syndrome (pss) is a slowly progressing autoimmune disorder that mainly targets the exocrine glands. the clinical manifestations of pss can range from being asymptomatic to presenting with severe skin issues, making its diagnosis and treatment particularly challenging. methods and results: we present the case of a 47-year-old chinese woman who experienced vision loss in her right eye for 7 days. initially, she had been incorrectly diagnosed with primary optic neuritis over a period of 3 months. however, following further evaluation—including immunohistochemistry, salivary gland scintigraphy, and antibody testing—the correct diagnosis of pss was established. after receiving intravenous methylprednisolone (1.0 g/day for 3 days), her visual acuity and visual field outcomes improved satisfactorily. additionally, a review of the pertinent english literature from pubmed (up to july 2016) has been discussed. conclusion: both our findings and the literature review indicate that early intervention may be beneficial; however, prolonged disease duration can lead to permanent, irreversible damage.

raw: as radiofrequency filtering plays a vital role in electromagnetic devices and systems, recently photonic techniques have been intensively studied to implement radiofrequency filters to harness wide frequency coverage, large instantaneous bandwidth, low frequency-dependent loss, flexible tunability and strong immunity to electromagnetic interference. however, one crucial challenge facing the photonic radiofrequency filter (prf) is the less impressive out-of-band rejection. here, to the best of our knowledge, we demonstrate a tunable prf with a record out-of-band rejection of 80 db, which is 3 db higher than the maximum value (~77 db) reported so far, when incorporating highly selective polarization control and large narrow-band amplification enabled by stimulated brillouin scattering effect. in particular, this record rejection is arduous to be achieved for a narrow passband (e.g., a few megahertz) and a high finesse in a prf. moreover, the proposed prf is an active one capable of providing negligible insertion loss and even signal gain. tunable central frequency ranging from 2.1 to 6.1 ghz is also demonstrated. the proposed prf will provide an ultra-high noise or clutter suppression for harsh electromagnetic scenarios, particularly when room-temperature implementation and remote distribution are needed.
rewritten: radio-frequency filtering is essential in electromagnetic devices and systems, prompting intensive research into photonic techniques for implementing radio-frequency filters that offer broad frequency coverage, large instantaneous bandwidth, minimal frequency-dependent loss, flexible tunability, and robust immunity to electromagnetic interference. one major challenge with photonic radio-frequency filters (prfs), however, is their relatively modest out-of-band rejection. in our work, we present a tunable prf that achieves a record out-of-band rejection of 80 db—surpassing the previous maximum of about 77 db by 3 db—by incorporating highly selective polarization control and significant narrow-band amplification enabled by the stimulated brillouin scattering effect. achieving this level of rejection is particularly challenging for a narrow passband (e.g., only a few megahertz wide) and a high finesse prf. moreover, our active prf not only minimizes insertion loss but also provides signal gain. we further demonstrate that its tunable central frequency can be adjusted from 2.1 to 6.1 ghz. this innovative prf is well-suited for ultra-high noise or clutter suppression in harsh electromagnetic environments, especially when room-temperature operation and remote deployment are required.

raw: abnormally high corticosteroid levels are responsible for the onset of serious hormone-related diseases, and the inhibition of their biosynthesis by targeting cytochrome p450 (cyp) isoforms cyp11b1 and cyp11b2 has emerged as a promising strategy to restore healthy physiological levels of corticosteroids. with the aim of exploiting the xanthone scaffold as a privileged structure in medicinal chemistry and to further explore the chemical space of inhibitors of these cyps, a small library of imidazolylmethylxanthones was designed based on the results of a previously described compound series. assuming the capacity for an additional interaction with these enzymes, a properly selected substituent was introduced at position 6 of the xanthone core, maintaining the key imidazolylmethyl moiety at position 1. the 6-fluoro and 6-nitro derivatives [1-(1h-imidazol-1-yl)methyl-6-fluoro-9h-xanthen-9-one (1 a) and 1-(1h-imidazol-1-yl)methyl-6-nitro-9h-xanthen-9-one (1 d), respectively] proved to be active in the low nanomolar range, showing selectivity toward the related steroidogenic enzymes cyp19 and cyp17, even if the problem of selectivity between the two cyp11b isoforms remains unsolved. on the other hand, the 6-chloro derivative 1-(1h-imidazol-1-yl)methyl-6-chloro-9h-xanthen-9-one (1 b) was found to be a fairly potent and somewhat selective cyp19 inhibitor, confirming the versatility of the scaffold.
rewritten: excessively high corticosteroid levels trigger severe hormone-related disorders. targeting cytochrome p450 isoforms cyp11b1 and cyp11b2 to inhibit corticosteroid biosynthesis has, therefore, emerged as a promising method to reestablish normal corticosteroid levels. with the goal of leveraging the xanthone scaffold—a privileged structure in medicinal chemistry—and broadening the range of inhibitors for these cyp enzymes, a small library of imidazolylmethylxanthones was designed, building on the findings from a previously reported series. anticipating that an additional interaction with the enzymes could be beneficial, a carefully chosen substituent was added at position 6 of the xanthone core while retaining the essential imidazolylmethyl group at position 1. the 6-fluoro and 6-nitro compounds [1-(1h-imidazol-1-yl)methyl-6-fluoro-9h-xanthen-9-one (1a) and 1-(1h-imidazol-1-yl)methyl-6-nitro-9h-xanthen-9-one (1d)] demonstrated low nanomolar activity and selectivity towards the related steroidogenic enzymes cyp19 and cyp17, although differentiating between the two cyp11b isoforms remains an unresolved issue. meanwhile, the 6-chloro derivative, 1-(1h-imidazol-1-yl)methyl-6-chloro-9h-xanthen-9-one (1b), proved to be a fairly potent and somewhat selective inhibitor of cyp19, underscoring the scaffold’s versatility.

raw: we report a spray deposition technique as a screening tool for solution processed solar cells. a dual-feed spray nozzle is introduced to deposit donor and acceptor materials separately and to form blended films on substrates in situ. using a differential pump system with a motorised spray nozzle, the effect of film thickness, solution flow rates and the blend ratio of donor and acceptor materials on device performance can be found in a single experiment. using this method, polymer solar cells based on poly(3-hexylthiophene) (p3ht):(6,6)-phenyl c61 butyric acid methyl ester (pc61bm) are fabricated with numerous combinations of thicknesses and blend ratios. results obtained from this technique show that the optimum ratio of materials is consistent with previously reported values confirming this technique is a very useful and effective screening method. this high throughput screening method is also used in a single-feed configuration. in the single-feed mode, methylammonium iodide solution is deposited on lead iodide films to create a photoactive layer of perovskite solar cells. devices featuring a perovskite layer fabricated by this spray process demonstrated a power conversion efficiencies of up to 7.9%.
rewritten: we introduce a spray deposition method as a screening tool for producing solution-processed solar cells. in this approach, a dual-feed spray nozzle deposits the donor and acceptor materials separately, allowing blended films to form directly on the substrates. equipped with a differential pump system and a motorized spray nozzle, this setup enables investigation of how film thickness, solution flow rates, and the donor-to-acceptor blend ratio affect device performance—all within a single experiment. using this technique, polymer solar cells based on poly(3-hexylthiophene) (p3ht) and (6,6)-phenyl c61 butyric acid methyl ester (pc61bm) were manufactured with a variety of thickness and blend ratio combinations. the optimal material ratio determined from our results aligns with values previously reported, underscoring the effectiveness of this screening method. additionally, the high-throughput screening approach was applied in a single-feed configuration where a methylammonium iodide solution is sprayed onto lead iodide films to form the perovskite photoactive layer. devices fabricated with this perovskite layer achieved power conversion efficiencies of up to 7.9%.

raw: understanding the behavior of complex financial supply chains is usually difficult due to a lack of data capturing the interactions between financial institutions (fis) and the roles that they play in financial contracts (fcs). resmbs is an example supply chain corresponding to the us residential mortgage backed securities that were critical in the 2008 us financial crisis. in this paper, we describe the process of creating the resmbs graph dataset from financial prospectus. we use the systemt rule-based text extraction platform to develop two tools, org ner and dict ner, for named entity recognition of financial institution (fi) names. the resmbs graph comprises a set of fc nodes (each prospectus) and the corresponding fi nodes that are extracted from the prospectus. a role-fi extractor matches a role keyword such as originator, sponsor or servicer, with fi names. we study the performance of the role-fi extractor, and org ner and dict ner, in constructing the resmbs dataset. we also present preliminary results of a clustering based analysis to identify financial communities and their evolution in the resmbs financial supply chain.
rewritten: understanding the behavior of intricate financial supply chains is often challenging due to insufficient data on the interactions among financial institutions (fis) and the roles they assume in financial contracts (fcs). the resmbs dataset, which represents the u.s. residential mortgage-backed securities that were central to the 2008 financial crisis, serves as one example of such a supply chain. in this paper, we detail how we built the resmbs graph dataset from financial prospectuses. using the rule-based text extraction platform systemt, we developed two tools—org ner and dict ner—for extracting fi names via named entity recognition. the resulting resmbs graph includes a collection of fc nodes (each corresponding to a prospectus) and the related fi nodes extracted from these documents. additionally, a role-fi extractor links role keywords like originator, sponsor, or servicer with the respective fi names. we evaluate the performance of the role-fi extractor and the two ner tools in constructing the resmbs dataset and also present preliminary findings from a clustering-based analysis aimed at identifying financial communities and tracking their evolution within the resmbs financial supply chain.

raw: previous research on amphibian taste organs concerned amphibians with a biphasic life history, that is, with larval period and metamorphosis. direct developing frog species, such as eleutherodactylus coqui, undergo a cryptic metamorphosis before hatching, and many larval-specific features are vestigial or have been lost entirely from their ontogeny. taste buds are present in larval stages of biphasically developing anurans and are replaced by taste discs during metamorphosis. one goal of this study was to characterize the ontogeny of taste buds and/or discs in e. coqui. the other goal was to examine correlations between body size and taste organ density and size in different regions of oral epithelium. the research reveals the presence of only one type of taste organ, characteristic of metamorphs of biphasic amphibians, namely taste disc. in addition, taste disc density and the area of the taste disc sensory zone change dramatically during growth.
