rewritten: earlier research on amphibian taste organs primarily examined species with a biphasic life cycle—that is, species that experience a larval stage followed by metamorphosis. in contrast, direct-developing frogs like eleutherodactylus coqui undergo a concealed metamorphosis before hatching, which causes many features unique to the larval stage to become vestigial or disappear entirely during development. in amphibians with biphasic development, taste buds are present during the larval stages but are replaced by taste discs during metamorphosis. one objective of this study was to detail how taste buds and/or discs develop in e. coqui. another goal was to explore how variations in body size are related to both the density and size of taste organs in different regions of the oral epithelium. the results indicate that only one type of taste organ is found in e. coqui—a taste disc like that seen in metamorphic amphibians—and that the density and sensory zone area of the taste disc undergo significant changes as the frog grows.

raw: the utility model belongs to the technical field of road and bridge measures, concretely relates to road and bridge constructional survey device, including probe carriage and locating plate, install two probes on the probe carriage, be provided with two corresponding guiding holes on the locating plate, and install on the probe carriage the probe is placed respectively what set up on the locating plate is corresponding in the guiding hole, the lower extreme of probe is provided with the spenoid sword, install the column chi on the locating plate, be provided with the scale on the column chi, the column chi is through setting up slideway hole on the probe carriage with probe carriage sliding connection, be provided with laser emitter on the probe carriage, laser emitter sends the laser beam, the laser beam shines on the scale of column chi. when using the measuring device of this application, the reading of scale directly is pointed out to the laser beam, has reduced former therefore have the error because of the individual, has higher reading accuracy.
rewritten: the utility model relates to the technical field of road and bridge measurements. it specifically involves a surveying device for road and bridge construction that includes a probe carriage and a positioning plate. two probes are mounted on the probe carriage, and the positioning plate features two corresponding guiding holes so that each probe aligns with a guide hole. the lower end of each probe is provided with a spenoid sword. additionally, a column chi is installed on the positioning plate, which has a scale marked on it. this column chi connects to the probe carriage in a sliding manner via a slideway hole. the probe carriage also carries a laser emitter that projects a laser beam onto the scale on the column chi. when using this measuring device, the laser beam directly indicates the scale reading, thus reducing errors caused by individual inaccuracies and providing higher measurement precision.

raw: of the approximately 3.9 million dogs that enter us animal shelters each year, many exhibit behaviors related to fear, which can affect their likelihood of adoption. current dog training procedures to treat fear include counterconditioning and desensitization, which can often take months or years to show any behavior change and do not teach specific behaviors aimed to increase the dog's chance of being adopted. the current study used a negative reinforcement shaping procedure to teach fearful dogs to approach and and interact with people. the results showed that constructional fear treatment increased the amount of time the dog spent at the front of the kennel, and increased sniffing, tail wagging, and accepting petting for all 3 participants.
rewritten: each year, roughly 3.9 million dogs enter u.s. animal shelters, and many of them display fear-based behaviors that diminish their chances for adoption. traditional training methods to address fear, like counterconditioning and desensitization, often require months or even years to produce noticeable changes in behavior, and they do not specifically teach behaviors that might improve a dog's adoptability. in this study, a negative reinforcement shaping technique was used to train fearful dogs to approach and interact with people. the findings revealed that this constructional fear treatment not only increased the time the dogs spent at the front of the kennel but also led to more sniffing, tail wagging, and acceptance of petting among all three participants.

raw: active control of droplet mobility through low cost tools is highly desirable in applications entailing microfluidics, lab-on-chip devices and pertinent technologies. here, we present the design concepts of a versatile, low cost tool for dynamic droplet mobility manipulation, employing a scheme with backpressure application. initially sticky open- or closed- channel fluidics with hydrophobic, porous walls are rendered slippery with the application of backpressure through the porous walls. deliberate control of backpressure directs the wetting phenomena to the desired state. operation parameters, and control system considerations are presented. ultra-low backpressure values, are needed for channels with small cross-sections, which in turn are compatible with ultra-low energy demands.
rewritten: controlling droplet mobility using inexpensive methods is highly advantageous for microfluidics, lab-on-chip devices, and related technologies. in our work, we introduce the design ideas for a flexible, cost-effective tool that dynamically manipulates droplet motion through a mechanism that applies backpressure. in systems where open or closed channels with hydrophobic, porous walls initially exhibit adhesion, the application of backpressure through these walls transforms them into slippery surfaces. by carefully adjusting the backpressure, the desired wetting behavior is achieved. we also discuss the operational parameters and considerations for the control system. notably, channels with small cross-sections require extremely low backpressure, leading to very low energy consumption.

raw: the invention provides a rotary polishing and impurity removing conveyor and a polishing and impurity removing method. currently, in the grain industry, grains can be directly sold after being threshed, the appearance of the grains is dirty and not attractive enough, a buyer can easily think that the grains are not good, consequently selling of the grains is not smooth, and it is difficult to sell the grains at an ideal price; and meanwhile, the sales volume is not good, and the income of farmers is seriously affected. the method involves a device shell (1), wherein baffles (2) are arranged at the two ends of the device shell, bearings (3) are installed on the baffles and matched with a rotating shaft (4), a power connecting shaft (5) is arranged at one end of the rotating shaft, stirring cage blades (6) are arranged in the middle of the rotating shaft and connected with grain brushes (8) through a set of bolts (7), a grain feeding device (9) is arranged at the front end of the device shell, and a grain discharging device (10) is arranged at the rear end of the device shell. the rotary polishing and impurity removing conveyor and the polishing and impurity removing method are used for grain polishing and impurity removing.
rewritten: the invention relates to a rotary conveyor for polishing grains and removing impurities, as well as a method for carrying out the polishing and impurity removal. in the current grain industry, grains are often sold immediately after threshing even though they have a dirty and less appealing appearance. this can lead buyers to believe the grains are of poor quality, resulting in difficulties in selling at a good price, low sales volume, and ultimately a significant negative impact on farmers' incomes. the method utilizes a device with a shell (1) that has baffles (2) at its two ends. bearings (3) are mounted on these baffles to accommodate a rotating shaft (4). a power connecting shaft (5) is affixed at one end of the rotating shaft. in the middle of this shaft, stirring cage blades (6) are installed, which are connected to grain brushes (8) by a set of bolts (7). a grain feeding device (9) is positioned at the front end of the shell, while a grain discharging device (10) is located at the rear end. together, the rotary polishing and impurity removing conveyor and method are applied to enhance the appearance of the grains by polishing them and removing impurities.

raw: the utility model discloses a water based paint bucket with mould proof, thermal -insulated function, it includes: the membrane is moulded to the staving, the bottleneck, and the bottle lid body, the pull ring, spliced pole and lug, the lateral wall lower part of bottle lid body be equipped with with bottleneck matching the external screw's internal thread, this internal lug that is equipped with of bottle lid, the department is equipped with the spliced pole in the middle of bottle lid body and the pull ring, should scribble storage bucket simple structure, job stabilization is reliable, and is corrosion -resistant, need not manual just can tear the plastic envelope membrane and the mould proof has, the function insulates against heat.
rewritten: the utility model presents a water-based paint bucket that features both mold resistance and thermal insulation. it comprises a container body that is integrally molded with the neck and the lid, as well as a pull ring, a spliced pole, and a lug. the lower portion of the lid’s lateral wall is designed with a neck section that corresponds to the internal threads of the external screw, while an internal lug is incorporated into the lid. additionally, the center of the lid is furnished with both the spliced pole and the pull ring. this design results in a simple, reliable storage bucket structure that ensures stable operation and excellent corrosion resistance. moreover, the bucket does not require any manual adjustments—the user simply tears off the plastic envelope membrane—and it maintains its mold-proof and heat-insulating capabilities.

raw: the utility model provides a tower regeneration desicator of list that reliability is high, including filter, desicator, reservoir, solenoid valve, cock and auxiliary reservoir, the filter is connected to the air inlet of desicator, the reservoir is connected to the back blow port of desicator, auxiliary reservoir is connected to the delivery outlet of desicator, the control mouth of desicator passes through the solenoid valve and the cock is connected with auxiliary reservoir. the utility model has the beneficial effect of simple structure, easy operation, can guarantee that the bow collector normally raises, improve the operational reliability of vehicle.
rewritten: the utility model presents a high-reliability tower regeneration desiccator that comprises a filter, a desiccator, a reservoir, a solenoid valve, a cock, and an auxiliary reservoir. in this design, the filter is connected to the desiccator’s air inlet while the reservoir is attached to its back blow port. the auxiliary reservoir is connected to the desiccator’s delivery outlet, and the control outlet of the desiccator is routed through a solenoid valve with the cock linked to the auxiliary reservoir. this design features a simple structure and easy operation, ensuring that the bow collector is reliably raised and improving the vehicle's overall operational reliability.

raw: the romanian legal system has gradually evolved in the past 5 years to include a set of principles and rules limiting the public debt and deficits and creating a supervision and correction framework. this legal mechanism aiming to ensure fiscal and budgetary discipline has been inspired from two main sources: in first place, the conditions attached to the financing agreements entered with the international financing institutions in the aftermath of the 2009 crisis, and further the transposition of the principles included in the eu regulations aiming to reinforce the fiscal-budgetary policies, as the six-pack and the two-pack, as well as of the treaty on stability, coordination and governance in the economic and monetary union. although including a balanced budget principle and a debt brake, together with fiscal discipline rules and a permanent assessment of fiscal-budgetary strategies, measures and regulations by an independent fiscal council, and thus complying with the principles agreed in this respect at the european level, the national fiscal-budgetary mechanism has a major weakness, derived from the fact that all such rules are included in ordinary laws, situated on the same level of the hierarchy of norms, and thus easily amendable upon approval or rectification of annual budgets. this leaves place for a future debate on the role of the balanced budget rule during the envisaged constitutional reform.
rewritten: over the past five years, the romanian legal framework has gradually developed to incorporate principles and regulations that restrict public debt and deficits while establishing a system for oversight and correction. this fiscal and budgetary discipline mechanism was primarily shaped by two sources: first, the conditions linked to the financing agreements with international institutions following the 2009 crisis, and second, the integration of principles from eu regulations—such as the six-pack and two-pack—and the treaty on stability, coordination and governance in the economic and monetary union, which aim to strengthen fiscal and budgetary policies. although the national mechanism features a balanced budget principle, a debt brake, fiscal discipline rules, and regular evaluations of fiscal strategies and policies by an independent fiscal council in line with european standards, it suffers from a significant weakness. all these rules are embedded in ordinary laws, which are on the same level as other norms and can be easily modified with the approval or adjustment of annual budgets. this issue leaves open the possibility of future discussions regarding the role of the balanced budget rule within the context of the anticipated constitutional reform.

raw: subthalamic nucleus (stn) local field potentials (lfp) are neural signals that have been shown to reveal motor and language behavior, as well as pathological parkinsonian states. we use a research-grade implantable neurostimulator (ins) with data collection capabilities to record stn-lfp outside the operating room to determine the reliability of the signals over time and assess their dynamics with respect to behavior and dopaminergic medication. seven subjects were implanted with the recording augmented deep brain stimulation (dbs) system, and bilateral stn-lfp recordings were collected in the clinic over twelve months. subjects were cued to perform voluntary motor and language behaviors in on and off medication states. the stn-lfp recorded with the ins demonstrated behavior-modulated desynchronization of beta frequency (13-30 hz) and synchronization of low gamma frequency (35-70 hz) oscillations. dopaminergic medication did not diminish the relative beta frequency oscillatory desynchronization with movement. however, movement-related gamma frequency oscillatory synchronization was only observed in the medication on state. we observed significant inter-subject variability, but observed consistent stn-lfp activity across recording systems and over a one-year period for each subject. these findings demonstrate that an ins system can provide robust stn-lfp recordings in ambulatory patients, allowing for these signals to be recorded in settings that better represent natural environments in which patients are in a variety of medication states.
rewritten: subthalamic nucleus (stn) local field potentials (lfps) are neural signals that can indicate motor and language behaviors as well as the pathological states associated with parkinson's disease. in this study, we utilized a research-grade implantable neurostimulator (ins) equipped with data collection capabilities to record stn-lfps outside of the operating room. our aim was to evaluate the long-term reliability of these signals and to examine how they change in relation to behavior and dopaminergic medication. seven subjects had a recording-enhanced deep brain stimulation (dbs) system implanted, and bilateral stn-lfp recordings were obtained in a clinical setting over a 12-month period. during recordings, subjects were prompted to perform voluntary motor and language tasks both with and without medication. the stn-lfps recorded with the ins showed behavior-related desynchronization of beta frequency (13–30 hz) oscillations and synchronization of low gamma frequency (35–70 hz) oscillations. while dopaminergic medication did not affect the extent of beta frequency desynchronization during movement, gamma frequency synchronization associated with movement was observed only when subjects were on medication. although there was considerable variability among subjects, the stn-lfp activity remained consistent across different recording systems and over the year-long duration for each individual. overall, these results indicate that an ins system is capable of providing robust stn-lfp recordings in ambulatory patients, enabling the monitoring of these signals in more naturalistic settings and across various medication states.

raw: this paper introduces a class of monte carlo algorithms which are based upon the simulation of a markov process whose quasi-stationary distribution coincides with a distribution of interest. this differs fundamentally from, say, current markov chain monte carlo methods which simulate a markov chain whose stationary distribution is the target. we show how to approximate distributions of interest by carefully combining sequential monte carlo methods with methodology for the exact simulation of diffusions. the methodology introduced here is particularly promising in that it is applicable to the same class of problems as gradient based markov chain monte carlo algorithms but entirely circumvents the need to conduct metropolis-hastings type accept/reject steps whilst retaining exactness: the paper gives theoretical guarantees ensuring the algorithm has the correct limiting target distribution. furthermore, this methodology is highly amenable to big data problems. by employing a modification to existing na{\"i}ve sub-sampling and control variate techniques it is possible to obtain an algorithm which is still exact but has sub-linear iterative cost as a function of data size.
rewritten: this paper presents a new class of monte carlo algorithms that work by simulating a markov process whose quasi‐stationary distribution matches a distribution of interest. this approach is fundamentally different from traditional markov chain monte carlo methods, which construct a markov chain with the target as its stationary distribution. we demonstrate that by judiciously combining sequential monte carlo techniques with methods for the exact simulation of diffusions, one can closely approximate the desired distributions. notably, this methodology applies to the same problem domain as gradient-based mcmc algorithms but completely avoids the need for metropolis–hastings accept/reject steps while still maintaining exactness; theoretical guarantees are provided to assure that the algorithm converges to the correct target distribution. moreover, this method is highly scalable for big data applications. with modifications to conventional naive sub-sampling and control variate techniques, it is possible to develop an algorithm that remains exact yet achieves a sub-linear iterative cost with respect to data size.

raw: two theoretical models of infrasound piezoelectric hydrophone (iph) are proposed to meet the requirements of high sensitivity and low frequency hydrophone. the iph has a laminated structure by using piezoelectric plates with polarization along thickness. two connection forms of piezoelectric plates, in series and in parallel, are taken into consideration. the effect of structural parameters on the detection performance is investigated to improve sensitivity of the iph to detect infrasound signal. the structural parameters are optimized to obtain high sensitivity and wide bandwidth with the minimum cost. the theoretical results are in good agreement with the ansys simulation. the results are helpful to analyze and design iph.
rewritten: two theoretical models of an infrasound piezoelectric hydrophone (iph) have been introduced to fulfill the requirements of a hydrophone that operates at low frequencies with high sensitivity. the iph features a laminated design constructed from piezoelectric plates that are polarized along their thickness. both series and parallel connection configurations of the piezoelectric plates are explored. the study examines how various structural parameters affect detection performance in order to enhance the iph's sensitivity to infrasound signals. these parameters are optimized to deliver a device with high sensitivity and broad bandwidth at minimal cost. additionally, the theoretical findings show strong agreement with ansys simulations, providing valuable insights for further analysis and design of the iph.

raw: a high-strength arc-shaped truss structure which can improve production efficiency, reduce manufacturing cost and decrease welded junction number and is regular in overall structure, free of influences on the anticorrosion function of a framework and free of environment pollution comprises arc-shaped rods, wherein a plurality of connecting pieces are fixedly arranged on the outer bottom faces of the arc-shaped rods in the length direction, the connecting pieces at the two ends correspond to the ends of the arc-shaped rods, a long chord member is detachably connected between every two adjacent connecting pieces arranged in a spaced mode, a crossed structure is formed by every two adjacent long chord members, a short chord member is detachably connected between the connecting piece at the end of each arc-shaped rod and the corresponding adjacent connecting piece, and the short chord members and the long chord members close to the ends of the arc-shaped rods are crossed. a supporting rod i is detachably connected between the crossed point of every two crossed chord members and the corresponding arc-shaped rod, and a supporting rod ii is detachably connected between each connecting plate and the corresponding chord member right opposite to the connecting plate.
rewritten: the invention describes a high-strength, arc-shaped truss structure designed to enhance production efficiency, lower manufacturing costs, and reduce the number of welded joints without compromising the overall structural regularity, corrosion resistance, or environmental safety. the structure includes arc-shaped rods on which multiple connecting pieces are fixed along the outer bottom surface in the longitudinal direction, with the terminal connecting pieces aligned with the rod ends. between every two adjacent connecting pieces, spaced apart, a long chord member is removably connected, resulting in a crossed configuration when every two adjacent long chord members intersect. additionally, a short chord member is removably connected between the connecting piece at each rod end and its adjacent connecting piece; these short chord members intersect with the long chord members near the rod ends. to support the structure further, a supporting rod i is removably connected from the intersection point of each pair of crossed chord members to the corresponding arc-shaped rod, and a supporting rod ii is removably connected between each connecting plate and the chord member positioned directly opposite it.

raw: the invention discloses a green plum glutinous rice wine brewing technology. the brewing technology comprises fully mixing rhizopus, yeast, aseptic high starch, low starch sugar and wheat bran, wetting the mixture through water, standing the mixture for 24-48h to obtain liquor qu, mixing glutinous rice and green plums according to a use ratio of 1: 1, steaming the mixture until complete cooking, uniformly mixing the mixture as a semifinished product and the liquor qu, putting the mixture into a ceramic jar, transferring the ceramic jar into a room with a room temperature of 25-35 deg c, carrying out indoor fermentation, pouring the fermentation product into a ceramic tower, adding rice wine into the fermentation product, carrying out further fermentation, carrying out seal cellaring for 3-6 months, and carrying out press filtration, decoction, clarification, press filtration, loading and disinfection. the green plum glutinous rice wine has effects of invigorating spleen, benefiting lung, nourishing heart, benefiting kidney and strengthening intestines. the green plum glutinous rice wine is used for treating palpitation, insomnia, body deficiency, spermatorrhea, hemorrhoid and proctoptosia.
rewritten: the invention outlines a brewing method for green plum glutinous rice wine. the process involves the following steps: • fully mixing rhizopus, yeast, aseptically processed high-starch and low-starch sugars, and wheat bran. • adding water to wet the mixture and allowing it to stand for 24–48 hours to produce liquor qu. • combining glutinous rice and green plums in a 1:1 ratio, then steaming the blend until it is fully cooked. • evenly mixing the steamed product (as a semi-finished product) with the liquor qu. • placing this blend into a ceramic jar and storing it in an environment with a temperature of 25–35°c for indoor fermentation. • transferring the fermenting product into a ceramic tower, adding rice wine, and carrying out additional fermentation. • sealing and cellaring the mixture for 3–6 months, followed by processes such as press filtration, decoction, clarification, an additional round of press filtration, loading, and disinfection. the resulting green plum glutinous rice wine is said to help invigorate the spleen, benefit the lungs, nourish the heart, support kidney function, and strengthen the intestines. it is used to treat conditions like palpitation, insomnia, body deficiency, spermatorrhea, hemorrhoids, and rectal prolapse.

raw: the utility model provides a divide material pipe device, the device and wire feeding device blanking storehouse with inhale a device and be connected the device includes material distribution bin, and run through material distribution bin's branch material pipe, material distribution bin butt joint wire feeding device blanking storehouse, branch material pipe one end be the exit end, the other end is the blind end, the exit end that divides the material pipe with inhale a device and be connected, the blind end that divides the material pipe is equipped with air supplement device, air supplement device include an air supplementing opening, a picture peg and a locking butterfly valve, air supplementing opening sets up divide the upper portion of the blind end of material pipe, the air supplementing opening border is equipped with a slot, and a picture peg removes the size of controlling air supplementing opening in the slot, through the fixed position of picture peg in the slot of a locking butterfly valve, the utility model discloses guarantee the stability of mending the amount of wind, avoided the defect that has the wind zone of dying, reduced pipe tobacco putty fault rate, improved the pipe tobacco utilization ratio, ensured the pipe tobacco quality.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a segmented material pipe device that connects an inhalation device with the wire feeding device’s blanking storehouse. the apparatus comprises a material distribution bin through which a branch material pipe runs. one end of this branch pipe—the exit end—is connected to the inhalation device, while the opposite, blind end is equipped with an air supplement device. this air supplement device features an air supplement opening, a picture peg, and a locking butterfly valve. the air supplement opening is positioned along the upper portion of the blind end of the material pipe and is bordered by a slot. a picture peg inserted into this slot regulates the size of the air supplement opening, and it is secured in place by the locking butterfly valve. this design ensures a stable airflow, prevents issues associated with uneven wind distribution, reduces the fault rate of pipe tobacco paste, improves the pipe tobacco utilization ratio, and guarantees the quality of the pipe tobacco.

raw: the invention discloses an extrinsic parameter calibration and whole-space video stitching method for a whole-space camera. firstly, extrinsic parameter calibration is carried out on a video photographed by the whole-space camera, and the calibration content comprises the horizontal angle, the pitch angle and the spinning angle of each camera; then, a corresponding local longitude and latitude table is built for each camera, the extrinsic parameter are combined to form a global longitude and latitude table, and thus, each point in the space can find out two coordinate positions of the point corresponding to a camera original image and corresponding weights; and finally, in two check modes of a whole-space camera mode and a field-of-view mode, corresponding view tables are built correspondingly, and thus, each point in the view can be quickly mapped to the corresponding two camera original image positions and the corresponding weights through the view table, and through weighted summation, the color value can be calculated. through the above technical scheme, technical effects of accurately and quickly calibrating the extrinsic parameters of the whole-space camera and accurately and quickly a whole-space image can be realized.
rewritten: the invention describes a method for extrinsic parameter calibration and full-space video stitching for a full-space camera. first, the system performs extrinsic parameter calibration on video captured by the full-space camera. this calibration involves determining the horizontal angle, the pitch angle, and the spinning angle for each individual camera. next, a local longitude and latitude table is generated for each camera, and the extrinsic parameters are used to assemble a global longitude and latitude table. this global table allows every point in space to be associated with two coordinate positions from the original camera images as well as corresponding weight values. finally, under both full-space camera mode and field-of-view mode, specific view tables are constructed. these view tables quickly map each point in the view to the corresponding positions in two camera images and their weights, and by performing a weighted summation, the color value is computed. this technical solution thus achieves accurate and rapid calibration of the full-space camera’s extrinsic parameters, as well as precise and efficient full-space image synthesis.

raw: building energy performance simulation (beps) has been developed over the last three decades. substantial attempts have been made to enhance its capability and transfer the technology into practice. despite these efforts, it has not been pervasively used on daily basis during the design practice for better decision making. the main causes are insufficient understanding with reagard to the limitations of the model and simulation tools, model complexity and fidelity, uncertainty, and user interface. in this paper, the aforementioned topics are explored from the perspective of an architectural designer and an engineer to discover the root of causes.
rewritten: over the past thirty years, building energy performance simulation (beps) has evolved steadily, with significant efforts directed towards enhancing its capabilities and integrating the technology into practical use. however, despite these advances, it is still not routinely applied in everyday design practice for informed decision-making. this is primarily due to a limited understanding of the simulation tools' constraints, issues with model complexity and fidelity, inherent uncertainties, and challenges related to the user interface. in this paper, these issues are investigated from both an architectural designer’s and an engineer’s standpoint to pinpoint their underlying causes.

raw: the utility model discloses a measure device of rivers to pile foundation surge pressure, including pile foundation and support, movable mounting has a horizontal displacement adjustment mechanism on the support, and horizontal displacement adjustment mechanism is last to be provided with vertical displacement adjustment mechanism, install pressure sensor on the vertical displacement adjusting mechanism, pressure sensor passes through the survey line and connects data acquisition instrument, horizontal displacement adjustment mechanism is used for the distance between adjust pressure sensor and the pile foundation, vertical displacement adjusting mechanism is arranged in the degree of depth of adjust pressure sensor at rivers. in the river course since velocity of water flow influence the more inaccessibility pile foundation of measuring equipment the time, the utility model discloses a device can conveniently be placed pressure sensor in the side of pile foundation, and the very big reduces because of the mobile inconvenience that causes measurement personnel of rivers, can measure the mesh of different degree of depth department rivers to the surge pressure of pile foundation.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a device for measuring surge pressure on pile foundations in rivers. it consists of a pile foundation and a support structure that features a horizontally adjustable mechanism. attached to this is a vertical adjustment mechanism on which a pressure sensor is mounted. the sensor is connected to a data acquisition instrument via a survey line. the horizontal mechanism adjusts the distance between the sensor and the pile foundation, while the vertical mechanism positions the sensor to the desired depth in the river. because high water flow speeds often make it difficult to install measuring equipment on pile foundations, this device allows for the pressure sensor to be conveniently positioned alongside the pile foundation. as a result, it significantly reduces the need for mobile measurements by personnel, enabling accurate surge pressure readings at various depths along the river.

raw: the utility model discloses an aluminium carborundum bottom plate and be used for subassembly of die -casting aluminium carborundum bottom plate, subassembly include mould and carborundum prefab, and the basic board cavity who is used for holding the carborundum prefab is offered on the surface of mould, basic board cavity's bottom be equipped with a plurality of when being used for die -casting plus the infiltration of aluminium liquid form aluminium column's post hole, the post hole is the blind hole. the carborundum prefab is gone to court the one side of catatoxy board cavity bottom and is offered the holding tank that is used for inlaying aluminum plate. during die -casting, plus the infiltration from the carborundum prefab of aluminium liquid forms aluminium carborundum base plate with the carborundum prefab, permeates the post hole shape simultaneously and becomes aluminium column to aluminum plate is in the molten condition, and cooling back aluminum plate, aluminium carborundum base plate and aluminium column become an organic whole. aluminum plate and carborundum base plate coupling phase before to aluminium column combine the area increase with the carborundum base plate, therefore aluminium column is difficult drops from aluminium carborundum base plate, aluminium column's intensity increase. the aforesaid is used for the subassembly of die -casting aluminium carborundum bottom plate, and simple structure can be used to the aluminium carborundum bottom plate that the preparation obtained aluminium column firm in connection.
rewritten: the utility model discloses an aluminum carborundum base plate for forming a die-casting aluminum carborundum base plate assembly. the assembly includes a mold and a preformed carborundum piece. the mold features a cavity on its surface designed to hold the carborundum piece, and the bottom of this cavity is equipped with several blind post holes. during die-casting, aluminum liquid infiltrates these post holes to form aluminum columns. the carborundum preset is positioned against one side of the cavity bottom and incorporates a holding tank meant for securing an inlaid aluminum plate. when the aluminum liquid is injected, it interacts with the carborundum preset, simultaneously forming the aluminum carborundum base plate and molding the post hole into an aluminum column. while the aluminum plate remains molten, cooling causes the aluminum plate, carborundum base plate, and aluminum column to integrate into a single unit. since the coupling area between the aluminum plate and the carborundum base plate increases before the formation of the aluminum column, the column is more securely attached, enhancing its strength. this design simplifies the process for assembling die-casting aluminum carborundum base plates and ensures that the aluminum columns are firmly connected to the base plate.

raw: the invention belongs to the technical field of intelligent control over power station boilers and discloses a method for cleaning operation data of a power station boiler. the method comprises the steps of defining a steady state coefficient, adopting a manual guiding mode to determine a steady state threshold of characteristic parameters, traversing data to calculate each data point steady state coefficient and steady state weight coefficient, determining a steady state of each data bar according to the steady state weight coefficient, removing multiple data marked as a non-steady state and the beginning of each steady state section, and finally adopting an improved confidence space to screen data in the steady state section, so as to improve reliability of data in a high sparse steady state. the method for cleaning the operation data of the power station boiler is put forward according to operation data characteristics of the power station boiler, has high reliability and is simple to operate and quick in calculating speed.
rewritten: this invention, in the technical field of intelligent control for power station boilers, discloses a method for cleaning a boiler's operation data. the method includes the following steps: defining a steady state coefficient, using a manual guiding mode to set a steady state threshold for the characteristic parameters, and traversing the data to compute both a steady state coefficient and a corresponding weight coefficient for each data point. based on the weight coefficient, the method then determines the steady state for each data bar, removes multiple data points flagged as non-steady state along with the start of each steady state segment, and finally applies an improved confidence space to filter the steady state section data, thereby improving the reliability of data within a highly sparse steady state. designed according to the operational data characteristics of power station boilers, this data cleaning method is not only highly reliable but also simple to operate and quick in computation.

raw: in this paper, we introduce a new set of 3d gesture descriptors based on the laban movement analysis model. the proposed descriptors are used in a machine learning framework (with svm and different random forest techniques) for both gesture recognition and emotional analysis purposes. in a first experiment, we test our expressivity model for action recognition purposes on the microsoft research cambridge-12 dataset and obtain very high recognition rates (more than 97 %). in a second experiment, we test our descriptors' ability to qualify the emotional content, upon a database of pre-segmented orchestra conductors' gestures recorded in rehearsals. the results obtained show the relevance of our model which outperforms results reported in similar works on emotion recognition.
rewritten: in this paper, we present a novel collection of 3d gesture descriptors inspired by the laban movement analysis model. we integrate these descriptors into a machine learning framework—utilizing svm and various random forest methods—for both gesture recognition and emotional analysis. in our initial experiment, we evaluate our expressivity model on the microsoft research cambridge-12 dataset, achieving remarkably high recognition rates (exceeding 97%). in a subsequent experiment, we test how well our descriptors capture emotional content using a database of pre-segmented gestures by orchestra conductors recorded during rehearsals. the results highlight the effectiveness of our model, which outperforms previously reported outcomes in similar emotion recognition studies.

raw: background this study examines the microbial and fungal contamination associated with the presence of renovation works in a hospital site in sardinia (italy). methods microbiological environmental monitoring was carried out before, during and at the conclusion of the works in the ophthalmology department in view of a risk assessment procedure. results although the median values of microbial and fungal counts were found raised during the works, protective measures set out by the internal procedures limited the contamination level. conclusions this study emphasizes the benefits of environmental surveillance for airborne contamination to help prevent outbreaks of nosocomial mycosis associated with construction work.
rewritten: this study investigates the microbial and fungal contamination linked to renovation work at a hospital in sardinia, italy. environmental monitoring for microbiological presence was conducted in the ophthalmology department before, during, and after the renovations as part of a risk assessment process. although microbial and fungal median counts increased during the renovation, the protective measures outlined in the hospital’s internal procedures kept contamination levels in check. the findings underscore the importance of environmental surveillance for airborne contaminants in preventing hospital-acquired fungal infections associated with construction work.

raw: the utility model relates to an oven and oven door buffer gear thereof. the slide rail of this oven door buffer gear on being fixed in the box of oven, can follow slide rail back and forth movement's sliding block and flexible connectors, the one end of sliding block and oven door's door body coupling, the other end and flexible connectors connects, flexible connectors's one end with the sliding block is connected, the other end is fixed in on the box of oven, the sliding block is in back and forth movement on the slide rail drives flexible connectors is concertina movement. the utility model discloses oven door buffer gear passes through flexible connectors's elastic reaction to the restriction of sliding block, makes oven door slowly fall to avoid oven door to fall because of weight is quick, improved the safety in utilization of oven, the safety in utilization of using this oven door buffer gear's oven can be high, and its oven door is difficult because of the quick whereabouts of door weight volume, has reduced that glass is broken, the emergence of scheduling problem is emptyd to the oven organism.
rewritten: this utility model pertains to an oven and a buffer mechanism for the oven door. in this design, a sliding rail is installed within the oven's housing. a sliding block moves back and forth along the rail, with one end coupled to the oven door and the other end connected to a flexible connector. one end of the flexible connector is attached to the sliding block, while its other end is secured to the oven housing. as the sliding block moves along the rail, it causes the flexible connector to flex in a concertina-like manner. this design utilizes the elastic reaction of the flexible connector to control the sliding block’s movement, ensuring that the oven door descends slowly rather than dropping rapidly due to its weight. as a result, the safety of the oven is enhanced, reducing the likelihood of damage such as glass breakage or other issues associated with a rapidly falling door.

raw: the present invention relates to a synchronous multi-channel light emitting diode driving apparatus capable of simultaneously emitting light from light emitting diodes of all channels regardless of the magnitude of an input voltage. the synchronous multi-channel light emitting diode driving apparatus comprises: a rectification unit which receives and rectifies an alternating current power voltage; a multi-channel light emitting diode unit which receives a rectified current from the rectifier and emits light, and in which a plurality of light emitting diodes including at least a first light emitting diode and a second light emitting diode are connected in series; a current detection unit which detects a current flowing through the first light emitting diode; a current mirroring unit which performs mirroring on the current detected by the current detection unit and supplies the mirrored current to the second light emitting diode; and a sequential current driving unit which is connected to the first light emitting diode and the second light emitting diode so as to provide a path for the current flowing through the first light emitting diode or a current flowing through the second light emitting diode, and which activates the current detection unit according to the input voltage level.
rewritten: the present invention pertains to a synchronous multi-channel led driving device designed to emit light simultaneously from all channels’ leds regardless of the input voltage level. the device includes the following components: • a rectification unit that receives an alternating current power input and rectifies it. • a multi-channel led unit that receives the rectified current and emits light, featuring multiple leds—at least a first led and a second led—connected in series. • a current detection unit that monitors the current flowing through the first led. • a current mirroring unit that mirrors the current detected by the current detection unit and delivers this mirrored current to the second led. • a sequential current driving unit, connected to both the first and second leds, which provides a path for the current flowing through either led and activates the current detection unit based on the input voltage level.

raw: the present invention relates to an apparatus to measure a profile, comprising: a body; at least one support leg folded or curved to surround a portion of an object to be measured, wherein one end is connected to the body; a moving wheel installed in the support leg to selectively be in contact with the object to be measured; a weight mounted on the other end of the support leg, and placed under a center of gravity of the object to be measured; and a measurement unit having at least one measuring instrument installed in the body. as such, by using the center of gravity, a profile which a cylindrical member such as a rolling roll has is able to accurately be measured; thereby reducing an error of measurement and increasing reproducibility.
rewritten: the present invention pertains to an apparatus for measuring a profile. it comprises a body; at least one support leg that is either folded or curved to encircle part of an object to be measured, with one end attached to the body; a moving wheel placed in the support leg which can selectively contact the object; a weight mounted on the opposing end of the support leg, positioned under the object's center of gravity; and a measurement unit containing at least one measuring instrument installed within the body. by utilizing the center of gravity, the apparatus can accurately measure the profile of a cylindrical member, such as a rolling roll, thereby reducing measurement errors and enhancing reproducibility.

raw: the new pentacyclic guanidine alkaloids, monanchoxymycalin a (1) and monanchoxymycalin b (2) were isolated from the far-eastern marine sponge monanchora pulchra. their structures were assigned on the basis of detailed analysis of ld- and 2d-nmr spectroscopic and mass spectrometric data. compounds 1 and 2 exhibited potent cytotoxic activities against cervical epithelioid carcinoma hela cells and breast adenocarcinoma mda-mb231 cells.
rewritten: new pentacyclic guanidine alkaloids, monanchoxymycalin a (1) and monanchoxymycalin b (2), were obtained from the far-eastern marine sponge monanchora pulchra. their structures were elucidated through extensive analysis using both one-dimensional and two-dimensional nmr spectroscopy along with mass spectrometry. both compounds exhibited significant cytotoxic activity against hela cervical epithelioid carcinoma cells and mda-mb231 breast adenocarcinoma cells.

raw: the backwardness faced by mexico in telecommunications and the economy in recent decades led the government to implement reform requiring the installation of a shared wholesale network (red compartida). this network will use 90 mhz of the 700 mhz band, will only sell to operators, will cover at least 85% of the population by 2021 and may not be operated by existing concessionaires in mexico.this paper analyzes the origins of this public policy and the challenges it faces, in terms of both deployment (offer) and demand, as well as the effects on market structure and the promotion of information and communications technology (ict). the conclusion is that the red compartida, within a framework of high mobile broadband needs may, given its coverage, capacity and prices, enable new ict business models and serve as a complement for current mobile and fixed operators.
rewritten: mexico's lag in telecommunications and the economy in recent decades prompted the government to enact a reform that mandates the deployment of a shared wholesale network (red compartida). this network, which will utilize 90 mhz of the 700 mhz band, will be available exclusively to operators, will reach at least 85% of the population by 2021, and cannot be operated by current mexican concessionaires. this paper examines the origins of this public policy and the challenges it faces in both supply (deployment) and demand, as well as its effects on market structure and the advancement of information and communications technology (ict). in conclusion, within a context of high mobile broadband demand, the shared network—given its extensive coverage, capacity, and pricing—could facilitate new ict business models and serve as a valuable complement to existing mobile and fixed network operators.

raw: this study aimed to describe the grammatical cohesion in a collection of poems geladidiri, describes the implications of the results of research in learning indonesian in junior high school. collecting data using documentation engineering and technical notes. the method used to analyze data is unified referential intralingual subtype with advanced engineering techniques pilah element qualifier (pup), and constant comparison analysis techniques. based on the research results, there are two conclusions: the results of research on grammatical cohesion in a collection of poems geladidiri namely that the reference (reference) is composed of a single form that the reference persona i free me, tied closely - left, my right closely bound form, the plural form of our free and we , this reference a single persona ii left you- closely bound form, the form closely bound thy right, his right closely bound form, this reference their plural persona iii; this reference that the reference demonstrative demonstrative consists of a place in your lap on your lips, this, on the road, in the lap of his mother, here, there, everywhere, this reference demonstrative july time, past, present; such that the reference comparative, like; (2) substitution (substitution) consists of a nominal substitution state with the 'motherland', the country with the 'motherland', criminals with criminals, verbal substitution made by 'painting', struggling with the 'screaming'; (3) deletion (ellipsis) mother's father, country, youth, heart, i; (4) the coupling (conjunction) consisting of conjunctions contention but, but, but, instead of excess conjunctions, conjunctions konsesif though, though, conjunctions additions (additives) and, conjunction or choice. the results of this study can be implicated in learning indonesian in junior high school. grammatical cohesion raised in indonesian language learning in junior high school grade levels vii and viii by linking sk and kd. keyword: grammatical cohesion, poetry, learning.
rewritten: this study aimed to describe the grammatical cohesion present in a collection of poems titled geladidiri, in addition to highlighting the research’s implications for learning indonesian in junior high school. data were gathered through documentation, engineering work, and technical note-taking. the data analysis employed a unified referential intralingual subtype, using advanced engineering techniques known as the pilah element qualifier (pup), alongside constant comparative analysis. based on the findings, two main conclusions emerged. first, the research on grammatical cohesion in geladidiri revealed several points regarding reference elements. the referential system comprises: • a singular reference form expressed as the first persona “i” or “free me,” along with variants indicating closeness or binding (e.g., “left,” “my right”). • a plural reference form involving terms such as “our” or “we.” • a second-person singular reference, including closely bound forms like “you,” “thy,” or “his,” which also extends to a plural third-person reference. • demonstrative references that indicate either place (e.g., “in your lap,” “on your lips,” “this,” “on the road,” “in his mother’s lap,” “here,” “there,” “everywhere”) or time (e.g., “july,” “past,” “present”). additionally, the study identified: • comparative references signified by terms such as “like.” • substitution, where nominal substitutions occur (for example, “motherland” is used to represent “country” and “criminals” remain consistent) as well as verbal substitutions (replacing “painting” with “screaming”). • deletion (ellipsis), evident in the omission of elements such as “mother,” “father,” “country,” “youth,” “heart,” and “i.” • coupling (conjunction), which includes various conjunctions: contrasting ones like “but,” concessive ones like “though,” additive ones like “and,” and choices like “or.” second, the outcomes of this study suggest that the concept of grammatical cohesion could be effectively integrated into indonesian language instruction for junior high school students. specifically, linking curriculum standards (sk) and competencies (kd) in grades vii and viii using insights from this study may enhance language learning. keywords: grammatical cohesion, poetry, learning.

raw: it has been argued from the earliest days of quantum chromodynamics (qcd) that at asymptotically small values of $x$ the parton distribution functions (pdfs) of the proton behave as $x^\alpha$, where the values of $\alpha$ can be deduced from regge theory, while at asymptotically large values of $x$ the pdfs behave as $(1-x)^\beta$, where the values of $\beta$ can be deduced from the brodsky-farrar quark counting rules. we critically examine these claims by extracting the exponents $\alpha$ and $\beta$ from various global fits of parton distributions, analysing their scale dependence, and comparing their values to the naive expectations. we find that for valence distributions both regge theory and counting rules are confirmed, at least within uncertainties, while for sea quarks and gluons the results are less conclusive. we also compare results from various pdf fits for the structure function ratio $f_2^n/f_2^p$ at large $x$, and caution against unrealistic uncertainty estimates due to overconstrained parametrisations.
rewritten: since the early days of quantum chromodynamics (qcd), it has been proposed that at very small x values the proton’s parton distribution functions (pdfs) scale as x^α, with the exponent α inferred from regge theory. conversely, for very large x values, the pdfs are expected to follow a (1-x)^β behavior, where the exponent β is predicted by the brodsky–farrar quark counting rules. in this work, we rigorously scrutinize these assertions by determining the exponents α and β from several global pdf analyses, examining how these exponents vary with scale, and comparing them to the straightforward theoretical expectations. our findings indicate that for valence quark distributions, both regge theory and the quark counting rules are validated—within the bounds of uncertainty—whereas the behaviors for sea quarks and gluons remain more ambiguous. additionally, we review different pdf fit results for the structure function ratio f₂ⁿ/f₂ᵖ at large x and warn against unrealistic uncertainty estimates that might arise from overly constrained parametrizations.

raw: according to some embodiments, an antenna apparatus is provided for transmitting/receiving electromagnetic radiation defining a wavelength, the apparatus comprising at least one lower machined plate, and at least one upper machined plate including: a radiating element layer including an array of radiating elements, each having a center, wherein the distance between the centers of adjacent elements in said array is less than one wavelength; and an h-plane splitter layer below said radiating element layer and including h-plane splitters each having an h-plane splitter input facing said lower plate and a pair of h-plane splitter outputs which respectively connect the h-plane splitter to a pair of said radiating elements, and an e-orientation feeding network layer having an input and comprising e-plane splitters receiving the wave from the feeding network input and defining multiple feeding network outputs, wherein an individual h-plane splitter input connects individual ones of said h-plane splitters to respective outputs from among said multiple feeding network outputs, thereby to enable the h-plane splitters to split the electromagnetic radiation travelling from the feeding network input to the radiating elements, and wherein each e-plane splitter is formed of first and second halves which are included in the upper and lower plates respectively; and hollow waveguide sections interconnecting the e-plane splitters, and including first and second halves which are disposed on respective sides of a bisecting plane parallel to the waveguide's shorter cross-sectional dimension and which are included in the lower and upper plates respectively. according to some embodiments, a method for manufacturing the antenna is provided.
rewritten: in some embodiments, an antenna apparatus is provided for transmitting and receiving electromagnetic radiation at a defined wavelength. the apparatus comprises at least one lower machined plate and at least one upper machined plate. the upper plate includes a radiating element layer that houses an array of radiating elements, each with its own center, where the distance between the centers of adjacent elements is less than one wavelength. beneath the radiating element layer is an h‑plane splitter layer that contains h‑plane splitters. each splitter features an input facing the lower plate and a pair of outputs that connect to two corresponding radiating elements. additionally, an e‑orientation feeding network layer is included, which has an input that feeds into a set of e‑plane splitters. these splitters, in turn, provide multiple output feeds. each h‑plane splitter input is connected to a specific feeding network output, enabling the h‑plane splitters to split the electromagnetic radiation traveling from the network input to the radiating elements. furthermore, each e‑plane splitter is constructed from two halves—one half integrated into the upper plate and the other into the lower plate. hollow waveguide sections that interconnect the e‑plane splitters are also employed, each comprising a first and second half that are arranged on opposite sides of a bisecting plane (which is parallel to the waveguide’s shorter cross-sectional dimension) and are integrated into the lower and upper plates respectively. in some embodiments, a method for manufacturing the antenna is also provided.

raw: abstract sulfur nanoparticles (snps) have been successfully prepared from sodium thiosulfate in the presence of punica granatum peels aqueous extract at room temperature. the resulting sulfur nanoparticles were characterized by x-ray diffraction (xrd), fourier transform infrared spectroscopy (ft-ir) and scanning electron microscopy (sem) equipped with energy-dispersive x-ray spectroscopy (eds). highly crystalline synthesized sulfur nanoparticles exhibiting high purity, spherical shape with average particle size of about 50 nm applied at a rate of 100 ppm, 200 ppm, and 300 ppm as foliar spray for tomato leaves. the obtained results revealed that the foliar spraying tomato leaves with 200 ppm sulfur nanoparticles are very beneficial to plant growth and produced healthy plant with greener leaves and high quality of tomato fruits compared with control.
rewritten: sulfur nanoparticles (snps) were synthesized successfully at room temperature using sodium thiosulfate and an aqueous extract from punica granatum peels. these nanoparticles were characterized using x-ray diffraction (xrd), fourier transform infrared spectroscopy (ft-ir), and scanning electron microscopy (sem) with energy-dispersive x-ray spectroscopy (eds). the resulting nanoparticles are highly crystalline, pure, spherical, and have an average particle size of around 50 nm. they were applied as a foliar spray on tomato leaves at concentrations of 100 ppm, 200 ppm, and 300 ppm. the study revealed that spraying tomato leaves with 200 ppm of sulfur nanoparticles notably enhances plant growth, yielding healthier plants with greener leaves and higher-quality tomatoes compared to the control group.

raw: the research presented in this paper introduces rendez-vous, which is a system oriented to provide its users with a greater communication availability through the convergence of the conventional telephony and the real-time multimedia on the web browsers. the system consists on a web application that provides a videoconference room for multiple users without having to download any additional software. for the cases in which a user with no internet connection might need to participate in a conference, it is possible to dial and answer phone calls to/from the pstn directly on the web browser, allowing the telephonic user to interact with the others using his/her voice. the aim of the present project is to propose a unified communications system that differs from others mainly in the interaction with the telephone network directly from a web browser while having an active videoconference, allowing real-time exchange of media streams between these two technologies. the system rendez-vous was implemented with the use of webrtc (web real-time communications) for the transmission of audio and video on real-time, node.js as a web and signaling server, as well as the software asterisk for providing telephonic access, along with jssip, which is a javascript library for implementing a sip user agent.
rewritten: this paper presents rendez-vous, a system designed to enhance user communication by merging traditional telephony with real-time multimedia within web browsers. the system is essentially a web application that provides a videoconference room for multiple users without requiring any additional software downloads. for users without an internet connection needing to participate, the system offers the ability to dial and receive calls from the pstn directly within the browser, enabling them to engage via voice. the project's primary goal is to offer a unified communications platform that uniquely interfaces with the telephone network through a web browser while supporting active videoconferencing, thereby facilitating the real-time exchange of media streams between these technologies. rendez-vous was implemented using webrtc for real-time audio and video, node.js as a web and signaling server, and asterisk software to provide telephonic access, along with jssip, a javascript library for creating a sip user agent.

raw: abstract this paper presents a minimum void length scale control method for structural topology optimization. void length scale control has been actively investigated for decades, which intends to ensure the topology design manufacturable given the machining tool access. however, only a single lower bound has been applied in existing methods, which does not fit the multi-stage rough-to-finish machining. to fix this issue, the proposed minimum void length scale control method employs double lower bounds which corresponds to the rough and finish machining operations, respectively. this method has been implemented under the level set framework. for technical details, the rough machining lower bound is satisfied by developing a signed distance-related constraint, which ensures enough space for the rough machining tool movement and thus, guarantees the machining efficiency. the finish machining lower bound is addressed through the curvature flow control, which ensures the small features manufacturable and also a good finish dimension and surface. through a few numerical case studies, it is proven that the minimum void length scale can be effectively controlled without sacrificing much of the structural performance.
rewritten: this paper introduces a new method for controlling the minimum void length scale in structural topology optimization. controlling the void length scale has long been a focus of research, as it is essential to ensure that a topology design is manufacturable given the access required for machining tools. however, existing methods typically enforce only a single lower bound, which is inadequate for accommodating the multi-stage process of rough-to-finish machining. to overcome this limitation, the proposed method imposes two lower bounds corresponding to rough and finish machining operations, respectively. the approach is implemented within a level set framework. on the technical side, the rough machining lower bound is maintained by introducing a signed distance-based constraint, ensuring there is sufficient space for the movement of the rough machining tool and thereby supporting machining efficiency. the finish machining lower bound is addressed using curvature flow control, which helps guarantee that small features are manufacturable while also achieving proper final dimensions and surface quality. several numerical case studies demonstrate that the minimum void length scale can be effectively managed without significantly compromising structural performance.

raw: an image fixing device includes an elastic roller; a back-up unit forming a fixing nip with the roller therebetween, the back-up unit including a cylindrical film, a film guide, extending inside the film, for guiding the film, and an end portion guiding member including a guiding portion for guiding an inner surface of an end portion of the film. the film guide includes plural ribs contacting the film and arranged in a generatrix direction at positions upstream of the fixing nip with respect to a feeding direction of a sheet. the ribs have free end portions retracted more toward a downstream side with respect to the feeding direction of the recording material than the guiding portion of the end portion guiding member. an inside rib has a free end portion which is retracted more toward the downstream side than free end portions of the opposite end ribs.
rewritten: an image fixing device comprises an elastic roller and a backup unit that creates a fixing nip with the roller. the backup unit consists of a cylindrical film, an internal film guide to direct the film, and an end portion guiding member that includes a guiding section for the film's inner surface at its end. the film guide features several ribs that contact the film and are arranged in the generatrix direction upstream of the fixing nip relative to the sheet’s feed direction. these ribs have free end portions that are set back further toward the downstream side compared to the guiding section of the end portion guiding member, with one inner rib’s free end portion being recessed even more downstream than those on the opposite ends.

raw: a method and system for testing a local area network (lan) coupled to a satellite network through a customer premises equipment (cpe) is disclosed. the method includes: providing a lan diagnostics tool disposed on the cpe for executing a plurality of tests; receiving, at the lan diagnostics tool, a test request comprising an execution environment indicator; selecting a test agent based on the execution environment indicator; sending in response to the test request, from the lan diagnostics tool, the selected test agent; and testing the lan with communications between the lan diagnostics tool and the selected test agent being executed on a device connected to the lan.
rewritten: a method and system for testing a local area network (lan) connected to a satellite network via customer premises equipment (cpe) is presented. the method involves the following steps: installing a lan diagnostics tool on the cpe to run several tests; having the lan diagnostics tool receive a test request that includes an execution environment indicator; choosing a test agent based on this indicator; sending the selected test agent in response to the test request; and finally, testing the lan by running communications between the diagnostics tool and the chosen test agent on a device connected to the lan.

raw: this note discusses how the never-early-exercise region of american power exchange options is influenced by the nonlinearity from its power coefficients. we consider a class of models which satisfy the power invariant property and show that early exercise depends crucially on the quantities termed effective dividend yields. our mathematical analysis extends an existing model-free result and indicates how early exercise should depend on parameters. a numerical analysis is conducted to complement the analytical results and provide further observations.
rewritten: this article examines how the nonlinearity introduced by the power coefficients influences the never-early-exercise region in american power exchange options. we analyze a set of models that adhere to the power invariant property and demonstrate that early exercise is fundamentally linked to what we call effective dividend yields. our mathematical investigation builds on a previously established model-free result and outlines the dependency of early exercise on various parameters. additionally, we perform a numerical analysis to support the theoretical findings and offer further insights.

raw: a random 12-peptide library was screened against erysipelothrix rhusiopthiae and porcine circovirus 2 recombinant cap protein and the selected peptides were used for detecting the corresponding pathogens quickly and effectively. to our surprise, seven peptides, p1 (whwnap wwngvy), p2 (fhwtwqfpytst), p3 (gamhlpwhmgtl), p4 (hwniwwqhhpsp), p5 (hffkwhtrtndq), p6 (hffrwhpsahlg) and p7 (hfaywwngvrgp) with the characteristics of polystyrene plate (ps) binding target-unrelated peptides (tups), were selected from the library. it has been found that p2 and p4 shared common motif of plastic binding peptide, moreover, p2, p3, p5 and p7 have been isolated repeatedly in other research groups using different targets. then, the seven peptide phage clones were identified as the ps binding tup phages by phage-elisa and elution titration, particularly, p1 and p2 showed strong ps binding affinity which can not be inhibited by usual blocking buffers. in addition, all of the phages were not propagation-related tup, but p3 showed the similar propagation rate with m13ke (vector phage). we also found that the seven ps-tups are rich in w, h, f, p and g, particularly, both w and h are contained in all ps-tups. it deduced that they may play a potential role in peptide binding to plastic. although it is difficult to eliminate the tup phages in phage display completely, these ps-tups can be used to exclude the false positive peptides rapidly and effectively and help us to obtain truly interesting peptides more accurately.
rewritten: a random 12-peptide library was examined using recombinant cap proteins from erysipelothrix rhusiopathiae and porcine circovirus 2, and the identified peptides enabled rapid and effective detection of the respective pathogens. surprisingly, seven peptides—p1 (whwnap wwngvy), p2 (fhwtwqfpytst), p3 (gamhlpwhmgtl), p4 (hwniwwqhhpsp), p5 (hffkwhtrtndq), p6 (hffrwhpsahlg), and p7 (hfaywwngvrgp)—were discovered, all showing characteristics of polystyrene (ps) plate-binding, target-unrelated peptides (tups). it was observed that both p2 and p4 share a common plastic-binding motif, and additionally, p2, p3, p5, and p7 have been repeatedly identified by other research groups using different targets. subsequently, these seven peptide phage clones were confirmed as ps-binding tups through phage-elisa and elution titration assays; notably, p1 and p2 demonstrated a strong affinity for ps that could not be blocked by typical blocking buffers. furthermore, all of these phages were not related to propagation issues, although p3 exhibited a propagation rate similar to that of m13ke (the vector phage). analysis revealed that these seven ps-tups are rich in tryptophan (w), histidine (h), phenylalanine (f), proline (p), and glycine (g), with both w and h present in all of them, suggesting a potential role in mediating peptide binding to plastic. although it is challenging to completely eliminate tup phages in phage display, their identification can help to rapidly and effectively exclude false positives, thereby allowing researchers to more accurately isolate peptides of genuine interest.

raw: the utility model discloses a humidifier with remote control, including the humidifier body, be provided with humidity transducer, microprocessor, regulator and remote control ware on the humidifier body, the humidity transducer output is connected with microprocessor, and the microprocessor output is connected with the input of regulator and remote control ware respectively, and the output of remote control ware is connected with microprocessor's input. the beneficial effect of the utility model: the utility model discloses be provided with humidity transducer, microprocessor, regulator and remote control ware on the wet ware body to make the user pass through mobile intelligent terminal and can know the indoor humidity situation, thereby it carries out remote control to be favorable to the user to accord with the own condition more according to actual conditions more, the practicality is stronger.
rewritten: the utility model reveals a remote-controlled humidifier that includes a humidifier body outfitted with a humidity sensor, a microprocessor, a regulator, and a remote control module. the humidity sensor’s output is linked to the microprocessor, whose output is then connected to both the regulator and the remote control module. additionally, the remote control module’s output feeds back into the microprocessor. the advantage of this utility model is that by incorporating the humidity sensor, microprocessor, regulator, and remote control module onto the humidifier body, users can monitor indoor humidity levels via a mobile smart terminal. this enables remote control of the humidifier, allowing it to be adjusted more precisely according to current conditions, thereby enhancing its practical usability.

raw: lack of machine-to-machine standardization is causing the inability of connecting and poor interoperability between devices in iot. we examine a global standard onem2m for m2m. it defines a common services layer, which is going to enable communications between m2m devices on a global scale. we study om2m platform, which is based on onem2m standard. in this paper, we show how to extend the om2m platform with plugins of three wireless technologies that are common in iot: bluetooth, bluetooth low energy and z-wave. plugins are developed in such a way, that they enable automatic detection in every chosen communication protocol. we show the steps needed to extend the om2m platform with a technology, which is not a part of an onem2m system. we explain semantics in onem2m system and procedures to translate ontologies of non-onem2m systems to onem2m ontology.
rewritten: the absence of standardized machine-to-machine protocols leads to connectivity issues and poor interoperability among iot devices. in response, we examine the global onem2m standard for m2m communication, which establishes a common services layer that will facilitate worldwide communication between such devices. our study focuses on the om2m platform based on the onem2m standard. in this paper, we demonstrate how to enhance the om2m platform with plugins for three prevalent wireless technologies in iot: bluetooth, bluetooth low energy, and z-wave. these plugins are designed to support automatic detection across each chosen communication protocol. additionally, we detail the steps required to integrate a new technology not originally included in an onem2m system, and we explain the semantics of the onem2m system along with the procedures for translating ontologies from non-onem2m systems into the onem2m ontology.

raw: problem to be solved: to prevent meniscus overflow of a nozzle by suppressing increase in speed and flow rate at refilling with a simple configuration.solution: there are provided an ink tank 32 for housing ink, a nozzle plate 104 having a plurality of nozzle holes for discharging the ink, a channel plate provided with a plurality of pressurizing liquid chambers communicating with respective nozzle holes, a piezoelectric element for fluctuating a pressure in the pressurizing liquid chamber, a drive ic for applying a drive signal to the piezoelectric element, a claim member provided with a common liquid chamber communicating with a plurality of respective pressurizing liquid chambers, and a negative pressure adjusting mechanism (piston 34) for adjusting a negative pressure applied on the ink near an ink discharge opening of the nozzle hole according to a drive frequency of the drive signal.
