rewritten: background: predicting the risk of severe hypoglycemia (sh) among type 1 diabetes patients is crucial for preventing future episodes, yet it remains unclear whether the long‐term risk of sh can be forecasted. the study aimed to determine if long-term prediction of sh is feasible in individuals with type 1 diabetes. methods: a follow-up study was conducted involving 98 type 1 diabetes patients. at both baseline and follow-up, participants completed a questionnaire covering their diabetes history, complications, the number of sh episodes experienced during the previous year, and their level of hypoglycemia awareness. additionally, hba1c and c-peptide levels were measured. results: over the 12-year follow-up period, there was a notable decrease in hba1c levels, c-peptide levels, and the incidence of sh (falling from 1.1 to 0.4 episodes per patient-year; p < .001). at baseline, patients with impaired hypoglycemia awareness had a relative sh rate of 3.6 (p = .001), and those with complete unawareness had a rate of 10.9 (p < .0001), compared to patients with normal awareness. at follow-up, patients who had experienced unawareness at baseline tended...

raw: introduction: organisms are constantly in a balance meaning that while new cells are produced, some of the older ones die which takes place in 2 ways: necrosis or apoptosis. apoptosis is the programmed cellular death triggered by intrinsic or extrinsic stimuli. in this study we have evaluated the apoptosis of prostate tissue generated by surgical or medical orchiectomy. material and method: in this experimental study, we used 36 adult male rats that were evaluated in 3 groups. the first group (group 1) consisted of 12 rats that had bilateral orchiectomy; the second group (group 2) included 12 rats that were given leuprolide acetate and the third group (group 3) consisted of 12 control rats. immunohistochemical staining of the prostate of all rats was performed and the presence of glandular atrophy and apoptosis were evaluated in the three groups. the statistical differences between the two groups were evaluated by the fisher exact test. results: glandular atrophy was not determined in any rat of the control group, and the apoptotic staining was in the normal limits in all the control rats. in leuprolide group, glandular atrophy was mild in 7 cases, and moderate in 3 rats. in 2 rats of the leuprolide group, atrophy was not demonstrated. in surgical orchiectomy group, glandular atrophy was present in all cases. atrophy was observed as cystic atrophy. statistical analysis with the fisher exact test revealed that glandular atrophy was statistically significantly more common in surgical orchiectomy group compared with leuprolide group (p = 0,012). conclusion: if the aim of treatment in androgen dependent prostatic adenocarcinoma or benign prostate hypertrophy is the construction of a robust apoptosis, bilateral orchiectomy generates a more powerful apoptosis compared with leuprolide.
rewritten: introduction: living organisms maintain a balance where new cells are generated while older cells die, a process that occurs either by necrosis or by apoptosis. apoptosis is the programmed cell death initiated by internal or external signals. this study examines the apoptosis occurring in prostate tissue following either surgical or medical orchiectomy. materials and methods: in this experimental study, 36 adult male rats were divided into three groups. group 1, consisting of 12 rats, underwent bilateral orchiectomy; group 2, with 12 rats, received leuprolide acetate; and group 3 comprised 12 control rats. prostate tissues from all groups were analyzed using immunohistochemical staining to assess the presence of glandular atrophy and apoptotic markers. the fisher exact test was used to determine statistical differences between groups. results: in the control group, no rats exhibited glandular atrophy, and apoptotic staining remained within normal limits. in the leuprolide-treated group, mild glandular atrophy was seen in 7 rats, moderate atrophy in 3 rats, and 2 rats showed no signs of atrophy. in contrast, all rats in the surgical orchiectomy group displayed glandular atrophy, which was characterized by cystic atrophy. statistical analysis confirmed that glandular atrophy was significantly more common in the surgical orchiectomy group compared to the leuprolide group (p = 0.012). conclusion: for conditions such as androgen-dependent prostatic adenocarcinoma or benign prostatic hypertrophy, where inducing robust apoptosis is the treatment goal, bilateral orchiectomy appears to provoke a more potent apoptotic effect compared to leuprolide treatment.

raw: slope height piece of smooth land structure of filling of soaking to effectively improve slope the soak stability and long -term durability of high embankment, and improve its resistance to settling and reduce the hydrodynamic influence of flood fluctuation. it includes: soil nail consolidates the confining bed, sets up in the basement rock mass, the compound foundation stabilization body sets up in the soft foundation soil body in the high fill toe outside, the lower part road bed fills the body, sets up and fills below the flood level at the height, the body is filled in the road bed transition, sets up to fill body top at the lower part road bed, the upper portion road bed fills the body, sets up to fill body top in the road bed transition, shallow layer geogrid, middle level geogrid and deep geogrid, the interval is laid and is filled among the body fills physically with the upper portion road bed at the lower part road bed, the side slope platform, the hierarchical setting on the side slope is filled to the height, lower part side slope inoxidizing coating sets up and fills body slope surface at the lower part road bed, upper portion side slope inoxidizing coating sets up and fills body slope surface at the upper portion road bed.
rewritten: the design improves the soaking stability and long-term durability of high embankments by controlling settlement and reducing the hydrodynamic effects of flood fluctuations. it accomplishes this by employing a series of integrated components. first, soil nails consolidate the confining bed by anchoring into the underlying rock mass. next, a compound foundation stabilization body is established within the soft foundation soil near the high fill toe. at the lower part of the roadbed, a fill body is installed below the flood level, while another fill body is formed in the roadbed transition zone. additionally, a fill body is created at the top of the lower roadbed, and yet another is set up in the upper roadbed section. multiple layers of geogrid—namely shallow, middle, and deep—are laid at intervals to reinforce the fill bodies located between the upper and lower roadbed sections. finally, the side slopes are enhanced: the platform along the side slope is filled to the designated height, with an inoxidizing coating applied on the lower portion of the slope body at the level of the lower roadbed, and a similar coating on the upper portion at the level of the upper roadbed.

raw: the utility model provides a laser sensor for detecting granule belongs to the sensor technology field, including detection case and control system, be provided with the detecting through hole of the rectangular bodily form in the detection case, detecting through hole includes air inlet and gas outlet, be provided with laser emitter on detecting through hole's the inner wall, laser emitter is connected with laser driver, detecting through hole's top and bottom all are provided with photodiode, and two photodiode all are connected with preamplifier, and two preamplifier all are connected with the ad converter, ad converter and laser driver are connected with control system respectively. this laser sensor adopts the structure of two photodiode measuring granule scattered lights, can accurately detect out the particle diameter and the quantity of granule effectively, has remedied prior art's defect.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a laser sensor used for detecting granules, belonging to the field of sensor technology. the sensor comprises a detection case and a control system. the detection case features a rectangular detection through-hole that includes both an air inlet and a gas outlet. a laser emitter is mounted on the inner wall of this through-hole and is connected to a laser driver. additionally, the top and bottom of the through-hole are each equipped with a photodiode. both photodiodes are connected to preamplifiers, whose outputs are in turn connected to an analog-to-digital converter. the analog-to-digital converter and the laser driver are each connected to the control system. by employing a structure with two photodiodes for measuring the scattered light from granules, this laser sensor can accurately detect both the granule’s particle diameter and quantity, thereby overcoming deficiencies found in previous designs.

raw: the invention provides a single-wheel electro-hydraulic pushing and self-energy-feedback brake combination device. the device is installed on a single airplane wheel and used for driving or braking the airplane wheel. the single-wheel electro-hydraulic pushing and self-energy-feedback brake combination device comprises an electro-hydraulic pushing subsystem and a self-energy-feedback brake subsystem. the electro-hydraulic pushing subsystem comprises a motor-pump energy pack and an airplane wheel drive module, and when an airplane is operated by a pilot to glide on the ground to the assigned place at the normal speed, the motor-pump energy pack converts electric energy provided by an airplane power system into hydraulic energy, and the hydraulic energy is supplied to the airplane wheel drive module and used for driving the airplane wheel. the self-energy-feedback brake subsystem is used for converting kinetic energy of the airplane wheel rotating at a high speed into hydraulic energy after the airplane lands, so that the airplane wheel is braked.
rewritten: the invention is a combined single-wheel device with electro-hydraulic propulsion and self-energy-feedback braking systems. it is mounted on an airplane wheel to either drive or brake the wheel. the device includes two main components: an electro-hydraulic pushing subsystem and a self-energy-feedback braking subsystem. the electro-hydraulic pushing subsystem consists of a motor-pump energy pack and an airplane wheel drive module. when the airplane glides on the ground at normal speed toward its designated spot, the motor-pump energy pack transforms electric energy from the airplane’s power system into hydraulic energy, which is then used by the airplane wheel drive module to drive the wheel. meanwhile, the self-energy-feedback braking subsystem converts the kinetic energy from the wheel’s high-speed rotation during landing into hydraulic energy, which helps to brake the wheel.

raw: breast cancers (bc) with her2 overexpression (referred to as her2 positive) progress more aggressively than those with normal expression. targeted therapies against her2 can successfully delay the progression of her2-positive bc, but details of how this overexpression drives the disease are not fully understood. using single-molecule biophysical approaches, we discovered a new effect of her2 overexpression on disease-relevant cell biological changes in these bc. we found her2 overexpression causes deformation of the cell membranes, and this in turn disrupts epithelial features by perturbing cell-substrate and cell-cell contacts. this membrane deformation does not require receptor signalling activities, but results from the high levels of her2 on the cell surface. our finding suggests that early-stage morphological alterations of her2-positive bc cells during cancer progression can occur in a physical and signalling-independent manner.
rewritten: breast cancers that overexpress her2 (referred to as her2-positive) tend to progress more aggressively than those with normal her2 levels. although targeted therapies against her2 can effectively slow down the progression of these cancers, the mechanisms by which her2 overexpression drives the disease are not completely understood. using single-molecule biophysical techniques, we identified a novel effect of her2 overexpression on critical cell biological changes relevant to the disease. specifically, we discovered that increased her2 levels lead to deformations in the cell membranes, which then disrupt epithelial characteristics by interfering with cell-substrate and cell-cell interactions. this deformation is not a result of receptor signaling but rather a direct consequence of the high concentration of her2 present on the cell surface. our findings suggest that early morphological changes in her2-positive breast cancer cells during cancer progression can occur through physical alterations that are independent of signaling pathways.

raw: the invention relates to a detection kit, in particular to a polypeptide-elisa (enzyme linked immunosorbent assay) kit for detecting a h7n9 subtype avian influenza virus na (neuraminidase) specific antibody. the kit comprises a 96-hole elisa plate precoated with h7n9 na linear b cell epitope polypeptide, positive serum, negative serum, an antibody marked with hrp (horse radish peroxidase), a sample diluent, a concentrated cleaning solution, a color development solution and a stop solution. na linear b cell epitope of a zhejiang strain of the h7n9 subtype avian influenza virus is predicted with bioinformatics software, corresponding polypeptides are artificially synthesized and then the elisa plate is coated with the polypeptides; the na specific antibody in serum is detected in a polypeptide-elisa manner, and the polypeptide-elisa kit is established. the polypeptide-elisa kit for detecting the h7n9 subtype avian influenza virus na specific antibody does not require expensive equipment such as a pcr (polymerase chain reaction) instrument and the like, has the advantages of quickness, simplicity, convenience, sensitivity, high specificity and the like and can be widely used in grassroots units.
rewritten: the invention pertains to a detection kit, specifically a polypeptide-elisa (enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay) kit designed to detect a neuraminidase (na)-specific antibody for the h7n9 subtype of avian influenza virus. the kit includes a 96-well elisa plate pre-coated with an h7n9 na linear b-cell epitope polypeptide, as well as positive and negative control sera, an antibody labeled with horseradish peroxidase (hrp), a sample diluent, a concentrated washing solution, a color development solution, and a stop solution. the na linear b-cell epitope from the zhejiang strain of the h7n9 virus is identified using bioinformatics software, after which the corresponding polypeptides are synthesized and used to coat the elisa plate. the na-specific antibody present in serum samples is then detected using the polypeptide-elisa method, thereby establishing the kit. this polypeptide-elisa kit offers advantages such as ease of use, rapid results, high sensitivity, and specificity, and because it does not require costly equipment like pcr instruments, it is suitable for use in community-level settings.

raw: spontaneous coronary artery dissection in association with strenuous exercise and weightlifting is rather sparsely described in the medical literature. diagnosis and treatment of this rare condition is a challenge, but prompt recognition and appropriate early choice of angioplasty or surgery can lead to a good outcome. we report the case of a postmenopausal 54-year-old woman who presented with anterior myocardial infarction caused by spontaneous dissection of the left anterior descending coronary artery after she had lifted a heavy weight while gardening. the patient was treated successfully by means of angioplasty and the implantation of 3 drug-eluting stents. in addition to presenting the patient's case, we review the topical medical literature.
rewritten: spontaneous coronary artery dissection linked to intense exercise and weightlifting is infrequently reported in the medical literature. although diagnosing and managing this rare condition can be challenging, early detection combined with timely intervention via angioplasty or surgery can result in a positive outcome. we describe the case of a 54-year-old postmenopausal woman who presented with an anterior myocardial infarction caused by a spontaneous dissection of the left anterior descending coronary artery after lifting a heavy weight while gardening. she was successfully treated with angioplasty and the placement of three drug-eluting stents. along with presenting this case, we also review the current medical literature on the topic.

raw: for more energy-efficient and economical hydrogen production, highly active noble metal-free hydrogen evolution catalysts are a priority for all. herein, we report a facile one-pot hydrothermal synthesis of cose2 nanoparticles with their electrocatalytic performance for hydrogen evolution reaction. the synthesized cose2 nanoparticles have an average diameter of 50-70 nm with a uniform distribution. they also exhibited good electrocatalytic performance for hydrogen evolution reaction with the onset overpotential and tafel slope of 140 mv and 95 mv/dec, respectively. the results provide a facile and effective way for the exploration of efficient co-based her catalysts.
rewritten: to achieve more energy-efficient and cost-effective hydrogen production, there is a strong focus on developing highly active, noble metal–free catalysts for the hydrogen evolution reaction. in this study, we present a simple one-pot hydrothermal synthesis method to produce cose₂ nanoparticles and evaluate their electrocatalytic performance for hydrogen production. the synthesized cose₂ nanoparticles have a uniform dispersion with an average size of 50–70 nm and demonstrate promising electrocatalytic activity for hydrogen evolution, featuring an onset overpotential of 140 mv and a tafel slope of 95 mv/dec. these findings offer an effective and straightforward approach to exploring efficient cobalt-based her catalysts.

raw: the invention discloses an automatic gasket point-welding punching production line system which comprises a feeding device, a point-welding device, a conveying device, punching devices, a detection device and a code-spraying device. the feeding device comprises a station feeding column, the station feeding column supplies gaskets to a taking manipulator located above the station feeding column, the conveying device comprises a sliding rod and a manipulator arranged on the sliding rod, the taking manipulator is provided with a vibratory hammer for avoiding gasket adhesion, the manipulator grabs the gaskets subjected to point welding and transfers the gaskets to the punching devices so as to complete two-time punching, the manipulator continues to transfer the gaskets to the detection device at the tail end of the sliding rod along the sliding rod, and the detected and qualified gaskets are subjected to code spraying by the code-spraying device, then are put on a conveying belt to be conveyed and are manually warehoused. the automatic gasket point-welding punching production line system is reasonable in design and compact in structure, achieves mechanization and has the advantages of being high in production efficiency, good in product quality, low in labor intensity, safe in operation and the like.
rewritten: the invention relates to an automatic production line system for gasket point-welding and punching. the system includes a feeding device, a point-welding unit, a conveying mechanism, punching units, a detection system, and a code-spraying unit. the feeding device features a station feeding column that supplies gaskets to a picking manipulator positioned above it. the conveying mechanism consists of a sliding rod with a manipulator mounted on it. to prevent gasket adhesion, the picking manipulator is equipped with a vibratory hammer. this manipulator picks up the gaskets that have undergone point welding and transfers them to the punching units for two successive punching operations. it then moves the gaskets along the end of the sliding rod to the detection device. the gaskets that pass inspection are subsequently processed by the code-spraying unit and then placed onto a conveying belt for transportation before being manually stored. this automatic production line system is well-designed with a compact structure, achieves full mechanization, and offers advantages such as high production efficiency, excellent product quality, reduced labor intensity, and safe operation.

raw: our laboratory is interested in the growth, development and integrity of animal tissues, with a focus on stem cells. wnt signaling is widely implicated in stem cell control, as a mechanism to regulate the number of stem cells in tissues, using various cell labeling methods, we have described novel populations of stem cells in various tissues, including in the liver. in that tissue, we found that hepatocytes that reside in the pericentral domain of the liver demonstrate stem cell behavior. although these cells are functional hepatocytes, they are diploid and thus differ from the mostly polyploid mature hepatocyte population. they are active in homeostatic cell replacement and therefore distinct from oval cells, which require injury for their induction. adjacent central vein endothelial cells provide the essential source of wnt signals for the hepatocyte stem cells and thereby constitute the liver stem cell niche. it is noteworthy that liver cancer is often characterized by loss of function mutations in negative components of the wnt pathway, including axin and apc. we suggest that pericentral hepatocyte stem cells, normally controlled by a paracrine wnt signal, are precursors to liver cancer. citation format: roel nusse. wnt signaling stem cell control and cancer. [abstract]. in: proceedings of the aacr special conference: developmental biology and cancer; nov 30-dec 3, 2015; boston, ma. philadelphia (pa): aacr; mol cancer res 2016;14(4_suppl):abstract nr ia01.
rewritten: our laboratory focuses on the growth, development, and maintenance of animal tissues, with a particular emphasis on stem cells. wnt signaling plays a crucial role in regulating stem cell populations by controlling their numbers within tissues. by employing various cell labeling techniques, we have identified new stem cell populations in different tissues, including the liver. in the liver, we discovered that hepatocytes located near the central vein exhibit stem cell characteristics. although these cells perform the functions of hepatocytes, they are diploid, which sets them apart from the mostly polyploid mature hepatocyte population. they actively participate in the routine replacement of cells, distinguishing them from oval cells that emerge only in response to injury. the endothelial cells lining the central vein provide the key source of wnt signals for these hepatocyte stem cells, forming the liver’s stem cell niche. it is also significant that liver cancers frequently feature loss-of-function mutations in negative regulators of the wnt pathway, such as axin and apc. based on these findings, we propose that the pericentral hepatocyte stem cells, which are typically regulated by local paracrine wnt signals, might be the precursors to liver cancer. citation: roel nusse. wnt signaling stem cell control and cancer. [abstract]. in: proceedings of the aacr special conference: developmental biology and cancer; nov 30-dec 3, 2015; boston, ma. philadelphia (pa): aacr; mol cancer res 2016;14(4_suppl): abstract nr ia01.

raw: s-nitrosylation, based on the attachment of nitroso group to cysteine thiols, is emerging as a new type of ubiquitous protein post-translational modification within the complex network of nitric oxide bioactivity. s-nitrosothiols are considered to form a relatively stable and mobile reservoir of no bioactivity, as a convergence of signalling pathways of reactive nitrogen and oxygen species. s-nitrosylation of proteins impact their functionality, stability and cellular localization in cells. in this review, actual knowledge on protein s-nitrosylation, its function and importance in plants is presented, together with a brief survey of methods, which are actually used for s-nitrosothiol studies in plant models. s-nitrosoglutathione reductase is considered a key enzyme of the regulation of intracellular levels of s-nitrosoglutathione and indirectly also of protein s-nitrosothiols. it has a crucial role in the maintenance of balanced levels of reactive nitrogen species and participates in the control of cellular redox state. the regulation of important plant proteins, which are involved in the transduction of plant hormone signals, regulation of enzyme activities, induction of apoptosis and control of carbohydrate metabolism, by a reversible s-nitrosylation is described in more detail. recent research in multiple plant systems has been focused to the identification of endogenously s-nitrosylated proteins in unstressed plants and s-nitrosylation patterns in plants exposed to different stress stimuli. comparative analysis of the plant s-nitrosoproteome under control and stress conditions represents a valuable tool to obtain more insights to the role of no in the signalling pathways of plant development and stress responses.
rewritten: s‑nitrosylation, which involves attaching a nitroso group to cysteine thiols, is increasingly recognized as a widespread post‑translational protein modification within the intricate network of nitric oxide bioactivity. s‑nitrosothiols are seen as forming a relatively stable and mobile reservoir of nitric oxide activity, representing a meeting point for the signaling pathways of reactive nitrogen and oxygen species. this modification affects protein function, stability, and cellular localization. in this review, we summarize current knowledge about protein s‑nitrosylation in plants, discussing its functions and significance, as well as providing an overview of the methods currently used to study s‑nitrosothiols in plant models. s‑nitrosoglutathione reductase, a key enzyme controlling intracellular levels of s‑nitrosoglutathione—and, by extension, protein s‑nitrosothiols—is highlighted for its crucial role in maintaining balanced reactive nitrogen species and managing the cellular redox state. the review also details how important plant proteins involved in hormone signal transduction, enzyme regulation, apoptosis induction, and carbohydrate metabolism are modulated by reversible s‑nitrosylation. recent studies in various plant systems have focused on identifying endogenously s‑nitrosylated proteins in unstressed conditions and analyzing s‑nitrosylation patterns in plants subjected to various stressors. comparing the plant s‑nitrosoproteome under control and stress conditions is a valuable approach for deepening our understanding of nitric oxide’s role in the signaling pathways that govern plant development and stress responses.

raw: the utility model discloses an incomplete branch of back suspension type hedge frame grape is trimming machine in advance relates to the agricultural machine field, its characterized in that: including three point suspension unit, folding unit, vertical adjustment unit, horizontal adjustment unit, vertical unit, portal frame unit, pruning unit, the supplementary unit of pruning of keeping. the three point suspension unit is used for articulating with the tractor, and above -mentioned universal wheel is used for supporting and moving temporarily, folding unit utilizes folding oil cylinder drive, makes machines collapsible, the adjustable machines of horizontal and vertical adjustment unit are in vertical and horizontal ascending position, the vertical unit that keeps can make machines keep vertical at the limited within range of stopper, the portal frame unit has guaranteed that machines stretch over operation on the hedge frame, and can keep away the barrier, prune unit adoption co -rotating's mode, when rotational speed 150rmin, can effectively prune the grape branch, the supplementary unit of pruning guarantees that the grape branch gets into the pruning region smoothly to the security of operation has improved.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a back-suspension type grape pruning machine for hedgerows with incomplete branches and relates to the field of agricultural machinery for pre-trimming grapevines. it comprises a three-point suspension unit, a folding unit, a vertical adjustment unit, a horizontal adjustment unit, a vertical unit, a portal frame unit, a pruning unit, and an auxiliary pruning unit. the three-point suspension unit is designed to connect with a tractor, while a universal wheel temporarily supports and moves the machine. the folding unit is driven by a folding oil cylinder, making the machine collapsible. the horizontal and vertical adjustment units allow the machine to be raised both horizontally and vertically, and the vertical unit, equipped with a stopper, ensures that the machine remains upright within a limited range. the portal frame unit guarantees that the machine can operate across the hedge frame while avoiding obstacles, and the pruning unit uses a co-rotating mechanism that can effectively trim grape branches at a rotational speed of 150 rpm. finally, the auxiliary pruning unit helps guide the grape branches smoothly into the pruning area, thereby enhancing the overall safety of the operation.

raw: adverse drug reactions occur in about 3-5% of all hospital admissions and are associated with increased morbidity and mortality. drug induced allergic reactions are categorised as ige mediated and non ige-mediated hypersensitivity reactions. these reactions vary from mild rashes to severe life threatening reactions like stevens johnson syndrome (sjs). sjs is a rare but potentially fatal adverse drug reaction. it can be associated with infection or combination of infection and adverse drug reactions. a case of 50 year old male normotensive, non diabetic, non alcoholic suffering from gouty arthritis is reported here. diagnosis of sjs was made on history and clinical examination and the patient was successfully treated with parenteral antibiotics, antihistamines, corticosteroids and iv fluids. keywords: stevens-johnson syndrome (sjs), allopurinol, adverse drug reaction
rewritten: adverse drug reactions are responsible for approximately 3–5% of all hospital admissions and contribute to increased morbidity and mortality. drug-induced allergic reactions are divided into ige-mediated and non–ige-mediated hypersensitivity reactions. these responses can range from minor skin rashes to severe, life-threatening conditions such as stevens-johnson syndrome (sjs). although sjs is a rare adverse drug reaction, it can be fatal and may be linked to infections or a combination of infections and drug reactions. this report presents the case of a 50-year-old man—who is normotensive, non-diabetic, and non-alcoholic—suffering from gouty arthritis. based on his history and clinical examination, he was diagnosed with sjs and was successfully treated with parenteral antibiotics, antihistamines, corticosteroids, and intravenous fluids. keywords: stevens-johnson syndrome (sjs), allopurinol, adverse drug reaction.

raw: the utility model discloses an electric steaming of family vapour cleaner, it includes casing, water tank, inlet tube, intake pipe, steam gas holder, electric heater and control system, be provided with water tank, inlet tube, intake pipe, steam gas holder, electric heater and control system in the organism cavity, electric heater set up in in the water tank, and heating steam raising. the utility model discloses an electric steaming of family vapour cleaner can generate the steam to can be applied to household electrical appliances such as rinsing refrigerator, refrigerator -freezer and sterilizer, it also can be disinfected through vapor when carrying out steam washing to household electrical appliances, the visible use the utility model discloses a when electric steaming of family vapour cleaner can carry out tame electrocleaning operation, the manpower just can be practiced thrift to weak point consuming time.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a family vapor cleaner capable of electric steaming. this device comprises a casing that houses a water tank, inlet tube, intake pipe, steam gas holder, electric heater, and control system. the electric heater is installed within the water tank so that heating generates steam. the vapor cleaner can produce steam for use with household appliances such as rinsing refrigerators, refrigerator-freezers, and sterilizers; it also allows for disinfection through steam during the cleaning of these appliances. moreover, the utility model supports automated electrocleaning processes, reducing both human effort and time consumption.

raw: we conducted a survey of fungal endophytes in 582 germinated seeds belonging to 11 colombian cultivars of the common bean (phaseolus vulgaris). the survey yielded 394 endophytic isolates belonging to 42 taxa, as identified by sequence analysis of the ribosomal dna internal transcribed spacer (its) region. aureobasidium pullulans was the dominant endophyte, isolated from 46.7 % of the samples. also common were fusarium oxysporum, xylaria sp., and cladosporium cladosporioides, but found in only 13.4 %, 11.7 %, and 7.6 % of seedlings, respectively. endophytic colonization differed significantly among common bean cultivars and seedling parts, with the highest colonization occurring in the first true leaves of the seedlings.
rewritten: we surveyed fungal endophytes in 582 germinated seeds from 11 colombian common bean (phaseolus vulgaris) cultivars. this examination identified 394 endophytic isolates representing 42 taxa through sequence analysis of the ribosomal dna internal transcribed spacer (its) region. aureobasidium pullulans emerged as the most common endophyte, found in 46.7% of the samples. fusarium oxysporum, xylaria species, and cladosporium cladosporioides were also notable, present in 13.4%, 11.7%, and 7.6% of the seedlings, respectively. additionally, the degree of endophytic colonization varied considerably among the bean cultivars and different seedling parts, with the first true leaves showing the highest colonization rates.

raw: while there is an ever expanding body of research on various forms of meditation, there is currently a relative absence of academic literature on tonglen. a form of meditation which involves both visualizations and breathing elements, during tonglen one takes in the negativity and suffering experienced by others and, in return, sends back happiness and compassion. the current study explores the tonglen meditation experiences of individuals who have established sitting meditation practices. a qualitative, grounded theory approach was used in looking at what tonglen means to participants, how they engage with the practice, why they practice tonglen, and what they perceive to be the benefits of tonglen in the context of a 28 day practice period. based on the findings from this study, a model was developed that describes the tonglen experiences of participants.
rewritten: although there is a growing body of research on many types of meditation, academic work specifically on tonglen remains relatively limited. tonglen is a meditative practice that combines visualization with breathing techniques, where practitioners inhale the pain and negativity experienced by others and exhale happiness and compassion. this study investigates the experiences of individuals with established sitting meditation practices as they engage in tonglen. employing a qualitative, grounded theory approach, the research examines how participants define tonglen, how they incorporate the practice, their motivations for practicing it, and the benefits they perceive during a 28-day period. the findings from the study were used to develop a model that represents the tonglen experiences of the participants.

raw: an information processing method and device are provided that relate to the field of information input. a method comprises: in response to that a user performs a touch-sensitive input operation on a touch screen of a device, acquiring contact positions between a gripping hand of the user and a side face of the device in different times; and at least in response to that the contact positions satisfy a first predetermined condition, adjusting an input mode of the device. according to at least two contact positions between a gripping hand of the user and a side face of the device, it can be inferred whether or not the user encounters inconvenient input and timely adjust an input mode of the device, which facilitates user input in the event of maintaining lower power consumption.
rewritten: an information processing method and device are disclosed in the field of information input. the method includes: when a user performs a touch-sensitive operation on a device’s touch screen, obtaining the positions at which the user’s gripping hand contacts the side face of the device at different times; and, when these contact positions meet a specific predetermined condition, adjusting the device’s input mode accordingly. based on at least two of these contact positions, the method determines whether the user is experiencing difficulty with input and promptly adjusts the input mode, thereby facilitating smoother user interaction while maintaining lower power consumption.

raw: ambulatory patient wearable vital sign monitoring system, often comprising a plurality of ambulatory patient wearable ecg sensors, pulse oximeters, and oscillometric blood pressure monitors, configured to transmit sensor data to a wearable computerized device such as a smartphone. the smartphone will typically be configured to obtain the patient's health history and other health status information, often by querying the patient. the device will use this health history and health status information to select vital sign operating times and sensor data acquisition parameters. the system may also use the history, health status information and the sensor data to return diagnostic information pertaining to the patient's history the patient and optionally other devices or caregivers. in some embodiments, the system may also report on medication adherence as well. examples of multi-sensor neck worn devices, three-sensor hand carried devices, and purely ear worn devices (e.g. for sleep apnea) are presented.
rewritten: an ambulatory patient wearable vital sign monitoring system typically includes several wearable sensors—such as ecg sensors, pulse oximeters, and oscillometric blood pressure monitors—that send sensor readings to a portable computing device like a smartphone. this smartphone is usually set up to collect the patient’s medical history and additional health-related information, often by asking the patient directly. the device then uses this information to determine when to operate the sensors and what data acquisition settings to use. additionally, the system can utilize the patient’s historical data, current health status, and real-time sensor input to provide diagnostic insights about the patient’s condition, which can be shared with the patient and, optionally, with other devices or healthcare providers. in some versions, the system is also capable of monitoring medication adherence. examples include multi-sensor devices worn around the neck, hand-carried devices featuring three sensors, and devices worn solely on the ear (such as those used for sleep apnea monitoring).

raw: the invention discloses a smart phone and a battery control method and system thereof. the smart phone comprises a radio frequency circuit, an input unit, a display unit, a processor and a power supply device, wherein the power supply device comprises a first battery, a second battery and a power supply management module. the power supply management module is separately connected with the first battery and the second battery and is used for separately supplying power to the radio frequency circuit, the input unit, the display unit and the processor through the electric energy output by the first battery or the electric energy output by the second battery. compared with traditional smart phones, in the smart phone in the scheme provided by the invention, the second battery is added for the first battery serving as the main battery, and the second battery can also provide a certain standby time for the smart phone, so that the endurance time of the smart phone can be effectively prolonged.
rewritten: the invention relates to a smartphone and associated battery control method and system. the smartphone includes a radio frequency circuit, an input unit, a display unit, a processor, and a power supply device. the power supply device consists of a first battery, a second battery, and a power supply management module. this module is connected separately to both the first and the second batteries and delivers power individually to the radio frequency circuit, input unit, display unit, and processor using the electricity from either battery. unlike traditional smartphones, the design described in this invention supplements the main first battery with a second battery, which provides an additional standby period for the device. this configuration effectively extends the smartphone's overall battery endurance.

raw: the utility model discloses a harmful gas automatic discharge system of family, including detector, controller, control motor and installation app's cell -phone, locate indoor detector and include sensor, transmitter, the balcony is located to the controller, the sensor detects indoor contents of the harmful gas immediately, transmitter wireless transmitting signal connection controller, and controller connection control motor, the window is connected in the transmission of control motor output shaft, simultaneous ejaculation ware and cell -phone signal connection. the utility model discloses can be when detecting indoor hazardous gas content and exceed standard, need not the manual operation and in time open the window and discharge, make emergency treatment, guarantee indoor safety of sleeping soundly personnel and the old and the children, simultaneously in the family nobody the time, also the circumstances in the family is understood to the accessible cell -phone, reports to the police when unusual and reminds, in time handles, solves people's psychology worry and misgivings.
rewritten: the utility model discloses an automatic harmful gas discharge system designed for residential use. this system comprises an indoor detector (which includes a sensor and a transmitter), a controller mounted on the balcony, a control motor, and a cell-phone app for installation monitoring and control. the sensor continuously monitors indoor levels of harmful gas and, once the concentration exceeds safe standards, it immediately sends a wireless signal via the transmitter to the controller. in response, the controller activates the control motor that is connected to the window's output shaft, automatically opening the window to ventilate the area. simultaneously, the system communicates with the cell-phone app to notify the user. this design eliminates the need for manual intervention during a hazardous gas leak by automatically initiating window opening to discharge the gas, ensuring prompt emergency management. it guarantees the safety of all residents, including those asleep, as well as the elderly and children, even when no one else is present at home. additionally, the cell-phone app provides real-time updates about the indoor environment, issues alerts, and can automatically notify the authorities if needed—thereby addressing concerns and maintaining peace of mind.

raw: objectives domains of psychosocial health have been separately connected to pregnancy outcomes. this study explores the relationship between five domains of psychosocial health and their joint association with prenatal health and pregnancy outcomes. methods women from a prospective cohort study in durham, north carolina were clustered based on measures of paternal support, perceived stress, social support, depression, and self-efficacy. clusters were constructed using the k-means algorithm. we examined associations between psychosocial health and maternal health correlates, pregnancy intention, and pregnancy outcomes using chi square tests and multivariable models. results three psychosocial health profiles were identified, with the first (resilient; n = 509) characterized by low depression and perceived stress and high interpersonal support, paternal support, and self-efficacy. the second profile (vulnerable; n = 278) was marked by high depression and perceived stress, and low interpersonal support, paternal support, and self-efficacy. the third profile (moderate, n = 526) fell between the other profiles on all domains. health correlates, pregnancy intention, and pregnancy outcomes varied significantly across profiles. women with the vulnerable profile were more likely to have risky health correlates, have an unintended pregnancy, and deliver preterm. women with the resilient profile had better birth outcomes and fewer deleterious health correlates, preconception and prenatally. conclusions we posit that vulnerable psychosocial health, deleterious health correlates, and the stress which often accompanies pregnancy may interact to magnify risk during pregnancy. identifying and intervening with women experiencing vulnerable psychosocial health may improve outcomes for women and their children.
rewritten: this study investigates how five aspects of psychosocial health—paternal support, perceived stress, social support, depression, and self-efficacy—are interconnected and relate collectively to prenatal health and pregnancy outcomes. using data from a prospective cohort in durham, north carolina, women were grouped into clusters through a k-means algorithm based on these psychosocial measures. the analysis, which involved chi square tests and multivariable models, examined links between these psychosocial profiles and variables such as maternal health factors, pregnancy intention, and outcomes. three distinct profiles emerged. the first profile, labeled "resilient" (n = 509), was defined by low levels of depression and perceived stress combined with high levels of interpersonal support, paternal support, and self-efficacy. the second, termed "vulnerable" (n = 278), was characterized by high depression and perceived stress, along with low interpersonal support, paternal support, and self-efficacy. the third profile, described as “moderate” (n = 526), showed intermediate scores in all areas compared to the other two profiles. significant differences were observed across these profiles in terms of health correlates, pregnancy intention, and outcomes. women in the vulnerable group were more likely to experience negative health factors, have unintended pregnancies, and give birth preterm. in contrast, the resilient group demonstrated better birth outcomes and fewer adverse health correlates both before and during pregnancy. the authors conclude that vulnerable psychosocial health, along with harmful health factors and the stress commonly linked with pregnancy, may combine to increase risk during pregnancy. therefore, early identification and intervention for women with vulnerable psychosocial profiles could potentially lead to improved outcomes for both mothers and their children.

raw: in this paper, signal vector based detection (svd) algorithm for spatial modulation (sm) is modified to achieve a near maximum-likelihood (ml) performance and reduces the complexity compared to ml. first, the proposed low-complexity svd (lc-svd) algorithm orders the antenna index list based on the angle between the received vector y and the channel vector j h , and then it estimates symbol by compensating the channel attenuation with transmitting antenna index list. we can trade-off between the performance and the complexity by changing the number of the candidate transmitting antennas. the theoretical analysis and simulation results show that the lc-svd algorithm can achieve a near-ml performance with lower complexity.
rewritten: in this paper, the signal vector based detection (svd) algorithm for spatial modulation (sm) is adapted to obtain near maximum-likelihood (ml) performance while reducing complexity compared to ml. first, the proposed low-complexity svd (lc-svd) algorithm arranges the antenna index list according to the angle between the received vector y and the channel vector j_h. it then estimates the transmitted symbol by compensating for channel attenuation using the ordered antenna index list. by adjusting the number of candidate transmitting antennas, a balance between performance and complexity can be achieved. both theoretical analysis and simulation results indicate that the lc-svd algorithm delivers near-ml performance with lower complexity.

raw: assistive robots could be a future means to support independent living for seniors. this article provides insights into the latest developments in social service robots (ssr) based on the recently finished hobbit project. the idea of the hobbit project was to develop a low-cost ssr which is able to reduce the risk of falling, to detect falls and handle emergencies in private homes. the main objective of the project was to raise the technology to a level that allows the robot to be fully autonomously deployed in the private homes of older users and to evaluate technology market readiness, utility, usability and affordability under real-world conditions. during the initial phase of the project, a first prototype (pt1) was developed. the results of laboratory tests with pt1 were used for the development of a second prototype (pt2), which was finally tested in seven households of senior adults (mean age 79 years) for 3 weeks each, i.e. in total more than 5 months. the results showed that pt2 is intuitive to handle and that the functions offered meet the needs of older users; however, the robot was considered more as a toy than a supportive device for independent living. furthermore, despite an emergency function of the robot, perceived security did not increase. reasons for this might be a lack of technological robustness and slow performance of the prototype and also the good health conditions of the users; however, users believed that a market-ready version of the robot would be vital for supporting people who are more fragile and more socially isolated. thus, ssrs have the potential to support independent living of older people although the technology has to be considerably improved to reach market readiness.
rewritten: assistive robots may become a future solution for supporting seniors’ independent living. this article outlines the latest advances in social service robots (ssr) as showcased in the recently completed hobbit project. the project aimed to create an affordable ssr capable of reducing fall risks, detecting falls, and managing emergencies in private homes. its primary goal was to advance the technology to a stage where the robot could be fully deployed autonomously in seniors’ homes while assessing its market readiness, functionality, usability, and affordability under real-world conditions. in the initial phase, a first prototype (pt1) was developed, and laboratory tests provided valuable insights that informed the creation of a second prototype (pt2). pt2 was subsequently tested over three weeks in each of seven households of senior adults (with an average age of 79), amounting to over five months of cumulative testing. the results indicated that pt2 was intuitive to use and its features met the needs of older users, although it was regarded more as a toy than a life-enhancing support device. moreover, the emergency function did not significantly boost users’ perceived security. this outcome might be due to the prototype's limited technological robustness, its slow performance, and the relatively good health of the participants. nonetheless, users believed that a market-ready version of the robot could be crucial for assisting those who are more vulnerable or socially isolated. therefore, while ssrs have promising potential to support independent living among older people, significant technological improvements are necessary before they can be considered market-ready.

raw: pleural effusion can occur primarily or secondarily as complications of various diseases and classified into exudative or transudative. it becomes essential to differentiate between the types of pleural effusion due to its extensive differential diagnosis. hence we decided to conduct a study which provides a brief overview of clinical and etiological profile of the patients with pleural effusion. pleural fluid cytological and biochemical analysis is the most important and commonly used diagnostic method to distinguish exudative from transudative pleural effusion. 350 patients were enrolled in study, out of which 94.9% patients were having exudative and 5.1% patients were with transudative cause. tuberculosis was the most common exudative cause while chf was most common cause for transudative pleural effusion.
rewritten: pleural effusion may occur as a primary condition or as a complication of various diseases, and it is categorized as either exudative or transudative. since distinguishing between these two types is crucial due to a wide range of possible diagnoses, we carried out a study to present an overview of the clinical and etiological profiles of patients with pleural effusion. the most common diagnostic method for differentiating exudative from transudative effusions is the cytological and biochemical analysis of pleural fluid. in our study of 350 patients, 94.9% had exudative pleural effusion, whereas 5.1% had the transudative type. tuberculosis emerged as the most frequent cause of exudative effusions, while congestive heart failure was the leading cause of transudative effusions.

raw: the invention discloses a manufacturing method of a four-layer fpc. the manufacturing method includes the following steps that 1, first blind holes are formed in the inner layer double-faced fpc; 2, the first blind holes are filled and electroplated; 3, inner layer lines are manufactured, an inner covering film is pasted in a pressed mode, and then target punching and inner layer coarsening are carried out to connect the lines on the layer l2 and the lines on the layer l3; 4, the material obtained in the step 3 and the single-faced base material on the outer layer are laminated, and second blind holes are formed in the single-faced base material on the outer layer; 5, the second blind holes are filled and electroplated; 6, outer layer lines are manufactured. the high-density interconnection of the lines between the layers of the fpc is effectively improved, the thickness of the product is effectively reduced, and the multiple lamination ultrathin trend of the fpc strides forward a new course.
rewritten: the invention provides a manufacturing method for a four-layer fpc. this method comprises the following steps: 1. first, blind holes are created in an inner-layer, double-sided fpc. 2. these first blind holes are then filled and electroplated. 3. next, inner-layer lines are produced; an inner covering film is applied under pressure, followed by target punching and inner-layer roughening to establish connections between the lines on layers l2 and l3. 4. afterwards, the material from step 3 is laminated with a single-faced base material on the outer layer, where second blind holes are formed. 5. these second blind holes are similarly filled and electroplated. 6. finally, the outer-layer lines are manufactured. overall, this method significantly improves the high-density interconnection between the fpc layers, effectively reduces product thickness, and paves the way for the advancement of ultra-thin, multi-laminated fpc designs.

raw: the invention relates to a fabric comprising at least one high loft nonwoven layer having crimped multicomponent fibers, wherein a first component of the multicomponent fibers comprises a first polymer a and a second component of the multicomponent fibers comprises a blend of the first polymer a and a second polymer b, wherein the melt flow rate of polymer a is at least 25% different from and preferably higher than the melt flow rate of polymer b and wherein the second component comprises at least 15 wt.-% of polymer b.
rewritten: the invention concerns a fabric that includes at least one high-loft nonwoven layer made of crimped multicomponent fibers. in these fibers, one component consists solely of a first polymer (polymer a), while the other component contains a blend of the first polymer (polymer a) and a second polymer (polymer b). notably, the melt flow rate of polymer a differs by at least 25% from—and is preferably higher than—that of polymer b, and the blend in the second component contains at least 15 wt.-% of polymer b.

raw: the invention discloses a construction method of fingerprints of rhizoma corydalis analgesic capsules, aiming at construction of fingerprints of components of the rhizoma corydalis analgesic capsules, namely rhizoma corydalis and angelica dahurica. the construction method includes preparing test sample solutions, preparing reference substance solutions, preparing reference herb solutions, preparing negative reference solutions, performing liquid phase measurement, and processing the obtained fingerprints by fingerprint software to obtain the fingerprints representing fingerprint characteristics of the rhizoma corydalis and the fingerprints representing fingerprint characteristics of the angelica dahurica respectively. by the constructed fingerprints of the rhizoma corydalis analgesic capsules, mutual interference among medicinal elements can be avoided effectively, authenticity and quality of herbs applied to preparations can be tested conveniently, quality of the rhizoma corydalis analgesic capsules can be evaluated accurately from part to whole, and quality standards and control methods of the rhizoma corydalis analgesic capsules can be improved and perfected.
rewritten: the invention presents a method for constructing fingerprints of rhizoma corydalis analgesic capsules, with the goal of establishing fingerprints for the components of these capsules—specifically, rhizoma corydalis and angelica dahurica. the method involves several steps: preparing test sample solutions, preparing solutions of reference substances, preparing reference herb solutions, preparing negative reference solutions, conducting liquid phase measurements, and then processing the resulting fingerprints with dedicated software to obtain distinct fingerprints that represent the characteristics of rhizoma corydalis and angelica dahurica respectively. using the generated fingerprints of the rhizoma corydalis analgesic capsules allows for effective avoidance of mutual interference among medicinal elements, provides a convenient means to verify the authenticity and quality of the herbs used in the preparations, enables precise evaluation of the capsule quality both in part and as a whole, and contributes to the improvement and perfection of quality standards and control methods for the capsules.

raw: the present invention discloses a three-dimensional imaging laser radar system based on high-speed electro-optic modulation technology. the system mainly comprises a main control circuit module, a laser lighting module, a laser emitting optical system, a laser receiving optical system, a high-speed electro-optic modulation module, an emccd imaging module, and a host computer. under the control of the main control circuit module, the high-speed electro-optic modulation module modulates the echo signal detected by the laser receiving optical system, one path is modulated as an optical signal whose light intensity is monotonically increased with time, and the other path is modulated as an optical signal whose light intensity is monotonically decreased with time. the two modulated optical signals are collected by two paths of emccd cameras with photon detection ability at the same time and then are transmitted to the host computer. the host computer processes two images and reconstructs the three-dimensional image of a target scene. the system has the advantages of high imaging speed and high resolution and is especially suitable for the three-dimensional detection imaging of a high dynamic target.
rewritten: this invention introduces a three-dimensional imaging laser radar system that utilizes high-speed electro-optic modulation technology. the system consists primarily of a main control circuit module, a laser illumination module, a laser emitting optical system, a laser receiving optical system, a high-speed electro-optic modulation module, an emccd imaging module, and a host computer. under the guidance of the main control circuit module, the high-speed electro-optic modulation module processes the echo signal received by the laser receiving optical system by splitting it into two paths. one path is modulated into an optical signal with light intensity that increases monotonically over time, while the other is modulated into an optical signal with light intensity that decreases monotonically over time. both modulated optical signals are simultaneously captured by two emccd cameras capable of photon detection and then sent to the host computer. the host computer subsequently processes the two images to reconstruct a three-dimensional representation of the target scene. this system offers advantages such as high imaging speed and high resolution, making it particularly well-suited for the three-dimensional imaging detection of high dynamic targets.

raw: editorial : selected papers from the social media studies symposium, held on 15 september 2015, boras, sweden
rewritten: editorial: selected papers from the social media studies symposium, held on 15 september 2015 in boras, sweden.

raw: prairie voles show strong pair bonding with their mating partners, and they demonstrate parental behavior toward their infants, indicating that the prairie vole is a unique animal model for analysis of molecular mechanisms of social behavior. until a recent study, the signaling pathway of oxytocin was thought to be critical for the social behavior of prairie voles, but neuron-specific functional research may be necessary to identify the molecular mechanisms of social behavior. prairie vole pluripotent stem cells of high quality are essential to elucidate the molecular mechanisms of social behaviors. generation of high-quality induced pluripotent stem cells (ipscs) would help to establish a genetically modified prairie vole, including knockout and knock-in models, based on the pluripotency of ipscs. thus, we attempted to establish high-quality prairie vole-derived ipscs (pv-ipscs) in this study. we constructed a polycistronic reprogramming vector, which included six reprograming factors (oct3/4, sox2, klf4, c-myc, lin28, and nanog). furthermore, we evaluated the effect of six reprogramming factors, which included oct3/4 with the transactivation domain (tad) of myod. implantation of the pv-ipscs into immunodeficient mice caused a teratoma with three germ layers. furthermore, the established pv-ipscs tested positive for stem cell markers, including alkaline phosphatase activity (alp), stage-specific embryonic antigen (ssea)-1, and dependence on leukemia inhibitory factor (lif). our data indicate that our newly established pv-ipscs may be a useful tool for genetic analysis of social behavior.
rewritten: prairie voles exhibit strong pair bonding with their mates and show parental behavior toward their offspring, making them a distinctive model for studying the molecular basis of social behavior. although previous research emphasized the importance of oxytocin signaling in prairie vole social interactions, recent studies suggest that a more neuron-specific approach is needed to uncover the precise molecular mechanisms involved. high-quality prairie vole pluripotent stem cells are crucial for this investigation. by generating robust induced pluripotent stem cells (ipscs), researchers can create genetically engineered prairie voles, including knockout and knock-in models, taking advantage of the pluripotency of these cells. therefore, in our study, we aimed to develop high-quality prairie vole-derived ipscs (pv-ipscs). we achieved this by constructing a polycistronic reprogramming vector that includes six reprogramming factors (oct3/4, sox2, klf4, c-myc, lin28, and nanog), and we also examined the impact of incorporating the transactivation domain (tad) of myod with oct3/4. when these pv-ipscs were implanted into immunodeficient mice, they formed teratomas containing tissues from all three germ layers. additionally, the established pv-ipscs tested positive for stem cell markers, including alkaline phosphatase activity (alp), stage-specific embryonic antigen-1 (ssea-1), and reliance on leukemia inhibitory factor (lif). overall, our results suggest that these new pv-ipscs could serve as a valuable tool for genetically analyzing social behavior.

raw: we present the abundance analysis for a sample of 18 red giant branch stars in the metal-poor globular cluster ngc 4147 based on medium and high resolution spectra. this is the first extensive spectroscopic study of this cluster. we derive abundances of c, n, o, na, mg, al, si, ca, ti, cr, fe, ni, y, ba, and eu. we find a metallicity of [fe/h]=-1.84+-0.02 and an alpha-enhancement of +0.38+-0.05 (errors on the mean), typical of halo globular clusters in this metallicity regime. a significant spread is observed in the abundances of light elements c, n, o, na, and al. in particular we found a na-o anti-correlation and na-al correlation. the cluster contains only 15% of stars that belong to the first generation (na-poor and o-rich). this implies that it suffered a severe mass loss during its lifetime. its [ca/fe] and [ti/fe] mean values agree better with the galactic halo trend than with the trend of extragalactic environments at the cluster metallicity. this possibly suggests that ngc 4147 is a genuine galactic object at odd with what claimed by some author that proposed the cluster to be member of the sagittarius dwarf galaxy. a anti-relation between the light s-process element y and na may also be present.
rewritten: this study provides an abundance analysis for 18 red giant branch stars in the metal-poor globular cluster ngc 4147 using both medium and high-resolution spectra. it represents the first comprehensive spectroscopic investigation of this cluster. we determine the abundances of c, n, o, na, mg, al, si, ca, ti, cr, fe, ni, y, ba, and eu. our analysis finds a metallicity of [fe/h] = –1.84 ± 0.02 and an α-enhancement of +0.38 ± 0.05 (errors on the mean), which are typical values for halo globular clusters within this metallicity range. there is a notable spread in the abundances of the light elements c, n, o, na, and al. specifically, we observe a na–o anticorrelation and a na–al correlation. only about 15% of the cluster’s stars appear to belong to the first generation (characterized by being na-poor and o-rich), suggesting that the cluster experienced significant mass loss over its lifetime. additionally, the average [ca/fe] and [ti/fe] ratios in ngc 4147 align more closely with the galactic halo trend than with those seen in extragalactic environments at similar metallicities, supporting the idea that ngc 4147 is an authentic galactic object, contrary to proposals that it might be part of the sagittarius dwarf galaxy. there may also be an anticorrelation between the light s-process element y and na.

raw: the on -vehicle system of looking around, including leading camera, rear camera, the left side camera, the right side camera, controller and display device, the installation angle of leading camera and rear camera's visual angle center pin is for deflecting downwards along vertical orientation, and be 15 -25 with the contained angle of horizontal plane, left side camera and right side camera incline towards the afterbody direction of ground and court's vehicle, and the projection of visual angle center pin on vehicle length direction vertical guide of left side camera and right side camera is 15 -25 with the contained angle of horizontal plane, the contained angle of the projection of visual angle center pin on the horizontal plane of left side camera and right side camera and the vertical guide at vehicle length direction place is 85, the positive direction of left side camera and right side camera is to the anterior slope 5 -15 of vehicle with the contained angle of the vertical direction at left side camera and right side camera central point place. the utility model provides a visual angle level of automobile body both sides around about the on -vehicle system of looking around can make, the peripheral picture image symmetry of automobile body.
rewritten: the vehicle’s surround-view system comprises a front camera, a rear camera, a left-side camera, a right-side camera, along with a controller and display device. the front and rear cameras are installed so that their visual center axis is tilted downward relative to the vertical, forming an angle with the horizontal plane ranging from 15° to 25°. in contrast, both the left and right cameras are angled toward the rear of the vehicle. their visual axis centers, when projected onto a vertical guide aligned with the vehicle’s length, form an angle of 15° to 25° with the horizontal plane; furthermore, the angle between this horizontal projection and the vertical guide is set at 85°. additionally, the forward (positive) orientation of the left and right cameras is adjusted to an anterior tilt of 5° to 15° relative to their vertical axis at the center point. overall, this utility model offers a vehicle-surrounding system that provides well-balanced visual coverage on both sides of the automobile, ensuring that the peripheral images captured are symmetrical.

raw: the present invention relates to an antibody against neuropilin 1 (nrp1) or an antigen binding fragment thereof, nucleic acid coding the same, a vector comprising the nucleic acid, a cell transformed with the vector, a preparation method of the antibody or the antigen binding fragment thereof, an antibody-drug complex comprising the antibody or the antigen binding fragment thereof, and a composition thereof for preventing or treating cancer. the antibody or the antigen binding fragment thereof bind to nrp1 expressed on the surface of a cell, and are internalized inside the cell.
rewritten: this invention pertains to an antibody directed against neuropilin 1 (nrp1), or an antigen-binding fragment of it, as well as to the nucleic acid encoding such an antibody or fragment, a vector containing this nucleic acid, and a cell transformed with that vector. it also covers methods for preparing the antibody or its antigen-binding fragment, an antibody-drug conjugate that includes the antibody or fragment, and a composition intended for cancer prevention or treatment. the antibody or fragment binds to nrp1 on the surface of cells and is subsequently internalized.

raw: in this article i discuss one of the most controversial ethical dilemmas in our markets: prostitution. i do it from a solidarity economy approach supported by the philosophy of egali- tarianism and communitarianism. our goals are at least three: first, to include the concept of market and commodities in the framework of a substan- tive economy. in the second place, to analyze some egalitarian positions which ascribe to prostitution a complex status of commodity which deserves a careful ethical approach. finally, to try to answer the question of whether or not the values and prin- ciples of solidarity economy could allow sex to be bought and sold just as any other commodity.
rewritten: in this article, i examine one of the most debated ethical issues in our markets: prostitution. i approach the topic from the perspective of a solidarity economy, drawing on the philosophies of egalitarianism and communitarianism. my objectives are threefold. first, i aim to integrate the concepts of market and commodity within a substantive economic framework. second, i explore various egalitarian viewpoints that view prostitution as a complex commodity, which necessitates a thoughtful ethical analysis. finally, i investigate whether the principles and values of a solidarity economy could justify treating sex as a commodity to be bought and sold like any other.

raw: oil palm biomass residues in southeast asia, which are underutilized, can be converted into solid fuel if they are torrefied. in this case, flue gas in palm oil mills may be economical gas and thermal energy sources of torrefaction. this study aims to investigate the effects of oxygen (0, 9, 15 and 21 vol%) and carbon dioxide (0, 9, 15 and 21 vol%) in torrefaction gas towards torrefaction behavior of efb, in specific calorific value and carbon content, the representative indices for solid fuel. the torrefaction temperature and time ranged 493-573 k and 30-90 min, respectively. in general, existence of oxygen resulted in higher carbon content, and thus higher calorific value. on the other hand, existence of carbon dioxide did not exhibit such an enhancement effect except for 30 min torrefaction of at the highest temperature of 573 k.
rewritten: underutilized oil palm biomass residues in southeast asia can be converted into solid fuel via torrefaction. in this context, the flue gas from palm oil mills could serve as an economical source of both gas and thermal energy for the process. this study examines how varying concentrations of oxygen (0, 9, 15, and 21 vol%) and carbon dioxide (0, 9, 15, and 21 vol%) in the torrefaction atmosphere affect the torrefaction behavior of empty fruit bunches (efb), particularly focusing on calorific value and carbon content—key markers of solid fuel quality. the experiments were conducted at temperatures ranging from 493 to 573 k over durations of 30 to 90 minutes. generally, the presence of oxygen led to higher carbon content and, consequently, a higher calorific value. in contrast, carbon dioxide did not show a similar enhancement, except when torrefaction was carried out for 30 minutes at the highest temperature of 573 k.

raw: the invention discloses a method and a circuit for suppressing industrial frequency harmonic disturbance of an ac-dc (alternating current-direct current) power supply, and belongs to an ac-dc power supply module. the invention aims to solve the technical problem how to effectively reduce repeated harmonic noise generated by the ac-dc power supply module so as to enable a product to meet the requirements of the national military standard and meanwhile, avoid interference of reduction of quality of a power supply network to other current-using equipment. the invention adopts the technical scheme that the method for suppressing the industrial frequency harmonic disturbance of the ac-dc power supply comprises the following step of: (1) adding an active power factor correction circuit at the front end of the ac-dc power supply module so as to compensate current harmonic distortion caused by a capacitive load in the ac-dc power supply module and reduce repeated harmonic noise caused by current harmonic distortion. the circuit for suppressing the industrial frequency harmonic disturbance of the ac-dc power supply comprises an ac input module, a high-frequency filter, a harmonic suppressor, a rectifying circuit, the active power factor correction circuit and the ac-dc power supply module.
rewritten: the invention presents a method and a circuit for mitigating industrial-frequency harmonic disturbances in an ac-dc power supply, which are integrated into an ac-dc power supply module. it addresses the technical issue of effectively reducing recurring harmonic noise produced by the ac-dc module, ensuring that the product meets national military standards while preventing interference or degradation of the power supply quality for other devices. the solution involves adding an active power factor correction circuit at the input stage of the ac-dc module to compensate for current harmonic distortion caused by capacitive loads, thereby reducing repetitive harmonic noise. the overall circuit comprises an ac input module, a high-frequency filter, a harmonic suppressor, a rectifier, the active power factor correction circuit, and the ac-dc power supply module itself.
