raw: published studies showed controversial findings about the relationship between glutathione s-transferase m1 (gstm1) null genotype and clinical outcomes of patients with colorectal cancer. we performed a meta-analysis to quantitatively assess the association between gstm1 null genotype and prognosis of patients with colorectal cancer. we systematically searched pubmed, embase, and web of science to identify prospective or retrospective cohort studies assessing the association of gstm1 null genotype with overall survival (os) or disease-free survival (dfs) in colorectal cancer. the hazard ratios (hrs) and 95 % confidence intervals (95 % cis) were used to assess the association of gstm1 null genotype with os or dfs. finally, 15 studies from 14 publications with 4326 colorectal cancer patients were included into the meta-analysis. there was no heterogeneity in the meta-analysis relating os (i (2) = 0 %) and dfs (i (2) = 0 %). overall, gstm1 null genotype was significantly associated with poor os in patients with colorectal cancer (hr = 1.18, 95 % ci 1.07-1.30, p = 0.001). in addition, gstm1 null genotype was also significantly associated with poor dfs in patients with colorectal cancer (hr = 1.15, 95 % ci 1.03-1.28, p = 0.015). no obvious risk of publication bias was observed. gstm1 null genotype is significantly associated with poor os and dfs in patients with colorectal cancer, which suggests that gstm1 null genotype confers poor effect on the prognosis of colorectal cancer.
rewritten: a number of published studies have reported conflicting results regarding the link between the glutathione s-transferase m1 (gstm1) null genotype and the clinical outcomes in colorectal cancer patients. to clarify this relationship, we conducted a meta-analysis to quantitatively evaluate the association of the gstm1 null genotype with prognosis in colorectal cancer. we systematically searched pubmed, embase, and web of science for both prospective and retrospective cohort studies that analyzed the relationship between the gstm1 null genotype and either overall survival (os) or disease-free survival (dfs) in colorectal cancer. hazard ratios (hrs) along with their 95% confidence intervals (cis) were utilized to examine the impact of the gstm1 null genotype on os and dfs. ultimately, 15 studies from 14 publications, encompassing 4,326 colorectal cancer patients, were included in our meta-analysis. notably, there was no heterogeneity detected in the meta-analysis concerning os (i² = 0%) or dfs (i² = 0%). in summary, the gstm1 null genotype was significantly associated with poorer overall survival (hr = 1.18, 95% ci 1.07–1.30, p = 0.001) and reduced disease-free survival (hr = 1.15, 95% ci 1.03–1.28, p = 0.015) among patients with colorectal cancer. moreover, no significant risk of publication bias was identified. these findings indicate that the gstm1 null genotype is significantly linked to unfavorable os and dfs, suggesting it adversely affects the prognosis of colorectal cancer.

raw: abstract superconducting magnets of sst-1 are extensively instrumented to continuously monitor the health of magnets during machine cool-down, plasma experiments and also during the machine warm-up phase. these instrumentations include temperature sensors, flow meters, hall probes, strain gages, displacement sensors, pressure sensors and voltage taps. the number of sensors and their locations has been optimized to systematically monitor all important magnet parameters to ensure its safety. in-house developed modular signal conditioning cards have been developed for these instrumentations. the data is acquired on a versa module europa bus based data acquisition system (vme daq). this paper gives an overview of selection, installation, laboratory scale validations, and distribution logics of these instrumentations. results during plasma campaigns and the up-gradation aspects of these instrumentations are also discussed in this paper.
rewritten: the abstract superconducting magnets of sst-1 are equipped with extensive instrumentation to continuously monitor their condition during machine cooldown, plasma experiments, and warm-up phases. this instrumentation consists of temperature sensors, flow meters, hall probes, strain gauges, displacement sensors, pressure sensors, and voltage taps. the sensor count and placement have been optimized to systematically track all critical magnet parameters to ensure safety. additionally, modular signal conditioning cards have been developed in-house for these instruments. data is acquired using a vme daq system based on the versa module europa bus. this paper provides an overview of the selection process, installation, laboratory validations, and the distribution logic of these instruments. it also discusses results obtained during plasma campaigns as well as aspects related to future upgrades of this instrumentation system.

raw: this paper studies the detection of anomalies, or defects, on wheels' surface. the wheel surface is inspected using an imaging system, placed over the conveyor belt. due to the nature of the wheels, the different elements are analyzed separately. because many different types of wheels can be manufactured, it is proposed to detect any anomaly using a general and original adaptive linear parametric model. the adaptivity of the proposed model allows us to describe accurately the inspected wheel surface. in addition, the use of a linear parametric model allows the application of hypothesis testing theory to design a test whose statistical performances are analytically known. numerical results show the accuracy and the relevance of the proposed methodology.
rewritten: this paper examines the detection of anomalies, or defects, on the surface of wheels. the wheel surface is inspected via an imaging system positioned above the conveyor belt. due to the varying characteristics of the wheels, different elements are analyzed independently. since various types of wheels can be produced, the proposed approach involves identifying any anomaly using a versatile and innovative adaptive linear parametric model. this adaptive model precisely describes the inspected wheel surface, and its linear parametric nature enables the use of hypothesis testing theory to develop a test with analytically known statistical properties. numerical results demonstrate the accuracy and effectiveness of the proposed methodology.

raw: the invention discloses an absorbent capable of selectively absorbing s02 and a technique for absorbing so2. the absorbent comprises the following components by mass percent: 30%-70% of ionic liquid, 0.1%-4.0% of an activator, 0.1%-0.5% of an antioxidant, 0.1%-0.5% of a corrosion inhibitor and the balance of water. the technique for absorbing so2 by using the absorbent comprises the following steps: introducing washed smoke into an absorption tower from the bottom, and using the absorbent to absorb so2; introducing the so2-absorbed rich liquor into a regeneration tower from the top for desorbing so2; conveying the desorbed so2 to the next workshop section, so as to directly synthesize h2so4. according to the absorbent provided by the invention, the absorbing effect on so2 is good, and the selectivity is high; since the ionic liquid adopts organic acid, low corrosivity to the equipment and more environment friendliness are realized; the technique is stable in performance, the desulfurization efficiency exceeds 99%, and the absorbed so2 is easy to desorb and regenerate.
rewritten: the invention discloses an absorbent designed to selectively absorb so₂ as well as a method for its absorption. the absorbent is composed, by mass, of 30%–70% ionic liquid, 0.1%–4.0% activator, 0.1%–0.5% antioxidant, 0.1%–0.5% corrosion inhibitor, with the remainder being water. the method for absorbing so₂ using this absorbent involves the following steps: first, washed smoke is introduced into an absorption tower from the bottom where the absorbent removes so₂; next, the so₂-enriched liquor is fed into a regeneration tower from the top for desorption of so₂; finally, the desorbed so₂ is directed to the subsequent process section for the direct synthesis of h₂so₄. according to the invention, the absorbent provides an excellent absorption effect and high selectivity for so₂. moreover, by using an ionic liquid that contains organic acid, the system achieves low equipment corrosivity and enhanced environmental friendliness. the method is characterized by its stable performance, over 99% desulfurization efficiency, and ease of so₂ desorption and regeneration.

raw: the utility model relates to a simple and easy rack of assorted toiletries belongs to daily life articles for use field, including the fixed plate, parallel arrangement upper strata support, middle level support and lower floor's support on the fixed plate, upper support top sets up the soap box standing groove and the cup is placed to article, and upper support one side sets up the rack, middle level support bottom installation infrared lamp pipe, the thing pole is hung in middle level support front end setting, lower floor's support top installation hot -water bag, lower floor support one side sets up toothpaste and places the box, and lower floor's support front end sets up the tooth cup rack, and lower floor support bottom sets up the supporting leg, installs grid frame between the supporting leg. the utility model discloses simple structure, convenient to use, not only can go on assorted toiletries simply categorised, can also be regularly to the assorted toiletries disinfection of disinfecting, guarantee assorted toiletries's health.
rewritten: this utility model relates to a simple and user-friendly rack for assorted toiletries, a daily-use article. the rack features a fixed plate on which three supports are arranged in parallel: an upper support, a middle support, and a lower support. at the top of the upper support, there is a groove for holding a soap box along with a cup holder, and one side of this support is fitted with a rack. the bottom of the middle support is equipped with an infrared lamp pipe, and a pole is hung from its front end. on the top of the lower support, a hot-water bag is installed, while one side includes a holder for toothpaste and a box for storage, and the front end is fitted with a tooth cup rack. additionally, supporting legs are mounted at the bottom of the lower support, between which a grid frame is installed. this design is straightforward and convenient to use, as it not only enables easy categorization of various toiletries but also allows for regular disinfection to ensure their hygiene.

raw: in view of the demographic changes, the need for new telecare technologies is clearly growing. at the same time, in polish law, there is still no provision allowing for the financing of the telemedicine and telecare services by the national health fund. the aim of this contribution is to survey the state-of-the-art telecare systems available on the polish market and to discuss the main related problems. we also present results of interviews carried out in social welfare centres. it turns out that the telecare system matching most of the identified key needs is not yet available on the polish market.
rewritten: because of demographic changes, the demand for innovative telecare technologies is on the rise. however, current polish legislation does not include provisions that allow the national health fund to finance telemedicine and telecare services. this paper aims to review the most advanced telecare systems available in poland and to examine the key issues associated with them. furthermore, it presents findings from interviews conducted at social welfare centers, revealing that there is currently no telecare solution on the polish market that fully addresses all the essential needs.

raw: a research project submitted in fulfilment for the degree of master of education (early childhood education) in the school of education, kenyatta university
rewritten: this research project was submitted to fulfill the requirements for the master of education degree, specializing in early childhood education, at the school of education, kenyatta university.

raw: background there are few objective data to guide management of cystic fibrosis (cf) pulmonary exacerbations. we studied intravenous (iv) antibiotic treatment failure as defined by a need to retreat patients with iv antibiotics within 30 days of completion of a prior iv antibiotic treatment for pulmonary exacerbation.
rewritten: background: there is limited objective data to guide the management of pulmonary exacerbations in cystic fibrosis (cf). our research examined the failure of intravenous (iv) antibiotic treatment, which we defined as the need to retreat patients with iv antibiotics within 30 days after completing a previous course for a pulmonary exacerbation.

raw: the utility model discloses a conical surface formula turning attachment, concretely relates to anchor clamps field. conical surface formula turning attachment, including fixed establishment and actuating mechanism, its characterized in that: fixed establishment and actuating mechanism fixed connection, fixed establishment includes the anchor clamps body and the position sleeve of conical surface formula, the position sleeve cup joints on the anchor clamps body, actuating mechanism includes pull rod, elasticity collet chuck and nut, the pull rod alternates on the anchor clamps body, elasticity collet chuck, nut cup joint the one end at the pull rod in proper order, the internal setting element that is equipped with of anchor clamps, the part that the pull rod is located anchor clamps internal is equipped with the recess, the setting element is right with the groove phase. the structure that present mould had mainly been solved to this scheme is complicated, and the operation is inconvenient, problem that production efficiency is low.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a conical surface formula turning attachment, specifically related to the field of anchor clamps. this attachment consists of a fixed installation and an actuating mechanism that are securely connected. the fixed installation includes an anchor clamps body and a positioning sleeve for the conical surface formula, with the positioning sleeve being cup-jointed to the anchor clamps body. the actuating mechanism comprises a pull rod, an elastic collet chuck, and a nut. these components are arranged in sequence along the pull rod, which is alternately cup-jointed with both the elastic collet chuck and the nut along the anchor clamps body. additionally, the anchor clamps body features an internal recess that houses a corresponding positioning groove. in contrast, the present mold structure uses a rather complicated design that makes operation inconvenient and reduces production efficiency.

raw: three-dimensional ultrasound (3dus) allows imaging of anatomical structures in multiple planes, some of which are not possible with conventional two-dimensional ultrasound (2dus). this provides an advantage when imaging early embryonic or fetal structures by transvaginal ultrasonography, since manipulation of the transvaginal probe is more restricted in space when compared to the transabdominal probe. several case reports and series highlight potential benefits of 3dus to study the early embryonic anatomy in vivo (sonoembryology) as well as for the early diagnosis of congenital anomalies. however, comparative studies between 2dus and 3dus for early first trimester diagnosis are lacking. in this chapter we review the potential role of 3dus for early diagnosis of congenital anomalies, including congenital heart disease.
rewritten: three-dimensional ultrasound (3dus) enables the imaging of anatomical structures in several planes, some of which are not accessible with conventional two-dimensional ultrasound (2dus). this is particularly beneficial when using transvaginal ultrasonography to image early embryonic or fetal structures, as the transvaginal probe offers less spatial maneuverability compared to the transabdominal probe. several case reports and series emphasize the potential of 3dus both for investigating early embryonic anatomy in vivo (sonoembryology) and for the early detection of congenital anomalies. however, there remains a lack of comparative studies between 2dus and 3dus for early first-trimester diagnosis. in this chapter, we discuss the potential role of 3dus in the early diagnosis of congenital anomalies, including congenital heart disease.

raw: summary attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder (adhd) is a neurodevelopmental disorder characterised by developmentally inappropriate levels of inattention and hyperactivity or impulsivity. the heterogeneity of its clinical manifestations and the differential responses to treatment and varied prognoses have long suggested myriad underlying causes. over the past decade, clinical and basic research efforts have uncovered many behavioural and neurobiological alterations associated with adhd, from genes to higher order neural networks. here, we review the neurobiology of adhd by focusing on neural circuits implicated in the disorder and discuss how abnormalities in circuitry relate to symptom presentation and treatment. we summarise the literature on genetic variants that are potentially related to the development of adhd, and how these, in turn, might affect circuit function and relevant behaviours. whether these underlying neurobiological factors are causally related to symptom presentation remains unresolved. therefore, we assess efforts aimed at disentangling issues of causality, and showcase the shifting research landscape towards endophenotype refinement in clinical and preclinical settings. furthermore, we review approaches being developed to understand the neurobiological underpinnings of this complex disorder, including the use of animal models, neuromodulation, and pharmacoimaging studies.
rewritten: attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder (adhd) is a neurodevelopmental condition marked by levels of inattention, hyperactivity, and impulsivity that are not appropriate for an individual’s developmental stage. the disorder’s varied clinical presentations, differential responses to treatment, and diverse prognoses have long hinted at a range of underlying causes. in the last ten years, both clinical and basic research has revealed numerous behavioral and neurobiological changes linked to adhd—from genetic influences to disruptions in complex neural networks. in this review, we explore the neurobiology of adhd by concentrating on the neural circuits involved, and we examine how abnormalities in these circuits might relate to the symptoms and treatment outcomes seen in the disorder. we also outline current findings on genetic variants that could contribute to the development of adhd, discussing how these genetic factors might affect circuit function and behavior. although it remains unclear whether these neurobiological factors cause the symptoms, we assess current attempts to unravel these causal links and highlight the evolving focus on refining endophenotypes in both clinical and preclinical research. in addition, we discuss new approaches aimed at understanding the neurobiological foundations of this complex disorder, including animal models, neuromodulation techniques, and pharmacoimaging studies.

raw: this paper presents the design of a controller for the measurement and reduction of conducted electro magnetic interference (emi) caused in the power electronic circuits. the conducted emi is also separating the common mode (cm) and differential mode (dm) simultaneously using line impedance stabilization network (lisn). emi is mitigated by the fuzzy controller. by comparing common mode voltage with the standard reference value, the generated error can be minimized by using fuzzy controller. fuzzy controller is varying the pwm signal of the power electronic switching devices for reducing the electromagnetic interference. in this paper, comparison of pi and fuzzy controller of the open loop and closed loop models are implemented using matlabr and also simulation results of the pi controller and fuzzy controller analysis are presented in this paper. the fuzzy controller is provided to achieve the emi level of the inverter within the standard limit.
rewritten: this paper introduces a controller designed to measure and reduce conducted electromagnetic interference (emi) in power electronic circuits. using a line impedance stabilization network (lisn), the system separates common mode (cm) and differential mode (dm) noise simultaneously. a fuzzy controller then mitigates emi by comparing the common mode voltage to a standard reference value, thereby minimizing the error. the fuzzy controller accomplishes this by adjusting the pwm signals of the power electronic switching devices to lower interference levels. additionally, the paper compares the performance of pi and fuzzy controllers in both open-loop and closed-loop models, with simulations conducted in matlab. the results demonstrate that the fuzzy controller effectively keeps the inverter's emi within standard limits.

raw: the disclosure provides a wall-hang apparatus of a display device, and a display device. the wall-hang apparatus of a display device includes: a wall fixture fixed to a wall, a display device fixture fixed to a display device body, and a bolt, wherein the display device fixture is hung on the wall fixture; and the wall fixture is provided with a first pin hole, the display device fixture is provided with a second pin hole positioned opposite to the first pin hole, and the bolt is inserted into the first pin hole and the second pin hole. with the wall-hang apparatus of a display device according to the disclosure, the reliability of hanging the display device on a wall securely can be improved.
rewritten: this disclosure relates to a wall-mount system for a display device, as well as the display device itself. the system comprises a wall bracket fixed to a wall, a display device bracket attached to the display device, and a bolt. the display device bracket hangs on the wall bracket. specifically, the wall bracket features a first pinhole and the display device bracket has a second pinhole aligned with the first; the bolt passes through both pinholes. this arrangement enhances the reliability of securely mounting the display device to a wall.

raw: hypercalcemia in pregnancy is a rare condition which brings considerable risks to mother and fetus. the most common cause is primary hyperparathyroidism(phpt). the untypical symptoms and biochemical tests results add obstacles in the diagnosis of phpt during pregnancy. the management is difficult, due to restrictions in choices of treatments and lack of clinical guidelines. severity evaluation which takes consideration of calcium homeostasis during pregnancy is crucial for appropriate management. parathyroidectomy during the second trimester is recommended for those with high serum calcium levels. (chin j endocrinol metab, 2016, 32: 415-417) key words: primary hyperparathyroidism; pregnancy; hypercalcemia
rewritten: hypercalcemia during pregnancy is an uncommon condition that poses significant risks to both the mother and fetus. primary hyperparathyroidism (phpt) is the leading cause. due to its atypical symptoms and unusual biochemical test outcomes, diagnosing phpt in pregnant patients can be challenging. managing the condition is complicated by limited treatment options and a lack of comprehensive clinical guidelines. it is essential to assess the severity of the disorder while considering the unique aspects of calcium homeostasis during pregnancy. for patients with markedly elevated serum calcium levels, parathyroidectomy in the second trimester is the recommended course of action. (chin j endocrinol metab, 2016, 32: 415-417) keywords: primary hyperparathyroidism; pregnancy; hypercalcemia.

raw: the present invention relates to an on-line cigarette technology quality analysis and traceability system. the on-line cigarette technology quality analysis and traceability system is composed of a volume package production equipment electric control system, a technology quality parameter acquisition device, a steel seal detection and acquisition device, an opc server, a real-time historical database server, a relation database server, an accessory bar code acquisition device and system, an application server, an on-site operation terminal, a case quality traceability code pasting system, a whole-tray rfid writing device, an automatic stereo warehouse control system, an automatic stereo warehouse and a profinet ethernet. the on-line cigarette technology quality analysis and traceability system of the present invention analyzes the real-timely acquired technology quality parameters according to a cigarette technology quality standard and by a big data-based analysis model and a full-sample statistics technology to realize the real-time monitoring and feedback of the change and adjustment situations of the technology quality parameters and the abnormal situations during a cigarette production process, and utilizes the technology quality parameter real-time data stored in a real-time historical database according to the timestamps to realize the historical reproduction of the cigarette production process.
rewritten: the present invention pertains to an online system for analyzing cigarette technology quality and ensuring traceability. this system consists of several integrated components, including an electric control system for volume package production equipment, a device for acquiring technology quality parameters, a steel seal detection and acquisition unit, an opc server, a real-time historical database server, a relational database server, a device and system for accessory barcode acquisition, an application server, an on-site operation terminal, a system for pasting case quality traceability codes, a device for writing rfid on whole trays, an automatic stereo warehouse control system, an automatic stereo warehouse, and a profinet ethernet connection. the system operates by analyzing technology quality parameters obtained in real time in accordance with a cigarette technology quality standard. it employs a big data analytical model and comprehensive sample statistics to achieve real-time monitoring and feedback on both the dynamic changes in technology quality parameters and any irregular conditions that occur during the production process. moreover, it utilizes the real-time data stored in a historical database, marked with timestamps, to recreate and scrutinize the cigarette production process after the fact.

raw: introduction and objectives: after a transient ischemic attack, there is a 90 day increased risk of stroke that can be predicted by abcd2 score. a tia clinic for low risk (abcd2 score <4) was estab...
rewritten: introduction and objectives: following a transient ischemic attack, patients face an increased risk of stroke within 90 days—a risk that can be estimated using the abcd2 score. a specialized tia clinic has been established for those considered low risk (with an abcd2 score lower than 4).

raw: the utility model provides an electromagnetic interference shield device, including the cover body, base, electromagnetism wave absorption ware and gasket, the cover body is bilayer structure, the cover personally experience sth. part of the body cover in on the base to with the base vacuole formation, electromagnetism wave absorption ware sets up in the cavity and fixed connection is in on the base, the cover body is equipped with the engagement member who is used for both fixed connection with the junction of base, and the connecting wire that still is equipped with power supply magnetism wave absorption ware on the cover body extends to outside slotted hole from the cavity in. the utility model discloses electromagnetic interference's shielding is effectual, reasonable in design, and reduce cost, convenient just being convenient for of transport is maintained.
rewritten: the utility model relates to an electromagnetic interference shielding device that comprises a cover, a base, electromagnetic wave absorption material, and a gasket. the cover has a dual-layer structure and, when assembled with the base, forms a cavity. within this cavity, the electromagnetic wave absorption material is installed and fixed to the base. the cover also features an engagement element used to securely connect it to the base. moreover, a connecting cable—equipped with a power supply for the electromagnetic wave absorption material—extends through a slotted opening in the cover. this design provides effective electromagnetic interference shielding, is cost-efficient, and allows for easy transportation.

raw: in spite of many years of work by scientists and specialists on various software qualities, testing stays one of the most broadly honed and concentrated on methodologies for evaluating and improving software quality. our objective, in this paper, is to present how optimization techniques provide solutions to different and difficult issues in different areas of software engineering. optimization algorithms are mathematical procedures, which intends to best optimal results for the defect, fault, failure to accomplish tractability, strength, and low arrangement cost. in this paper, a comprehensive overview of software testing and metrics based on soft computing and optimization techniques is presented. in this survey, we try to explain some major problems like defect prediction, software fault prediction and their solutions by soft computing and optimization algorithms. the paper presents an overview of the usage of mathematical optimization algorithms and soft computing approaches.
rewritten: despite years of research by scientists and specialists on various aspects of software quality, testing remains one of the most intensively focused areas for evaluating and enhancing software. this paper aims to demonstrate how optimization techniques can address a range of challenging issues in different fields of software engineering. optimization algorithms, which are mathematical procedures, are designed to yield optimal results in order to minimize defects, faults, and failures, while ensuring tractability, robustness, and cost efficiency. here, we provide a comprehensive review of software testing and metrics that are based on soft computing and optimization strategies. in this survey, we also discuss key challenges—such as defect prediction and software fault prediction—and present solutions using these techniques. overall, the paper outlines the role of mathematical optimization algorithms and soft computing methods in improving software quality.

raw: disclosed herein are methods for presenting a search response to a user query configured to include a buy option. in response to the user query on a generalized search engine, the method includes presenting a purchase-related search result that is configured such that when a user interacts with the purchase-related search result and confirms a purchase via interacting with the buy option, the generalized search entity initiates processing of the purchase of an item. the method includes receiving an interaction from the user associated with the purchase-related search result. the generalized search engine or entity can store and process payment information and communicate through an api with a merchant who handles delivery of the item.
rewritten: the methods described involve displaying a search result that includes a buy option in response to a user query on a generalized search engine. when the user responds to this purchase-related result and confirms their intent to buy via the provided option, the search entity triggers the processing of the purchase for the selected item. this method also covers receiving the user’s interaction with the purchase-related result. additionally, the generalized search engine or entity is capable of storing and processing payment details, as well as communicating with a merchant—through an api—to handle the delivery of the item.

raw: the invention discloses a water dispenser as well as a sewage discharge control device and a sewage discharge control method thereof, wherein the sewage discharge control device comprises a sewage discharge path arranged at the bottom of a heat tank of the water dispenser, a sewage discharge valve arranged on the sewage discharge path and used for controlling the opening or closing of the sewage discharge path, a clock chip used for timing, and a main control module which is respectively connected with the clock chip and the sewage discharge valve and is used for obtaining time recorded by the clock chip in real time and controlling the sewage discharge valve to be opened when the current time recorded by the clock chip reaches preset sewage discharge time so as to discharge sewage through the sewage discharge path of the water dispenser. the sewage discharge control device can control the water dispenser to discharge the sewage when the current time reaches the preset sewage discharge time, so as to realize a real-time sewage discharge function of the water dispenser, thereby not only improving water drinking safety of users, but also realizing low costs.
rewritten: the invention relates to a water dispenser that includes a sewage discharge control device and a corresponding method. this control device consists of a sewage discharge path located at the bottom of the water dispenser’s heat tank, a sewage discharge valve positioned along this path for regulating its open or closed state, a clock chip for real-time timing, and a main control module. the main control module, which is linked to both the clock chip and the sewage discharge valve, continuously monitors the current time recorded by the clock chip. when this time matches a preset sewage discharge time, the module opens the sewage discharge valve to allow waste to be expelled through the sewage discharge path. consequently, the device ensures that the water dispenser discharges sewage at precise times, which not only improves the safety of the water supply for users but also reduces costs.

raw: the invention discloses wear-resistant and antiknock concrete and a preparation method thereof. each cubic meter of the concrete comprises 600-1600kg of cement, 400-1400kg of fine aggregate, 30-560kg of a high-strength admixture, 250-1300kg of high wear-resistant aggregate, 3-500kg of high tensile strength fibers, 0.4-45kg of organic fibers, 0.6-43.2kg of a water reducer (based on solid content), 0.06-43kg of an antifoaming agent, 6-129kg of an expanding agent and 100-430kg of water. the wear-resistant, antiknock and radiation-resistant concrete has high wear resistance, instant high temperature explosion resistance, high knock resistance, high toughness and radiation resistance.
rewritten: the invention relates to a type of concrete that is both wear-resistant and antiknock, along with a method for its production. in each cubic meter of this concrete, the composition includes: 600-1600 kg of cement; 400-1400 kg of fine aggregate; 30-560 kg of a high-strength admixture; 250-1300 kg of high wear-resistant aggregate; 3-500 kg of high tensile strength fibers; 0.4-45 kg of organic fibers; 0.6-43.2 kg of a water reducer (calculated based on solid content); 0.06-43 kg of an antifoaming agent; 6-129 kg of an expanding agent; and 100-430 kg of water. the resulting concrete exhibits excellent wear resistance, the ability to resist immediate high-temperature explosions, high knock resistance, superior toughness, and radiation resistance.

raw: the utility model discloses an electron device that can show live time information, including display and controller, infrared sensor module, button cell, wireless communication module and microprocessor are located inside the controller, the led module is located the surface of controller, the infrared sensor module is connected with wireless communication module, the led module is connected with microprocessor, microprocessor is connected with wireless communication module, button cell is connected with wireless communication module, wireless communication module is connected with the time -recorder, the upper end position that deviates from the display screen terminal surface at the controller is installed to the time -recorder, compares with prior art, realizes whether being in the monitoring before the display screen to the user through adding the infrared sensor module, and the design of time -recorder be then can help the user to know live time information, monitors under the condition that button cell's interpolation is then can be more electroless, and the interpolation of led module then can effectual warning user be taken a good rest.
rewritten: the utility model discloses an electronic device for displaying live time information. this device includes a display and a controller, within which an infrared sensor module, a button cell, a wireless communication module, and a microprocessor are housed. an led module is positioned on the surface of the controller. the connections are arranged as follows: the infrared sensor module is linked to the wireless communication module; the led module is connected to the microprocessor; and the microprocessor interfaces with the wireless communication module. additionally, the button cell is connected to the wireless communication module, which in turn connects to a time-recorder installed toward the upper end of the controller, offset from the display screen terminal. compared to prior art, this design incorporates an infrared sensor module that monitors whether a user is positioned in front of the display screen, while the time-recorder assists users by providing live time information. moreover, the arrangement allows for more efficient power management of the button cell, and the led module is capable of effectively signaling the user to take a rest.

raw: genetic development of broiler is growing rapidly. nowadays, broiler is slaughtered at the ages of 29 days rather than 35 days. rapid growth is usually coupled by an immune deficiencies of broiler, therefore such feed additives as antibiotics is necessary to promote growth and improve endurance of the broiler. the purpose of this research was to investigate the amount of residue of zinc bacitracin antibiotics in the thigh meat, breast meat, liver, and kidney of the broilers; and to determine the withdrawal time between the discontinuation of the antibiotic of the zinc bacitracin and the slaughter of the broiler to eliminate or to reduce that residue so that the product of the broiler was safe for human consumption. the research was conducted at sekolah tinggi penyuluhan pertanian (stpp) gowa. the broilers used in this study was strain cobb sr 707, aged 29 days (unsexed), and were obtained from the local broiler farm. the ration containing the antibiotics of the zinc bacitracin was terminated at day 0, 3, 6, and 9 before slaughtering. the bacteria used to test the dilution sensitivity was staphylococcus aureus (105-108 colony ml-1). the transmittance reading of the sample solution from the spectrophotometer was inputted into standard curve generated by from pure antibiotics to determine the antibiotics residue in the samples. the results were then compared with the value of sni number: 01-6366-2000 of year 2000. the data were analyzed descriptively and with a non linier regression analysis. the results revealed that the level of the zinc bacitracin residue decreased following the duration of the cessation of the zinc bacitracin antibiotic treatment. the antibiotic residue in the sample was smaller than that set in the standards (sni, 2000) so that the broiler products were safe for human consumption.
rewritten: broiler chickens have been genetically developed for rapid growth, and today, they are typically slaughtered at 29 days rather than 35 days of age. however, this rapid growth is often associated with immune deficiencies, which necessitates the use of feed additives such as antibiotics to promote growth and enhance the birds’ endurance. this study aimed to examine the residue levels of zinc bacitracin antibiotics in broiler thigh meat, breast meat, liver, and kidney, and to determine the necessary withdrawal period between discontinuing zinc bacitracin treatment and slaughter to eliminate or reduce these residues for safe human consumption. the research was carried out at sekolah tinggi penyuluhan pertanian (stpp) gowa using 29-day-old, unsexed broilers of the cobb sr 707 strain, sourced from a local poultry farm. the antibiotic-containing feed was stopped at intervals of 0, 3, 6, and 9 days before slaughter. for the dilution sensitivity test, staphylococcus aureus (105-108 colony ml⁻¹) was used, and the transmittance readings from the spectrophotometer were compared against a standard curve established from pure antibiotic samples to determine the amount of residue present. the results were then evaluated against the standards set by sni number: 01-6366-2000 (year 2000) using both descriptive methods and nonlinear regression analysis. the findings revealed that the zinc bacitracin residue levels decreased the longer the antibiotic treatment was stopped before slaughter. ultimately, the residue levels were below the standards specified by sni (2000), confirming that the broiler products are safe for human consumption.

raw: the formation of shrinkage porosity in a wedge-shaped a356 aluminum casting is observed in real-time using video radiography. from this observation, an image-processing technique is developed to quantify the through-thickness average porosity distribution in the casting as a function of time. the solidification and cooling of the casting are simulated in order to obtain the temperature and solid-fraction fields. it is found that once the wedge becomes isolated from the in-gate, surface sinks develop until the solid-fraction at the sinking location reaches approximately 45%. subsequently, internal porosity starts forming in the upper part of the wedge. this interdendritic porosity spreads over the region with the lowest solid-fraction and continually increases until the casting is fully solidified. the maximum porosity percentage is measured in the thermal center of the wedge. a computational model is proposed to predict the evolution of the porosity in the aluminum casting.
rewritten: shrinkage porosity in a wedge-shaped a356 aluminum casting is tracked in real time using video radiography. based on these observations, an image-processing method has been developed to measure the average porosity distribution through the casting’s thickness over time. the casting’s solidification and cooling processes are then simulated to produce temperature and solid-fraction fields. the results show that, once the wedge becomes separated from the in-gate, surface sinks form until the local solid fraction reaches about 45%. at that point, internal porosity begins to develop in the upper portion of the wedge. this interdendritic porosity expands over the area with the lowest solid fraction and continues to grow until the casting is completely solidified. the highest percentage of porosity is found at the thermal center of the wedge. finally, a computational model is proposed to predict how porosity evolves in the aluminum casting.

raw: much family law scholarship in recent years has been focused on the recognition of different types of family relationship. often, the rationale for the grant of rights and duties to new forms of relationship is said to be because the parties have shown commitment, or the same degree of commitment, as those in formal recognised unions, such as marriage. but there has been relatively little consideration of why or how commitment can provide an adequate rationale for the imposition of legal consequences, in particular, legal obligations, especially when such commitment may be lacking on the part of one of the parties, or comes to an end. this paper explores the meanings of obligation and commitment within the family and questions whether commitment provides a necessary or sufficient justification for the imposition of legal obligations in family relationships.
rewritten: in recent years, much family law scholarship has concentrated on acknowledging various types of family relationships. the argument for granting rights and duties to these new forms of relationships is often that the parties involved have demonstrated commitment—sometimes to the same extent as those in formally recognized unions like marriage. however, there has been relatively little discussion about why or how commitment can serve as a sufficient basis for imposing legal consequences, particularly legal obligations, especially when one party may lack commitment or when that commitment eventually ends. this paper examines what "obligation" and "commitment" mean within a family context and challenges whether commitment alone is a necessary or sufficient justification for imposing legal obligations in family relationships.

raw: metal oxide semiconductor (mos) photoelectrodes hold great promise for new energy and environmental applications, from water splitting to photoelectronic devices. here, we show an efficient polyoxometalate assistance strategy for the design and fabrication of mos composite photoelectrodes with light enhanced conductivity. four types of mos based photoelectrodes were fabricated by a simple wet chemistry method through bounding tio2, sno2, wo3, and zno with keplerate-type polyoxometalate (nh4)42[movi72mov60o372(ch3coo)30(h2o)72] ({mo132}), respectively. in these photoelectrodes, {mo132} may act as a photo-induced electron acceptor/donor to accelerate electron transfer and then improve their conductivity efficiently. we further demonstrated that the 5% {mo132}/tio2 modified photoanode, in dye-sensitized solar cells (dsscs), exhibits a power conversion efficiency (pce) of 7.94% (31% improvement compared with that of the tio2-based cell (6.06%)).
rewritten: metal oxide semiconductor (mos) photoelectrodes are highly promising for various new energy and environmental technologies, ranging from water splitting to photoelectronic devices. in this work, we introduce an effective strategy using polyoxometalate assistance to design and manufacture mos composite photoelectrodes with enhanced light-induced conductivity. by employing a straightforward wet chemistry technique, we fabricated four types of mos-based photoelectrodes by binding tio2, sno2, wo3, and zno with a keplerate-type polyoxometalate, specifically (nh4)42[movi72mov60o372(ch3coo)30(h2o)72] ({mo132}). in these photoelectrodes, the {mo132} component can function as a photo-induced electron acceptor/donor, thereby accelerating electron transfer and significantly improving conductivity. additionally, we demonstrated that a 5% {mo132}/tio2-modified photoanode in dye-sensitized solar cells (dsscs) achieves a power conversion efficiency (pce) of 7.94%, representing a 31% improvement over the tio2-based cell, which has a pce of 6.06%.

raw: spanish abstract: investigaciones sobre los pagos por servicios ambientales (psa) buscan incorporar el valor potencial de los servicios ecosistemicos, tales como los sumideros de carbono, la proteccion de fuentes hidricas y biodiversidad, que se encuentran inmersos en tierras rurales. en el marco de los objetivos de desarrollo sostenible, la comunidad cientifica en la amazonia tiene el reto de emprender investigaciones con sentido social para sensibilizar a los productores de sistemas productivos rurales sobre adopcion de tecnologias orientadas a incorporar los principios de sostenibilidad en el campo amazonico colombiano, dada la importancia economica y cultural para la region. se presentan avances de investigaciones sobre la estimacion del costo de oportunidad del uso del suelo con amplio potencial para el diseno de politica ambiental, estrategia para combatir el cambio climatico, caso concreto: identificacion de un valor para los psa, de conformidad con el decreto 0953 de 2013 y la ley 99 de 1993. english abstract: payment for environmental services (psa) research seeks to incorporate the potential value of ecosystems services such as carbon sinks, protection of water sources and biodiversity, immersed in rural land. in the context of sustainable development goals, the university community in the amazonia has challenged to undertake research with social sense to sensitize producers of rural production systems in the region, on adoption aimed at incorporating the principles of sustainability technologies in the colombian amazon area, given the economic and cultural importance for the region. advances in research on estimating the opportunity cost of land use in the amazon with great potential for the design of environmental policy, strategy to tackle climate change, concrete case: identification of a value for psa in accordance with decree 0953 of 2013 and law 99 of 1993, are presented.
rewritten: spanish abstract: las investigaciones sobre pagos por servicios ambientales (psa) se orientan a reconocer el valor potencial de servicios ecosistémicos—como los sumideros de carbono, la protección de fuentes hídricas y la preservación de la biodiversidad—presentes en zonas rurales. en el marco de los objetivos de desarrollo sostenible, la comunidad académica en la amazonia se enfrenta al desafío de realizar estudios con impacto social para concienciar a los productores rurales sobre la adopción de tecnologías que integren los principios de sostenibilidad en el territorio del amazonas colombiano, dada su relevancia económica y cultural para la región. se exponen avances en investigaciones dirigidas a estimar el costo de oportunidad del uso del suelo, con un notable potencial para el diseño de políticas ambientales y estrategias contra el cambio climático, a través de un caso concreto: la identificación de un valor para los psa conforme a lo establecido en el decreto 0953 de 2013 y la ley 99 de 1993. english abstract: research on payment for environmental services (pes) aims to account for the potential value of ecosystem services, such as carbon sinks, water source protection, and biodiversity preservation, found in rural lands. in line with the sustainable development goals, the academic community in the amazon faces the challenge of conducting socially meaningful research to raise awareness among rural producers about adopting technologies designed to integrate sustainability principles in the colombian amazon, recognizing the region's economic and cultural importance. the paper presents advances in research focused on estimating the opportunity cost of land use in the amazon—a study with substantial potential for shaping environmental policy and strategies to combat climate change—and features a concrete case: the identification of a value for pes in accordance with decree 0953 of 2013 and law 99 of 1993.

raw: the utility model discloses a positive cam opening mechanism of formula of driving directly, drive the cam gearing including connecting straightening on the heald frame, it is connected with the heald frame through the connecting rod directly to drive the cam gearing, the connecting rod includes first connecting rod and second connecting rod, first connecting rod one end with directly drive the cam gearing and be connected, one end is connected with second connecting rod front end in addition, the second connecting rod is terminal to be connected with the heald frame. in this way, positive cam opening mechanism of formula of driving directly, the transmission is simple reliable, the moving link is few, the transmission lightweight, reduce the friction of motion vice, reduce the friction loss, bring up to the speed of a motor vehicle that single cam opening device can't reach with the loom rotational speed simultaneously, improved the atress condition of cam piece, extension cam opening device's life can realize the high -speed opening of broad width loom.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a direct-drive positive cam opening mechanism that operates as follows. the cam gearing is driven by a connecting rod system mounted on the heald frame. this connecting rod system, which links the cam gearing directly to the heald frame, consists of a first connecting rod and a second connecting rod. one end of the first connecting rod is directly attached to the cam gearing, while its other end is connected to the front end of the second connecting rod. the terminal end of the second connecting rod is then secured to the heald frame. this configuration results in a directly driven positive cam opening mechanism with a simple, reliable transmission. it utilizes fewer moving links, reducing the overall weight of the transmission system. additionally, the design minimizes friction during motion, thereby decreasing friction loss. this allows the motor vehicle to achieve speeds that a traditional single cam opening device on the loom cannot match, even at the same loom rotation speed. consequently, the contact conditions for the cam piece are improved, extending the lifespan of the cam opening device and enabling high-speed operation on broad-width looms.

raw: background: isolated thrombocytopenia (it) refers to an entity of low platelet count without abnormalities of other lineages. previous studies revealed that the main cause of it in children without atypical features i.e. hepatosplenomegaly or adenopathy was immune thrombocytopenia (itp), while acute leukemia and aplastic anemia (aa) were other possible causes. however, there was no previous study in thailand to identify the cause of it. objective: to study the bone marrow aspiration (bma) result in thai children with it and to identify the cause of it in thai children. methods: this was a retrospective chart review of children younger than 15 years old with it who were diagnosed at siriraj hospital during january 1996 to december 2010. all patients had bma to identify the cause of thrombocytopenia. demographic data, clinical manifestation, laboratory results including bma finding, diagnosis and initial treatment were collected and analyzed. results: one hundred and twenty-nine patients were enrolled to the study. all patients had normal or increased megakaryocytes in their bone marrow, and none of them had more than 5% of blast cells. most patients (97.7%) were diagnosed as acute itp while 2.3% were diagnosed with neonatal alloimmune thrombocytopenia. none of the patients had acute leukemia or aa. conclusion: the bma result of most patients in this study was compatible to that of itp, that is none of the patients had acute leukemia or aa. the most common cause of it in thai children is acute itp. this result suggested that bma in children with it before starting treatment is not necessary.
rewritten: background: isolated thrombocytopenia (it) is characterized by a low platelet count without affecting other blood cell lines. previous research has shown that in children without unusual features such as an enlarged liver or spleen, or swollen lymph nodes, the most common cause is immune thrombocytopenia (itp), although acute leukemia and aplastic anemia (aa) can also be responsible. however, no research has been done in thailand to pinpoint the cause of it in this population. objective: to examine bone marrow aspiration (bma) results in thai children with it and determine its underlying cause. methods: this study is a retrospective review of patient charts for children under 15 years old diagnosed with it at siriraj hospital between january 1996 and december 2010. every patient underwent a bma to investigate the source of thrombocytopenia. data including demographic details, clinical symptoms, laboratory results (with bma findings), diagnoses, and initial treatments were collected and analyzed. results: a total of 129 patients were included in the study. all patients had either normal or increased megakaryocyte counts in their bone marrow, and none exhibited more than 5% blast cells. most patients (97.7%) were diagnosed with acute itp, while 2.3% were found to have neonatal alloimmune thrombocytopenia. none of the cases were found to be acute leukemia or aa. conclusion: the bma findings in this study were consistent with a diagnosis of itp, with no evidence of acute leukemia or aa. the most common cause of it among thai children appears to be acute itp, suggesting that performing a bma before starting treatment may be unnecessary.

raw: knowledge representation is a subarea of artificial intelligence concerned with using formal symbols to represent a set of facts within a knowledge domain. two popular knowledge representation languages, namely petri net and ontology, are promising knowledge sharing and reusing methods in knowledge engineering. the combination of petri net and ontology can facilitate achieving complementary advantages. currently, many efforts have been done on knowledge sharing between petri nets and ontologies. to investigate these issues and more importantly serve as identifying the direction of knowledge sharing between petri nets and ontologies, in this paper we give a comprehensive literature overview of knowledge sharing between petri net models and ontology models to satisfy the obvious need. in detail, we discuss the knowledge sharing from two aspects: the different knowledge representation approaches of ontology to represent and reason petri net and issues of constructing petri net from ontology. in addition, other important issues on applications and directions for future research are discussed in detail.
rewritten: knowledge representation, a branch of artificial intelligence, deals with the use of formal symbols to depict a set of facts within a specific domain. two well-known languages in this field—petri nets and ontologies—offer promising methods for sharing and reusing knowledge in knowledge engineering. combining these two approaches can yield complementary benefits. significant research has already been undertaken to enable knowledge sharing between petri nets and ontologies. to explore these topics and help direct future efforts in this area, this paper presents a comprehensive literature review on the exchange of knowledge between petri net models and ontology models. specifically, we address knowledge sharing from two angles: the various ways in which ontologies can be used to represent and reason about petri nets, and the challenges involved in constructing petri nets from ontologies. furthermore, we discuss additional important application issues and propose directions for future research.

raw: the invention relates to an idling start and stop system based on online algorithm optimization. the system comprises a central processing module (1), a power supply module (2), a data acquiring module (3), a communication module (4) and a driving module (5), and is characterized in that the central processing module (1) is responsible for acquiring signals of vehicle state parameters, exchanges data with the data acquiring module (3), the communication module (4) and the driving module (5) through a data bus, and analyzes switch signals and simulation signals of the vehicle state parameters based on an online algorithm to determine if a vehicle engine is located in a closing state or an opening state so as to send an instruction of controlling opening or closing of the engine to a esm starter module and an electromagnetic valve driving circuit module. before the idling start and stop system is operated, the idling start and stop are prejudged, so that the operation frequency of the system is reduced, and the control confusion of the idling start and stop system is reduced.
rewritten: the invention relates to an idling start and stop system that utilizes online algorithm optimization. the system includes a central processing module (1), a power supply module (2), a data acquisition module (3), a communication module (4), and a driving module (5). the central processing module (1) is tasked with obtaining vehicle state parameter signals and communicating data with the data acquisition module (3), communication module (4), and driving module (5) via a data bus. it analyzes switch signals and simulation signals of the vehicle state parameters using an online algorithm to determine whether the engine is in a shutdown or startup state. based on this analysis, it sends a command to control the activation or deactivation of the engine to the esm starter module and an electromagnetic valve driving circuit module. prior to the system's operation, a preliminary judgment is made regarding the idling start and stop process, which reduces the system's operating frequency and minimizes control confusion.

raw: the invention discloses a glycerinum-carboxymethylcellulose compound hydrogen peroxide bleaching stabilizer and an application thereof. the compound hydrogen peroxide bleaching stabilizer is prepared from the following components in parts by weight, 1-1.5 parts of glycerinum, 0.1-2 parts of carboxymethylcellulose, 2-2.7 parts of soluble starch and 10-14 parts of water. a preparation method of the compound hydrogen peroxide bleaching stabilizer includes the steps: mixing the water with the glycerinum and heating the water and the glycerinum to 100 deg c; adding the soluble starch into mixed boiling solution and uniformly stirring the solution; slowly dripping carboxymethylcellulose solution and then performing low-temperature standing. the compound hydrogen peroxide bleaching stabilizer is applied to the bleaching process of linen rove and a fabric thereof. the hydrogen peroxide bleaching stabilizer has the function of efficiently stabilizing hydrogen peroxide, is low in fiber material damage, high in heat resistance, alkali resistance and oxidation resistance, easy to use, good in compatibility with other auxiliaries, low in cost and ideal, and reduces environmental pollution.
rewritten: this invention discloses a glycerin–carboxymethylcellulose composite hydrogen peroxide bleaching stabilizer and its use. the stabilizer is formulated from the following components (by parts weight): 1–1.5 parts glycerin, 0.1–2 parts carboxymethylcellulose, 2–2.7 parts soluble starch, and 10–14 parts water. the preparation method involves these steps: mix the water and glycerin and heat the mixture to 100°c; add the soluble starch into the boiling solution while stirring uniformly; then slowly add the carboxymethylcellulose solution and allow the mixture to stand at a low temperature. this compound stabilizer is applied during the bleaching process of linen rove and its corresponding fabric. it efficiently stabilizes hydrogen peroxide while inflicting minimal damage on fibers. additionally, it demonstrates high resistance to heat, alkali, and oxidation, is user-friendly, compatible with other auxiliaries, cost-effective, and environmentally friendly.

raw: this paper models a futuristic vision towards developing an ultra sapient inference engine (usie) in computer science. humans are considered as the most sapient living creatures on earth and have been named homo-sapiens scientifically. bayesian models have been considered naturally appealing for quantifying relevance in intelligent inference along with the usage of probability theory & its main streams [1]. we shall also draw our paper from various fields in artificial intelligence, perspicacious learning systems, neural networks, expert system and management science as primal tools to develop usie. humans have a limited amount of attention to pay while inferring a solution collectively. it takes decades by scientists to diagnose & come up with epistemological solution for a scientific mystery. however if we are able to automate intelligent inference, it is ought to save considerable amount of time along with accurate results. we can say that cognitive style of humans will be morphed in this engine, with a difference that computers don't make mistakes until told to. the greatest challenge is to diagnose selection of rulings to be used during a collective inference and apply versatile decision process. the main contribution of this paper is towards developing a technical vision for usie.
rewritten: this paper presents a visionary approach to creating an ultra sapient inference engine (usie) within computer science. humans, recognized as the most intelligent beings on earth and scientifically designated as homo sapiens, serve as the model for this undertaking. bayesian models are particularly appealing for measuring relevance in intelligent inference, a process strongly supported by probability theory and its primary frameworks [1]. additionally, insights drawn from various disciplines—including artificial intelligence, advanced learning systems, neural networks, expert systems, and management science—provide essential tools for developing usie. human attention is inherently limited when it comes to collectively deriving solutions, and scientists may spend decades diagnosing and formulating epistemological explanations for complex scientific puzzles. by automating intelligent inference, however, we could significantly reduce the time required to achieve accurate results. this engine aims to mimic the human cognitive style while benefiting from the reliability of computers, which do not err unless programmed to do so. the primary challenge lies in determining the appropriate rules for collective inference and executing a versatile decision-making process. ultimately, the main contribution of this paper is the establishment of a technical vision for usie.

raw: an apparatus, system and method of controlling one or more electric submersible pumps (esps) based on demand response to an electrical power grid. the esps may either be turned off, or operated at a slower speed to allow for an operator of an electrical power grid to shed load during peak times without impacting other assets on the electrical power grid.
rewritten: a system, apparatus, and method for controlling one or more electric submersible pumps (esps) in response to an electrical power grid's demand. the esps can either be turned off entirely or run at a reduced speed, allowing a power grid operator to shed load during peak times without negatively affecting other assets on the grid.

raw: the invention discloses a remote detection device of household water treatment equipment, belongs to the technical field of household water treatment and exactly relates to a remote detection device which is used for the household water treatment equipment and adopts a remote detection technology to monitor the water consumption of the water treatment equipment of a user in real time. the remote detection device is characterized in that a water flow detection device is a tubular sensor connected in series to a water pipe, and an intelligent water flow meter is connected to the sensor; the intelligent water flow meter is a wireless communication device provided with transmission information, and the wireless communication device with a gprs signal is connected with a background detection center cloud platform; the tubular sensor is mounted on a pipeline of the household water treatment equipment according to detection demands. the remote detection device has the positive effects as follows: with the adoption of a remote detection technology, the flow meter is mounted in the water outlet position, the sensor with capacity of wireless transmission is mounted, acquired detection information is reported to the detection center in real time by the aid of a gprs service provided by a mobile operator, the water consumption condition of each home can be detected in real time, the user can be timely reminded of replacement of consumable materials, and the quality of life of the user is greatly improved.
rewritten: the invention relates to a remote detection device designed for household water treatment equipment, addressing the field of in-home water processing. specifically, it involves a system that employs remote detection technology to monitor the water usage of a user’s water treatment device in real time. the device features a water flow detection component that uses a tubular sensor installed in series along a water pipe, which is connected to an intelligent water flow meter. this intelligent meter serves as a wireless communication device capable of transmitting data, and it connects via a gprs signal to a cloud-based background detection center. the tubular sensor is installed on the water system of the household water treatment setup based on specific detection requirements. this remote detection device offers several advantages. by utilizing remote detection techniques, the flow meter installed at the water outlet transmits sensor data in real time to the detection center through a gprs service provided by a mobile operator. this allows for immediate monitoring of water consumption in each home, timely notifications for replacing consumable parts, and ultimately leads to a significant improvement in the user's quality of life.

rewritten: v. s. naipaul has often been described in seemingly contradictory ways—praised as "the finest living novelist writing in english" by some, yet condemned as a "despicable lackey of neo-colonialism and imperialism" by others. in a recent exchange in the new york times book review with irving howe, michael thelwell dubbed naipaul a "literary gunga din." although howe is not one to be easily intimidated, his own commendation of naipaul's contentious african novel, a bend in the river, appeared to expose a vulnerability. while he reproved thelwell for missing the book’s virtues, he remarked, "i didn't... discuss the politics of v. s. naipaul with which i might well disagree." naipaul’s political views disturb even his admirers; they unsettle serious critics like irving howe, who feel compelled to distinguish art from politics—a challenging endeavor for someone who writes about both. combining remarkable talent with abrasive political views and a sensitive insight with what some see as a lack of respect for indigenous cultures, naipaul has earned a well-deserved reputation as a master of english prose—a spare, precise stylist known for cool observation, accurate reporting, and the dramatization of complex ideas. with measured praise, the editors of the new york times recently described him as "perhaps the most talented novelist alive." but how should one interpret naipaul's politics? he contends that it is a form of romanticism to "civilize africans simply by denying that they are primitive... to civilize africa (if that must be attempted—the issue is debatable), you have to recognize the primitive and try to eradicate it." so, what did he mean in an offhand comment to elizabeth hardwick when he stated, "africa has no future"? these asides are puzzling, especially since naipaul appears well-equipped to understand the third world. born into a hindu family in trinidad, educated at oxford, and having traveled extensively throughout africa, asia, india, south america, and the west indies, he brings a unique perspective to these issues.

raw: problem to be solved: to provide a thermionic element capable of converting light energy to heat energy and electrical energy, and a thermal power generation system using the same.solution: a thermoelectric element 10 includes a thermoelectric member 12 which is made of a thermoelectric material and has a through-hole, a pipe 14 which is inserted in the through-hole to distribute fluid, and a soaking member 16 provided to the side surface of the thermoelectric member 12. each of the pipe 14 and the soaking member 16 also serve as an electrode of the thermoelectric member 12. the surface of the soaking member 16 has a blackening surface 18 and a mirror surface 20. a thermal power generation system 30 includes a container 40 having a lighting window 42, a thermoelectric element 10 accommodated in the container 40, fluid supply means for supplying fluid to the pipe 14, and power consuming means for consuming power generated by the thermoelectric element 10. the thermoelectric element 10 is accommodated in the container 40 so that the blackened surface 18 is located under the lighting window 42.selected drawing: figure 1
rewritten: objective: provide a thermionic element that converts light energy into heat and electrical energy, along with a thermal power generation system that utilizes this element. solution: the thermoelectric element (10) comprises a thermoelectric member (12) made of a thermoelectric material that features a through-hole. a pipe (14) is inserted into this through-hole to distribute fluid, and a soaking member (16) is attached to the side of the thermoelectric member (12). both the pipe (14) and the soaking member (16) serve as electrodes for the thermoelectric member (12). notably, the surface of the soaking member (16) is split into a blackened surface (18) and a mirror surface (20). the thermal power generation system (30) includes a container (40) equipped with a lighting window (42), within which the thermoelectric element (10) is housed. additionally, the system incorporates means to supply fluid to the pipe (14) and mechanisms to consume the power generated by the thermoelectric element (10). the thermoelectric element (10) is positioned within the container (40) so that its blackened surface (18) is situated directly below the lighting window (42). reference drawing: figure 1.

raw: we present a novel memory-efficient parallel ray casting algorithm for unstructured grid volume rendering on multi-core cpus. our method is based on the bunyk ray casting algorithm. to solve the high memory overhead problem of the bunyk algorithm, we allocate a fixed size local buffer for each thread and the local buffers contain information of recently visited faces. the stored information is used by other rays or replaced by other face's information. to improve the utilization of local buffers, we propose an image-plane based ray grouping algorithm that makes ray groups have high coherency. the ray groups are then distributed to computing threads and each thread processes the given groups independently. we also propose a novel hash function that uses the index of faces as keys for calculating the buffer index each face will use to store the information. to see the benefits of our method, we applied it to three unstructured grid datasets with different sizes and measured the performance. we found that our method requires just 6% of the memory space compared with the bunyk algorithm for storing face information. also it shows compatible performance with the bunyk algorithm even though it uses less memory. in addition, our method achieves up to 22% higher performance for a large-scale unstructured grid dataset with less memory than bunyk algorithm. these results show the robustness and efficiency of our method and it demonstrates that our method is suitable to volume rendering for a large-scale unstructured grid dataset.
rewritten: we introduce a new memory-efficient parallel ray casting algorithm for rendering volumes on unstructured grids using multi-core cpus. our approach builds on the bunyk ray casting algorithm and addresses its high memory overhead by assigning each thread a fixed-size local buffer that stores data about recently encountered faces. this stored data can be reused by other rays or updated with information from different faces. to maximize the efficiency of these local buffers, we developed an image-plane-based ray grouping strategy that clusters rays with high coherence. these coherent groups are then distributed among computing threads, allowing each thread to process its allocated groups independently. additionally, we propose a novel hash function that leverages face indices as keys to determine the corresponding buffer index for storing face data. we evaluated our method on three unstructured grid datasets of varying sizes, and the results demonstrate that our approach uses only 6% of the memory required by the bunyk algorithm for storing face information, while maintaining comparable performance. moreover, for a large-scale unstructured grid dataset, our method achieved up to a 22% performance improvement with reduced memory usage compared to the bunyk algorithm. these findings highlight the robustness and efficiency of our method, indicating its suitability for volume rendering on large-scale unstructured grid datasets.

raw: microblogging sites, such as sina weibo and twitter, have gained significantly in popularity and become an important source for real-time information dissemination. inevitably, these services are also used to spread false rumors and misinformation, usually with the unintentional collaboration from innocent users. previous studies show that microblog information credibility can be assessed automatically based on the features extracted from message contents and users. in this paper, we address this problem from a new perspective by exploring the human input in the propagation process of popular microblog posts. specifically, we consider that the users are the gatekeepers of their own media portal on microblogging sites, as they decide which information is filtered for dissemination to their followers. we find that truthful posts and false rumors exhibit distinguishable patterns in terms of which gatekeepers forward them and what the gatekeepers comment on them. based on this finding, we propose to assess the information credibility of popular microblog posts with hidden markov models (hmms) of gatekeeping behavior. the proposed approach is evaluated using a real life data set that consists of over ten thousand popular posts collected from sina weibo.
rewritten: microblogging platforms like sina weibo and twitter have become increasingly popular and now serve as a key channel for the real-time spread of information. however, these platforms are also exploited to circulate false rumors and misinformation, often with unwitting participation from ordinary users. prior research indicates that it is possible to automatically evaluate the credibility of microblog content by analyzing features from both the messages themselves and the involved users. in this work, we approach the problem from a novel angle by examining the role of human interactions in the dissemination of widely shared microblog posts. specifically, we propose that users act as gatekeepers on their personal media portals, choosing which pieces of information to pass along to their followers. our findings reveal that truthful posts and false rumors follow distinct patterns regarding which gatekeepers share them and how these gatekeepers comment on them. building on this observation, we introduce a method for assessing the credibility of popular microblog posts using hidden markov models (hmms) that capture gatekeeping behavior. we validate our approach with a real-world dataset containing over ten thousand popular posts from sina weibo.
