raw: the present invention relates to a lighting apparatus (200) having an electrical insulation structure of a dimmer and a driver, the apparatus including: an input power supply unit (210); a converter (211) for converting input power into lighting unit supply power; a lighting unit (220) applied with the lighting unit supply power to emit light; a dimmer (240) for inputting a dimming signal for controlling the lighting unit (220); a pwm generation unit (260) for receiving the dimming signal and generating a pwm signal; and a pwm control unit (212) for controlling the lighting unit supply power according to the pwm signal, in which the input power supply unit (210), the converter (211), the lighting unit(220) and the pwm control unit are connected to a first ground (251), the dimmer (240) and the pwm generation unit (260) are connected to a second ground (252), and the first ground (251) is electrically separated from the second ground (252).
rewritten: the invention relates to a lighting apparatus (200) that includes an electrical insulation structure between a dimmer and a driver. this apparatus comprises: an input power supply unit (210); a converter (211) that transforms the input power into a supply voltage for the lighting unit; a lighting unit (220) that emits light when powered by this supply voltage; a dimmer (240) for inputting a dimming signal that controls the lighting unit; a pwm generation unit (260) that receives the dimming signal and produces a pwm signal; and a pwm control unit (212) that regulates the lighting unit’s supply voltage according to the pwm signal. in this configuration, the input power supply unit (210), the converter (211), the lighting unit (220), and the pwm control unit (212) are connected to a first ground (251), while the dimmer (240) and the pwm generation unit (260) are connected to a second ground (252), with the first ground (251) being electrically isolated from the second ground (252).

raw: objective in the treatment of pilonidal sinus disease different approaches are used such as conservative treatment and fasciocutaneous rotation flap. the aim of this study was to evaluate the efficacy of "de-epithelialization technique" as a new approach in pilonidal sinus disease treatment. material and methods forty pilonidal sinus disease patients treated with de-epithelialization method were evaluated retrospectively. patient age, gender, body mass index, wound healing time, visual analog scale scores, operation times, hospital stay duration, drain removal time, cosmetic satisfaction rates, complications, and recurrence rates were evaluated. results the numbers of male and female patients in this study were 39 and 1, respectively. the median age of the patients was 25 years and the mean bmi was 26.6. the mean operating time was 43 min, and all patients were discharged 5 h after the operation. wound healing time varied from 10 to 20 days. median follow-up period was 9 months (4-17 months). one patient with high body mass index suffered from partial wound separation. no other complications such as infections and fluid collections (hematoma and seromas) were observed. maximum cosmetic satisfaction rate was 90% (n=36), and no patient had a recurrence during the follow-up period. conclusion "de-epithelialization" may be considered as a complementary and/or alternative approach to other surgical techniques such as primary closure, rhomboid excision, and limberg flap in the treatment of pilonidal sinus disease, with acceptable cosmesis and recurrence rates.
rewritten: objective: in treating pilonidal sinus disease, various approaches—including conservative management and fasciocutaneous rotation flaps—are employed. this study aimed to assess the effectiveness of the novel "de-epithelialization technique" in managing pilonidal sinus disease. materials and methods: a retrospective evaluation was conducted on 40 patients with pilonidal sinus disease treated using the de-epithelialization method. the study examined patient age, gender, body mass index (bmi), wound healing time, visual analog scale scores, operation duration, hospital stay, drain removal time, cosmetic satisfaction, complications, and recurrence rates. results: the study included 39 male and 1 female patient, with a median age of 25 years and an average bmi of 26.6. the mean operation time was 43 minutes, and all patients were discharged approximately 5 hours post-operation. wound healing occurred within 10 to 20 days, and the median follow-up period was 9 months (ranging from 4 to 17 months). only one patient with a high bmi experienced partial wound separation, while no other complications—such as infections or fluid collections (hematoma or seromas)—were observed. cosmetic satisfaction was high, with a maximum rate of 90% (36 patients), and no recurrences were noted during the follow-up period. conclusion: the "de-epithelialization" technique may serve as a valuable complementary or alternative option to other surgical methods, such as primary closure, rhomboid excision, and the limberg flap, for treating pilonidal sinus disease, offering acceptable cosmetic outcomes and low recurrence rates.

raw: the invention discloses a making method of preserved seasoning radish, and belongs to the field of food processing. the making method is characterized in that the formula comprising 30 kg of radish, 600 g of spiced salt, 200 g of five spice powder, 100 g of soybean sauce, 50 g of rice vinegar, 80 g of cooking wine, 150 g of black sesame oil, 100 g of egg white, 50 g of red pepper, 20 g of zanthoxylum oil and 70 g of aginomoto is adopted, and the method comprises the processing technological processes of radish selecting, cleaning and peeling, soaking, shredding, stewing, packaging and sterilization. the method comprises the advantages that the preserved seasoning radish is crisp and tender, complete in color, aroma and taste, appetizing and tasty, and has the crisp and tender flavor of the radish; the preserved seasoning radish has rich various nutrient substances such as vitamin c, protein and amylase, can improve the appetite, help digestion, facilitate metabolism of the human body and enhance the human immunity function, has the effects of lowering blood fat, softening blood vessels, stabilizing blood pressure and resisting and preventing cancer, and is convenient to eat and suitable for people of all ages.
rewritten: the invention relates to a method for preparing preserved seasoned radish within the field of food processing. the process employs a formula that includes 30 kg of radish, 600 g of spiced salt, 200 g of five-spice powder, 100 g of soybean sauce, 50 g of rice vinegar, 80 g of cooking wine, 150 g of black sesame oil, 100 g of egg white, 50 g of red pepper, 20 g of zanthoxylum oil, and 70 g of aginomoto. the preparation steps involve selecting, cleaning, and peeling the radish, followed by soaking, shredding, stewing, packaging, and sterilizing. the method offers several benefits: the seasoned radish remains crisp and tender with a complete color, aroma, and taste, making it both appetizing and delicious while retaining the natural crunch of the radish. additionally, it contains a rich array of nutrients—such as vitamin c, protein, and amylase—that help improve appetite, aid digestion, facilitate metabolism, and boost immunity. it also offers health benefits including lowering blood fat, softening blood vessels, stabilizing blood pressure, and potentially preventing cancer, making it a convenient food choice suitable for all ages.

raw: the utility model discloses a 360 air -cooled refrigerator wind channel structure of air -out, its body is for setting up the wind channel casing on refrigerator storeroom room, the inside of wind channel casing is hollow structure, forms the wind channel in the hollow structure of wind channel casing, be provided with a wind channel air intake and plurality of air channels air outlet on the casing of wind channel. the utility model discloses the structure outward appearance is brief, the manufacturing is convenient, excellent performance, and air conditioning is gone into from wind channel air inlet to follow wind channel air outlet evenly blows off with 360 air -out form, ensured that air conditioning in the indoor abundant circulation of storeroom, makes the incasement temperature even, and the wind channel air outlet of evenly arranging has been avoided blockking up the wind channel efficiency decline that the air outlet leads to because of food, has guaranteed the normal transport of air conditioning, has improved the efficiency of system, has reduced the refrigerator consumption.
rewritten: the utility model presents a 360° air-cooled refrigerator wind channel structure featuring an air outlet design. its main unit, which is installed in the refrigerator’s storage compartment, includes a wind channel casing with a hollow interior forming the wind channel. this casing is equipped with an air intake for the wind channel and multiple air outlets. the design boasts a simple external appearance and is easy to manufacture while delivering excellent performance. air from the air conditioner enters through the wind channel’s air intake and is evenly expelled through the 360° air outlets. this arrangement ensures efficient circulation of conditioned air within the storage space, leading to a uniform temperature inside the casing. additionally, by evenly spacing the air outlets, the model minimizes the risk of blockages caused by food obstructing a single outlet, thereby maintaining optimal airflow, enhancing system efficiency, and reducing the refrigerator’s energy consumption.

raw: introduction. efficiency of cash flows analysis has not lost its relevance in the current economic conditions. the interpretation of the results, development of financial management forecasts , and identification of causal relationships depend on its adequacy, quality and branching . therefore qualitative research of advantages and disadvantages of cash flows analysis is one of the possible ways of problem solving and achieve ment of planned results. goal. the article aims to identify areas of improvement of the scientific and methodological study , to analyz e cash flow of businesses takinf into consideration specific form s of disadvantages of such analysis. the method (methodology). in this research we have used such general scientific methods of knowledge as method of abstraction, method of analysis, method of synthesis, method of grouping, method of comparison, method of generalization, method of ystematization. results. the paper has identified the source of generation of shortcomings of cash flow analysis on the basis of functionally oriented approach. t ypical groups of disadvantages of this direction of analysis on the basis of three copyright systems of their classification are determined . directions of methodological support improv ement of cash flows analysis are worked out .
rewritten: introduction. in today's economic environment, the efficiency of cash flow analysis remains highly relevant. the interpretation of its results, the development of financial management forecasts, and the identification of causal relationships all hinge upon the adequacy, quality, and scope of the analysis. consequently, a qualitative study that examines the advantages and disadvantages of cash flow analysis represents one potential solution for addressing challenges and achieving planned outcomes. goal. this article aims to pinpoint areas for enhancing the scientific and methodological research and to analyze business cash flows while taking into account the specific disadvantages intrinsic to this type of analysis. methodology. the research employs a range of general scientific methods, including abstraction, analysis, synthesis, grouping, comparison, generalization, and systematization. results. the study identifies the origins of the shortcomings in cash flow analysis using a functionally oriented approach. it establishes typical groups of disadvantages based on three classification systems and outlines directions for improving the methodological support of cash flow analysis.

raw: the invention relates to a planting method of baby bok choy. the planting method comprises the following steps: (1) selecting full baby bok choy seeds, and performing soaking and cold storage treatments; (2) rinsing the seeds treated in the step (1) clean by using clear water, and then soaking the seeds in an ammonium hydrogen carbonate solution; (3) baking the seeds until the water content is 60-62%, culturing the seeds for 3 days at 22-25 deg c, wherein in the process of culturing, absorbent cotton and a culture solution are placed in a culture dish, the thickness of the absorbent cotton is 3-5mm, the dosage of the culture solution is based on the fact that the absorbent cotton is completely soaked, and the seeds are placed on the absorbent cotton with 2 seeds for each square centimeter; (4), performing field planting on the seeds treated in the step (3) with the depth in soil of 2-3 cm, and watering the seeds after planting for 2 days; and (5), performing weeding and insect prevention operations after budding of the seeds. the planting method provided by the invention can promote the germination rate of the baby bok choy and shorten the time required by germination.
rewritten: this invention discloses a method for planting baby bok choy that includes the following steps: 1. selecting high-quality baby bok choy seeds and subjecting them to soaking and cold storage. 2. rinsing the pretreated seeds with clear water, then soaking them in an ammonium hydrogen carbonate solution. 3. baking the seeds until their moisture content reaches 60-62%, then culturing them for 3 days at a temperature between 22-25°c. during this culturing phase, a culture dish is prepared with 3-5 mm thick absorbent cotton that is fully saturated with a culture solution, and the seeds are spread on the cotton at a density of 2 seeds per square centimeter. 4. planting the cultured seeds in the field at a soil depth of 2-3 cm and watering them for 2 days after planting. 5. carrying out weeding and pest control once the seedlings have begun to bud. this planting method is designed to improve the germination rate of baby bok choy and reduce the time required for germination.

raw: historically, governments have adopted legalized, integrated, and global rules to govern oligopolistic industries, such as shipping, chemicals, and industrial production. by contrast, they have adopted nonbinding and unintegrated rules and institutions to govern competitive industries, such as energy, agriculture, and mining, at the national or subnational scale. considering that competitive producers face greater barriers to political collective action, what explains the form of global governance across these sectors? this article demonstrates that oligopolistic producers are more intensively and extensively regulated than competitive markets because producers in oligopolistic industries can more cost-effectively alter markets to meet environmental goals. therefore, despite their political influence, oligopolies are regularly called upon to initiate and sustain market transformation on a global scale. new qualitative evidence from two treaty regimes governing different types of markets supports this theo...
rewritten: historically, governments have implemented legalized, integrated, and global rules to regulate oligopolistic sectors like shipping, chemicals, and industrial production. in contrast, competitive industries such as energy, agriculture, and mining have been governed by nonbinding, less coordinated rules primarily enforced at national or subnational levels. given that producers in competitive industries face higher obstacles to political collective action, what accounts for the differing approaches to global governance in these sectors? this article argues that oligopolistic producers are subject to more intensive and widespread regulation than competitors because these industries can adjust market conditions more cost-effectively to meet environmental objectives. consequently, despite their considerable political clout, oligopolies are frequently expected to drive and sustain market transformation on an international scale. new qualitative evidence from two treaty regimes overseeing distinct market types further substantiates this argument.

raw: in this article the results of research of the actual problem of information quality improvement in the public reporting of manufacturing enterprises are provided. authors offer the approach to analysis of disclosure of information on ecological activity in the manufacturing enterprises reporting considering a number of factors. as a result of practical realization of author's approach the assessment of disclosure of information on corporate social responsibility is carried out, and also the key characteristics of public reporting which provide a sustainable development of manufacturing enterprises are determined.
rewritten: this article presents research findings that address the pressing challenge of enhancing the quality of information in the public reporting of manufacturing enterprises. the authors introduce a method for analyzing how these enterprises disclose information about their ecological activities, taking into account several factors. by practically applying this method, they assess the extent of disclosure regarding corporate social responsibility and identify key features of public reporting that contribute to the sustainable development of manufacturing companies.

raw: time-delay feed-forward artificial neural networks are examined for gasoline engine cylinder pressure reconstruction using both measured crank kinematics obtained from a shaft encoder, and measured engine cylinder block vibrations obtained from a production knock sensor. initially, the study focuses on the information content associated with measured data, which is considered to be of equal importance to the particular network architecture and the training methodology. several hypotheses are constructed, which when tested, reveal the influence of the data information content on the reconstruction potential and limitations. these hypotheses are tested on real data from a 3-cylinder (disi) engine. three distinct ideas emerge through this testing process, which are combined to produce a single pressure reconstruction methodology. reconstruction results obtained via this methodology, applied to crank kinematics associated with steady-state engine operation, show a marked improvement over previously published reconstruction accuracy. moreover, in steady-state engine operation, the application of this methodology to acceleration measurements of cylinder block vibration, obtained from a knock sensor, show very significant improvements over previous attempts. but the direct application of this same reconstruction methodology to transient engine operation, proves to be problematic. however, a novel generalisation of the approach in the form of a time-dependent feed-forward neural network is proposed and the required adaptation made to the use of the levenberg-marquardt training algorithm. this time-dependent approach has been tested under limited transient conditions and shown in the thesis to give good results, therefore offering considerable potential for use with real engine operation. overall, the thesis shows that by careful processing of measured engine data, standard neural network architectures and standard training algorithms can be used to reconstruct engine cylinder pressure.
rewritten: this study investigates the use of time-delay feed-forward artificial neural networks to reconstruct gasoline engine cylinder pressure. two types of measured data are employed: crank kinematics recorded from a shaft encoder, and engine cylinder block vibrations recorded from a production knock sensor. the research initially emphasizes the significance of the information content contained in these measurements, suggesting that it is just as crucial as the network structure and training procedure. several hypotheses are developed and, upon testing with data from a 3-cylinder (disi) engine, shed light on how the quality of the data influences the accuracy and constraints of the pressure reconstruction process. based on the insights gained through these tests, three distinct concepts emerge and are subsequently merged into a unified pressure reconstruction approach. when applied to crank kinematics data under steady-state engine operation, this method demonstrates a significant improvement over previously published reconstruction accuracy. additionally, using the same methodology with cylinder block vibration measurements (acceleration data) obtained from a knock sensor under steady-state conditions yields substantially better results than earlier attempts. however, directly applying this reconstruction method to transient engine operation proves challenging. to address this issue, the research proposes a novel extension—a time-dependent feed-forward neural network—and adapts the levenberg-marquardt training algorithm accordingly. although tested under limited transient conditions, this time-dependent approach shows promising results, indicating substantial potential for application in real engine operation. overall, the thesis concludes that with careful processing of engine measurements, standard neural network architectures and training methods can effectively reconstruct engine cylinder pressure.

raw: the utility model belongs to the sewage treatment field, a cod stabilizes discharge to reach standard device, including controller, a discharging pool and the 2nd discharging pool, a discharging pool and the 2nd discharging pool are parallelly connected to be set up, a discharging pool's the end of intaking is provided with an automatic control actuating mechanism, a discharging pool goes out the water end (w. e. ) and is provided with the 2nd automatic control actuating mechanism, the 2nd discharging pool's the end of intaking is provided with the 3rd automatic control actuating mechanism, the 2nd discharging pool goes out the water end (w. e. ) and is provided with fourth automatic control actuating mechanism, all be provided with cod detector and level gauge in a discharging pool and the 2nd discharging pool, cod detector and level gauge all with controller signal connects, and the controller is used for control first, second, third and fourth automatic control actuating mechanism open and close. two discharging pool cooperations realize that the drainage pond intakes in succession, satisfies the requirement of front end treatment process, go out water intermittent type, guarantee cod check -out time, realize that cod stabilizes discharge to reach standard.
rewritten: this utility model relates to the field of sewage treatment and discloses a device for ensuring that cod discharge meets the required standards. the device comprises a controller, a first discharging pool, and a second discharging pool, which are arranged in parallel. an automatic control actuating mechanism is installed at the inlet of the first discharging pool, while a second automatic control mechanism is placed at its water outlet. similarly, the second discharging pool is equipped with a third automatic control mechanism at its inlet and a fourth automatic control mechanism at its water outlet. both discharging pools include a cod detector and a level gauge, each connected to the controller. the controller is responsible for opening and closing all four automatic control actuating mechanisms. by working in tandem, the two discharging pools allow the drainage pond to feed water successively, meeting the requirements of the preliminary treatment process, releasing water intermittently to provide sufficient time for cod detection, and ultimately ensuring that the cod discharge complies with the established standards.

raw: while a large number of young consumers in india frequently shop on the internet, trust is one of the important factors which put them in dilemma. this study examines that how the trust can be built by the independent variables such as system quality, information quality, service quality and vendor & channel characteristics on the internet shopping. a structured and self-administered survey (wang and emurian, 2005; wild et al., 2004) was used to collect data from the young shoppers, basically the students who are doing under graduation and post graduation. totally 216 young shoppers were responded in the online survey (quesitonpro.com). confirmatory factor analysis was used to assess the research constructs, validity and reliability. structural equation model (sem) was also used to test the proposed research model.
rewritten: in india, a significant number of young consumers frequently shop online; however, trust remains a key factor that often leaves them hesitant. this study investigates how trust in online shopping can be developed through various independent factors, including system quality, information quality, service quality, and characteristics of vendors and channels. data were collected using a structured, self-administered survey adapted from methodologies by wang and emurian (2005) and wild et al. (2004), targeting primarily undergraduate and postgraduate students. a total of 216 young shoppers participated in the online survey conducted via questionpro.com. the research constructs, along with their validity and reliability, were evaluated using confirmatory factor analysis, while a structural equation model (sem) was employed to test the proposed research framework.

raw: a polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer is provided. the polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer is formed by copolymerization of the following two parts: a selectively oxidized polysaccharide with 2,3-dialdehydo, and a polyamine with an amino functional group; the polyamine with an amino functional group and the selectively oxidized polysaccharide with 2,3-dialdehydo can form a net structure by means of covalent crosslinking, resulting in a hydrogel with an amino functional group or a granular polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer, wherein the amino functional group in the hydrogel with an amino functional group or the granular polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer can be protonated so as to form a cationic copolymer of a three-dimensional network structure having a protonated site, and the nitrogen content of the cationic copolymer and the nitrogen content of the polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer are above 12.3 wt%, or above 15 wt%, or above 22 wt%, or above 40 wt%, and both the cationic copolymer and the polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer are water-insoluble.
rewritten: a polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer is provided, which is produced by the copolymerization of two key components: (1) a selectively oxidized polysaccharide featuring a 2,3-dialdehyde structure, and (2) a polyamine containing an amino functional group. the covalent crosslinking between the amino groups of the polyamine and the 2,3-dialdehyde groups of the oxidized polysaccharide results in the formation of a network structure. this network can exist as either a hydrogel with available amino groups or as a granular form of the polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer. in both cases, the amino functional groups can be protonated to form a cationic copolymer with a three-dimensional network that includes protonated sites. moreover, the nitrogen content in both the cationic copolymer and the original polysaccharide-polyamine copolymer is greater than 12.3 wt%, and in certain examples can exceed 15 wt%, 22 wt%, or even 40 wt%, while both materials remain water-insoluble.

raw: the invention relates to an aerated concrete block masonry mortar and a production method thereof. the aerated concrete block masonry mortar is characterized by including: by weight, 65-80 parts of aggregate, 10-15 parts of 42.5 portland cement, 10-15 parts of fly ash, 0.1-0.3 part of lightening agent, 2-3 parts of redispersible emulsion powder, 0.5-2 parts of cellulose ether, and 1-2 parts of super lubricating agent. the masonry mortar has simple usage and convenient construction, is energy-saving and environmentally friendly, and has good cohesiveness and water-retaining property. the mortar is smooth, is easy to pave, and has high self-strength after hardening. the adhesion gaps between aerated concrete blocks become small by using thin-layer masonry, the weight of the wall becomes light, the overall heat-insulating property is better than that of the thick-layer masonry mortar, the cold bridge is reduced, the overall thermal conductivity of the wall is uniform, and the cracking phenomenon formed by non uniform stress in local basal plane mortar is reduced.
rewritten: the invention discloses an aerated concrete block masonry mortar along with its production method. this mortar comprises, by weight: 65–80 parts aggregate, 10–15 parts of 42.5 portland cement, 10–15 parts fly ash, 0.1–0.3 part lightening agent, 2–3 parts redispersible emulsion powder, 0.5–2 parts cellulose ether, and 1–2 parts super lubricating agent. the masonry mortar is simple to use and easy to construct, while also being energy-efficient and environmentally friendly. it exhibits excellent cohesiveness and water-retention properties, has a smooth texture, and is easy to apply with high self-strength after curing. when used in thin-layer masonry, the adhesion gaps between aerated concrete blocks are minimized, resulting in lighter walls. furthermore, its overall heat-insulating performance surpasses that of thick-layer masonry mortar by reducing cold bridging, ensuring uniform thermal conductivity across the wall, and diminishing crack formation due to localized non-uniform stress in the basal plane of the mortar.

raw: the utility model discloses an intelligent entrance guard monitoring device, including two intelligence doors, two the upper and lower both sides of intelligence door all are equipped with the spout, two all there is a fixed plate the relative both sides of intelligence door, and surface of one of them fan intelligence door is equipped with control panel, control panel includes fingerprint entrance guard and card reader, the lower extreme of intelligence door is equipped with the installation cavity, be equipped with the hydraulic means of symmetry in the installation cavity, hydraulic means's the impartial distance in upper end is equipped with is no less than three hydraulic stems, the intelligence door is controlled by control system, control system includes: plc controller, infrared ray sensor, power, stabiliser, voltage sensor, camera, fingerprint entrance guard, alarm, card reader, hydraulic means, electromagnetic lock and radio signal receiving ware. the utility model discloses simple structure makes entrance guard's reliability and factor of safety to improve through the mode that circuit access control system and hydraulic means combined together moreover.
rewritten: the utility model discloses an intelligent entrance guard monitoring device comprising two intelligent doors. each door is equipped with spouts at both its upper and lower sides, and fixed plates are provided on both lateral sides. one of the door surfaces features a control panel that includes a fingerprint access reader and a card reader. additionally, the lower end of each intelligent door includes an installation cavity that houses symmetrically arranged hydraulic components. at the upper end of these hydraulic components, there are at least three hydraulic cylinders spaced evenly. the operation of the intelligent doors is managed by a control system that comprises a plc controller, an infrared sensor, a power supply, a stabilizer, a voltage sensor, a camera, a fingerprint access reader, an alarm, a card reader, hydraulic mechanisms, an electromagnetic lock, and a radio signal receiver. this design, which integrates a circuit-based access control system with hydraulic mechanisms, offers a simple structure that improves both the reliability and safety of the entrance guard.

raw: provided herein are compositions for and methods of generating ligation-competent nucleic acids. in some aspects, the compositions comprise exonuclease iii, t4 dna polymerase, klenow, and/or t4 polynucleotide kinase.
rewritten: here, we describe compositions and methods for producing nucleic acids that are capable of ligation. in some embodiments, these compositions include components such as exonuclease iii, t4 dna polymerase, klenow, and/or t4 polynucleotide kinase.

raw: to obtain pulsed light signal used as pulsed pump light for optical fiber sensing and communication systems, a design scheme of generating pulsed light based on continuous laser and field programmable gate array (fpga) is proposed in this paper. the pulsed light signals with minimum pulse width of 10 ns were obtained in the experiment, the pulse widths of the pulsed light signals could be regulated with the smallest increment of 5 ns, while the deviations of the pulse widths were less than 0.8 ns between the measurements and the expected values. the repetition frequency could also be adjusted from 0.05 hz to 100 mhz. not only is the pulsed light signal stable and reliable, but the complexity of the system is also reduced by using the design method in this paper.
rewritten: this paper proposes a design for generating pulsed pump light for optical fiber sensing and communication systems by using a continuous laser combined with a field programmable gate array (fpga). in the experiments, pulsed light signals with a minimum pulse width of 10 ns were successfully produced. the pulse widths can be fine-tuned with increments as small as 5 ns, and the measured pulse widths deviate from the expected values by less than 0.8 ns. additionally, the repetition frequency is adjustable from 0.05 hz to 100 mhz. this method not only delivers stable and reliable pulsed light signals but also reduces the complexity of the overall system.

raw: the utility model relates to an electrical apparatus manufacturing technology and medical care and public health field, in particular to air purification disinfection machine people, including casing, purifying and sterilizing device, control system and charging seat, the casing is cylindrical structure, and the bottom of casing is installed and is used for driving the drive arrangement that the casing advances, retreats and turns to, purifying and sterilizing device is arranged in the upper portion of casing, including a plasma generator and electrode, control system is used for realizing intelligent control, mainly is responsible for collection, analysis and the processing of air quality data to be used for controlling the work of purifying and sterilizing device and drive arrangement, the casing embeds there is the battery. the utility model discloses possess certain intellectuality, near that can independently judge the position of pollution sources and move these pollution sources is closely carried out air purification and is disinfected pollution sources, creates high -quality air circumstance for people.
rewritten: this utility model pertains to the field of electrical apparatus manufacturing technology as well as medical care and public health. in particular, it relates to an air purification and disinfection machine for people. the device comprises a casing, an air purification and sterilization unit, a control system, and a charging dock. the casing has a cylindrical structure, with a drive mechanism installed at its bottom that allows it to move forward, backward, and turn. the air purification and sterilization unit, located in the upper portion of the casing, includes a plasma generator and an electrode. the control system is responsible for intelligent control, mainly handling the collection, analysis, and processing of air quality data to manage the operation of both the air purification and sterilization unit and the drive mechanism. additionally, the casing houses a built-in battery. this utility model exhibits a level of intelligence, as it can independently determine the location of pollution sources and approach them to purify and disinfect the surrounding air, ultimately creating a high-quality air environment for people.

raw: the invention discloses a method and device for correcting a numeric string based on human-computer interaction. the method comprises the following steps: receiving semanteme inputted by a user, and analyzing a character string corresponding to the semanteme; pre-processing the semanteme according to a dialogue history, and judging whether the semanteme is used for correcting a false command inthe numeric string; if so, then adopting an edit distance algorithm to find out one segment which is most similar to a correction substring in a numeric string to be corrected and replacing the segment, and correcting a speech recognition error of the numeric string through several rounds of interaction, and replacing the character string; and updating the character string according to the preprocessed semanteme and replying to a user. according to the method and device for correcting the numeric string based on human-computer interaction provided by the invention, the speech recognition error of the numeric string is corrected through several rounds of dialogue interaction, so that the user can correct the recognition error, and especially correct the numeric string; the correct rate of speech recognition in the human-computer interaction is improved by making the deletion, insertion and substitution have different penalty values, meanwhile, the user experience can be effectively increased.
rewritten: this invention presents a method and corresponding device for correcting a numeric string through human-computer interaction. the method involves several steps. first, it receives a semanteme input from the user and analyzes the associated character string. next, it pre-processes the semanteme by referring to previous dialogue history, and determines whether the semanteme is intended to correct an erroneous command within the numeric string. if that is the case, an edit distance algorithm is employed to locate the segment in the numeric string that most closely resembles the intended correction substring; this segment is then replaced. the process includes several rounds of interaction to correct any speech recognition errors in the numeric string, further updating the character string based on the preprocessed semanteme before providing a response to the user. by applying this method and device, speech recognition errors in numeric strings are rectified through multiple rounds of dialogue interaction, allowing users to effectively correct such errors. in particular, the precision of speech recognition is enhanced by assigning distinct penalty values to deletion, insertion, and substitution operations, which in turn significantly improves the overall user experience.

raw: the purpose of this study was to determine if simultaneous bilateral carpal tunnel release (ctr) is a cost-effective strategy compared with bilateral staged ctr for the treatment of bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome. methods a decision analytic model was created to compare the cost effectiveness of three strategies (ie, bilateral simultaneous ctr, bilateral staged ctr, and no treatment). direct medical costs were estimated from 2013 medicare reimbursement rates and wholesale drug costs in us dollars. indirect costs were derived from consecutive patients undergoing unilateral or simultaneous bilateral ctr at our institution and from national average wages for 2013. health state utility values were derived from a general population of volunteers using the short form-6 dimensions (sf-6d) health questionnaire. results both surgical strategies were cost effective compared with the no-treatment strategy. bilateral simultaneous ctr had lower total costs and higher total effectiveness than bilateral staged ctr, and had an incremental cost-effectiveness ratio of $921 per quality-adjusted life year compared with the no-treatment strategy. the conclusions of the analysis remained unchanged though all sensitivity analyses, displaying robustness against parameter uncertainty. conclusions surgical management is cost effective for the treatment of bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome. bilateral simultaneous ctr, however, has lower total costs and higher total effectiveness compared with bilateral staged ctr. level of evidence economic and decision analysis i.
rewritten: this study aimed to assess whether performing a simultaneous bilateral carpal tunnel release (ctr) is a cost-effective approach compared to a staged bilateral release for patients with bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome. a decision analytic model was built to compare the cost effectiveness of three strategies: bilateral simultaneous ctr, bilateral staged ctr, and no treatment. direct medical costs were calculated using 2013 medicare reimbursement rates and wholesale drug prices in us dollars, while indirect costs were estimated from data on consecutive patients undergoing either unilateral or simultaneous bilateral ctr at our institution, along with national average wages from 2013. health state utility values were obtained from a group of volunteers from the general population using the short form-6 dimensions (sf-6d) questionnaire. the results indicated that both surgical strategies were cost effective compared to no treatment. moreover, bilateral simultaneous ctr resulted in lower total costs and higher total effectiveness than bilateral staged ctr, with an incremental cost-effectiveness ratio of $921 per quality-adjusted life year when compared to the no-treatment strategy. these conclusions remained consistent across all sensitivity analyses, demonstrating the robustness of the findings despite parameter uncertainties. in summary, surgical intervention is cost effective for treating bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome, and bilateral simultaneous ctr proves to be both less expensive and more effective than bilateral staged ctr. level of evidence: economic and decision analysis i.

raw: the utility model discloses a measure sampling device of wind powder mixture velocity of flow, including malleation pipe and negative pressure pipe, malleation pipe through the connecting rod with the negative pressure pipe is connected, the lower extreme of malleation pipe is the tip, the malleation pipe comprises for half tub the facing the wind zuo banguan of one side and the right side of leeward one side, the foreign steamer profile of half tub of cross section on the left side appears for the semiellipse, the interior outline line of half tub of cross section on the left side is semi -circular, the cross section that the right side is half tub is half circle ring. the utility model discloses in the shape on half tub on a left side through the one side that facings the wind to malleation pipe carry out redesign with the structure, and increased by half tub of holistic thickness on the left side, the shock -resistant ability of malleation pipe windward side is stronger, has improved sampling device's wearability, has lengthened sampling device's life, estimate with the utility model is used for among the high -speed wind powder mixture velocity of flow measuring device, this sampling device's average life can reach more than 3 years.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a sampling device for measuring the velocity of a wind-powder mixture flow. this device comprises a malleation pipe and a negative pressure pipe, which are connected via a connecting rod, with the malleation pipe terminating in a tip at its lower end. the malleation pipe features a half-tub design that includes a wind-facing (left) side and a leeward (right) side. specifically, the external profile of the left half-tub cross-section is semi-elliptical, while its internal outline is semi-circular; in contrast, the right half-tub cross-section has a half circle ring shape. in this design, the left side of the malleation pipe—facing the wind—has been structurally redesigned with the half-tub shape and increased overall thickness. this modification enhances the shock-resistant capability on the windward side, improving the device's durability and extending its service life. it is estimated that when used in instruments measuring the velocity of high-speed wind-powder mixtures, this sampling device can have an average lifespan exceeding three years.

raw: a cover assembly is for a void having a cover slab 4 that defines an opening 6 into the void. the cover assembly includes a cover plate 14 and a frame 8. the frame is for locating the cover plate so as to close the opening and is configured to be attached to a surface of the cover slab not facing the void. the frame may be dimensioned and configured to provide a guide to the setting out of brickwork to be constructed on the surface of the cover slab that is vertically uppermost. the cover plate or frame may comprise at least one locking means adapted to reversibly lock the cover plate within the frame. a manhole comprises a void having a cover slab which defines an opening in the void, said cover assembly, brickwork on the cover slab, a manhole ring on the top of the brickwork, and a manhole cover. the manhole may comprise a second frame having one or more elements which define a space within which the cover plate may loosely fit, the second frame being attached to the brickwork.
rewritten: a cover assembly is designed for a void that features a cover slab (4) creating an opening (6) into the void. the assembly consists of a cover plate (14) and a frame (8). the frame is intended to position the cover plate so that it closes the opening and is configured to attach to the surface of the cover slab that is opposite the void. additionally, the frame might be sized and shaped to serve as a guide for laying out brickwork on the uppermost vertical surface of the cover slab. either the cover plate or the frame can include at least one locking mechanism, which is designed to securely and reversibly lock the cover plate into the frame. furthermore, a manhole incorporates a void with a cover slab that defines an opening, along with the cover assembly, brickwork on the cover slab, a manhole ring placed atop the brickwork, and a manhole cover. the manhole may also include a second frame that has one or more components forming a recess in which the cover plate can loosely fit; this second frame is attached directly to the brickwork.

raw: abstract a micro-distillation system is presented for formaldehyde concentration detection in food products. the proposed system consists of a micro-distillation device, a micro-condensed device, micro-distillation chip, a high-pressure steam tank, a temperature controller, and a cooling system. the distillation chip is fabricated on polymethylmethacrylate (pmma) substrates using a co2 laser system and comprises three distilling chambers, a condenser micro-channel and a cooling micro-channel. in the proposed system, the formaldehyde sample is injected into the distillation chip and a high-pressure steam supply is used to vaporize the formaldehyde and carry it to the condenser region of the chip. the formaldehyde vapor is condensed under the effects of the low-temperature cooling channel and is transported to the collection region of the device. finally, a colorimetric detection process is performed to measure the formaldehyde concentration of the collected sample using a commercial spectrophotometer. the validity of the proposed system is investigated using a control sample with a formaldehyde concentration of 6 ppm. it is shown that a distillation efficiency as high as 98% can be obtained given a steam pressure of 4 bar. the real-world applicability of the proposed micro-distillation system is demonstrated by measuring the formaldehyde concentrations of 18 commercial chinese herb samples.
rewritten: this paper introduces a micro-distillation system designed for detecting formaldehyde concentrations in food products. the system is composed of several components: a micro-distillation device, a micro-condensation device, a micro-distillation chip, a high-pressure steam tank, a temperature controller, and a cooling system. the distillation chip is fabricated from polymethylmethacrylate (pmma) substrates using a co2 laser and features three distillation chambers, a condenser micro-channel, and a cooling micro-channel. in operation, the formaldehyde sample is injected into the distillation chip where a high-pressure steam supply vaporizes the formaldehyde, carrying it to the chip’s condenser region. the vapor is then cooled by the low-temperature micro-channel and transported to the collection area. finally, a colorimetric detection method is used to determine the formaldehyde concentration in the collected sample with a commercial spectrophotometer. the system’s performance was validated with a control sample containing 6 ppm of formaldehyde, demonstrating a distillation efficiency of up to 98% at a steam pressure of 4 bar. the practical application of this micro-distillation system was further confirmed by measuring the formaldehyde content in 18 different commercial chinese herb samples.

raw: the invention relates to a nanoparticles/silicon composite material, and a preparation method and an application thereof. the nanoparticles/silicon composite material is prepared by grafting organic matters on the surface of a silicon material and carrying out bonding or electrostatic adsorption on the organic matters and nanoparticles, wherein the silicon material is porous silicon or silicon nanoparticles; the nanoparticles are metal nanoparticles; a chemical structural general formula of the organic matters is as shown in the specification, wherein r is alkoxy; a is alkyl, alkenyl or aryl with at least two carbon atoms; y is -ch -, -o-, -nh-, -nch - or -nph-; r and r independently are hydrogen or alkyl with 1-3 carbon atoms; x is a hydrolysable or protonated acidic or alkaline group or a group which can form a coordinate bond together with the nanoparticles, so that the silicon material can form a stable sei film as an anode material for a lithium-ion battery when intercalation and deintercalation are carried out in the charge and discharge processes, so as to improve the cycle performance of the battery.
rewritten: the invention pertains to a composite material composed of nanoparticles and silicon, along with its preparation method and applications. this composite is created by grafting organic groups onto the surface of a silicon substrate and then bonding or adsorbing nanoparticles onto these organic groups. in this context, the silicon material can either be porous silicon or silicon nanoparticles, while the nanoparticles are metal-based. the organic groups possess a general chemical structure as specified, where r represents an alkoxy group; a denotes an alkyl, alkenyl, or aryl group containing at least two carbon atoms; y may be one of the following: –ch–, –o–, –nh–, –nch–, or –nph–; each r independently signifies either hydrogen or a short alkyl chain containing 1-3 carbon atoms; and x stands for a group that is either hydrolysable, protonated acidic or basic, or capable of forming a coordinate bond with the nanoparticles. this arrangement enables the silicon material to form a stable sei film when used as an anode in a lithium-ion battery during the intercalation and deintercalation processes associated with charging and discharging, thereby enhancing the battery's cycle performance.

raw: objective the aim of this analysis was to compare the advantages of the anal fistula plug (afp) with the mucosa advancement flap (maf) for complex anal fistulas. methods comparative studies of the efficacy of afp and maf were included. two independent reviewers selected articles for inclusion. after information collection, a meta-analysis was performed using data on overall healing rates, complications, incontinences and recurrences. the quality of postoperative life and cost were also included with the clinical results. results ten studies included 778 patients who were divided into afp and maf groups in this meta-analysis. during the follow-up period, no significant difference in healing rates, complications and recurrences were found (p = 0.55, p = 0.78 and p = 0.23, respectively). the incontinence rate of afp was lower than that of maf (p = 0.04). the postoperative quality of life of afp patients was superior to that of maf patients. the afp patients had less persistent pain of a shorter duration and shortened healing time and hospital stay. the treatment cost of afp patient was lower than that of maf. conclusion compared to the maf procedure, the afp procedure has some advantages for complex anal fistulas, but more and large randomized clinical trials comparing the two procedures for fistula management need to be conducted.
rewritten: objective: this analysis aimed to compare the benefits of the anal fistula plug (afp) with the mucosa advancement flap (maf) for treating complex anal fistulas. methods: comparative studies evaluating the effectiveness of afp and maf were included. two independent reviewers screened articles for eligibility. after gathering the relevant data, a meta-analysis was carried out focusing on overall healing rates, complications, continences, and recurrence rates. in addition, postoperative quality of life and cost were assessed alongside the clinical outcomes. results: the meta-analysis incorporated data from ten studies involving 778 patients divided into afp and maf groups. during the follow-up period, no significant differences were observed in healing rates, complications, or recurrences (p = 0.55, p = 0.78, and p = 0.23, respectively). however, the afp group exhibited a lower incontinence rate compared to the maf group (p = 0.04). moreover, patients treated with afp enjoyed a better postoperative quality of life, experienced less persistent pain with a shorter duration, and had reduced healing time and hospital stay. the treatment cost for afp was also found to be lower than that for maf. conclusion: compared to the maf procedure, the afp procedure offers certain advantages for managing complex anal fistulas. nevertheless, larger and more rigorous randomized clinical trials are needed to further compare these two treatment approaches.

raw: the utility model discloses a bearing of door and window pulley comprises gyro wheel, kingpin, roller bearing and gasket, the gyro wheel is cylindricly, there is the through -hole at the center of gyro wheel along axial processing, be equipped with the roller bearing in the through -hole, be equipped with 12 kingpins along the axial between roller bearing and the gyro wheel, the gasket passes the both ends of roller bearing setting at the through -hole. the utility model discloses a bearing of door and window pulley, structural design is ingenious, has improved bearing's life and bearing capacity, the utility model has the advantages of simple structure, easy manufacturing, simple to operate, with low costs, longe -lived.
rewritten: the utility model presents a door and window pulley bearing that includes a gyro wheel, kingpins, a roller bearing, and a gasket. the gyro wheel is cylindrical and features an axial through-hole at its center designed to house the roller bearing. additionally, twelve kingpins are arranged along the axial space between the gyro wheel and the roller bearing, while the gasket is installed at both ends of the roller bearing within the through-hole. this innovative design not only enhances the bearing's lifespan and load capacity but also offers the benefits of a simple structure, ease of manufacturing, user-friendly operation, low production costs, and long-term reliability.

raw: the location accuracy of the japanese lightning detection network (jldn) has been evaluated for a long time. it was reported that the average location accuracy of the jldn was approximately 0.44 km for return strokes of negative downward lightning striking wind turbines in summer and 0.58 km for return strokes associated with upward lightning initiated from wind turbines in winter. however, the authors found that many stroke positions calculated by the jldn tended to be located in specific directions. therefore, we assumed this was caused by differences in the propagation speed of the electromagnetic waves that emitted from lightning discharges, passing along surfaces of varying conductivity. we recalculated the lightning positions of strokes that hit the wind turbines after applying propagation delay corrections. the difference between the times measured at the sensor and calculated times was smaller after the recalculation. as a result, location accuracy was improved from 0.44 km to 0.31 km for downward lightning strokes in summer, and it was improved from 0.79 km to 0.12 km for lightning strokes in winter.
rewritten: for many years, researchers have evaluated the japanese lightning detection network's (jldn) location accuracy. it was found that, on average, the jldn could locate negative downward lightning return strokes striking wind turbines during summer with an accuracy of about 0.44 km, and upward lightning strokes initiated from wind turbines during winter with an accuracy of around 0.58 km. however, the authors noticed that many calculated stroke positions were consistently offset in particular directions. they hypothesized that this discrepancy was caused by differences in the propagation speed of electromagnetic waves emitted by lightning discharges as they travel along surfaces with varying conductivity. to address this issue, the team recalculated the positions of lightning strokes hitting the wind turbines by applying propagation delay corrections. the time differences between measurements taken at the sensor and the calculated times were reduced after the correction. as a result, the location accuracy improved to 0.31 km for downward lightning strokes in summer and to 0.12 km for lightning strokes in winter.

raw: a measurement instrument for measuring electrical characteristics of a device under test (dut) includes a synchronization signal generator configured to generate a synchronization signal transmittable from the measurement instrument to a receiver. the synchronization generator comprises a phase-locked loop (pll) that locks the phase of the lo signal to the synchronization signal. the a/d clock signal is generated from the synchronization signal.
rewritten: a measurement instrument for evaluating the electrical characteristics of a device under test (dut) includes a synchronization signal generator that is designed to produce a synchronization signal, which can be sent from the instrument to a receiver. the synchronization generator contains a phase-locked loop (pll) that aligns the phase of the local oscillator (lo) signal with the synchronization signal, and the a/d clock signal is derived from that same synchronization signal.

raw: the embodiment of the invention discloses an information processing method. the method is applied to a first terminal; the first terminal executes a synchronous source function; furthermore, the multi-hop grade of the first terminal is n; the multi-hop grade n represents that synchronous information received by the first terminal is obtained by being forwarded for n times; and n is an integer, which is greater than or equal to 0. the method comprises the following steps of: monitoring first synchronous information of each multi-hop grade in n multi-hop grades to obtain n first synchronous information; obtaining n first parameters in the n first synchronous information; and updating the multi-hop grade of the first terminal according to the n first parameters, wherein n is a positive integer. simultaneously, the invention further discloses the terminal. rapid updating of the multi-hop grade can be realized; furthermore, the updating accuracy rate is high; a homogeneous synchronous source can be reduced; and the energy consumption of a network can be reduced.
rewritten: one embodiment of the invention presents an information processing method used on a first terminal. in this method, the first terminal performs a synchronous source function and has a multi-hop grade of n, where n (an integer ≥ 0) indicates that the synchronous information received by the terminal has been forwarded n times. the method involves the following steps: monitoring the first synchronous information across n multi-hop grades to collect n pieces of first synchronous information, extracting n first parameters from these pieces, and then updating the terminal's multi-hop grade based on these n parameters (with n being a positive integer). additionally, the invention discloses the terminal itself. this approach enables rapid updating of the multi-hop grade with high accuracy, reduces the reliance on a homogeneous synchronous source, and lowers the overall energy consumption of the network.

raw: the invention provides a self-balancing swing car provided with a safety protection system, belongs to the field of electric balance cars, and solves the technical problem that the safety of a user cannot be guaranteed by a conventional self-balancing swing car. the technical scheme is that the self-balancing swing car provided with the safety protection system comprises a supporting casing, a left wheel, a right wheel, a single chip microcomputer, a left motor, a right motor, a battery, a left optoelectronic switch, a right optoelectronic switch, a left latch, a right latch and an automatic overspeed governor, wherein the left wheel and the right wheel are mounted at two ends of the supporting casing respectively; the single chip microcomputer, the left motor, the right motor, the battery, the left optoelectronic switch, the right optoelectronic switch, the left latch, the right latch and the automatic overspeed governor are mounted in the supporting casing; the left motor, the right motor, the battery, the left latch, the right latch and the automatic overspeed governor are connected with the single chip microcomputer; the left optoelectronic switch is connected with the left latch; the right optoelectronic switch is connected with the right latch; the left wheel is connected with the left motor; the right wheel is connected with the right motor. the self-balancing swing car has the beneficial effects as follows: the safety of the user is guaranteed, and the user checks various messages conveniently.
rewritten: the invention relates to a self-balancing swing car equipped with a safety protection system, falling under the category of electric balance vehicles, and addresses the technical issue where conventional self-balancing swing cars fail to ensure user safety. in this design, the self-balancing swing car includes a supporting casing with left and right wheels mounted at its opposite ends. inside the casing are housed a single-chip microcomputer, a left motor, a right motor, a battery, a left optoelectronic switch, a right optoelectronic switch, a left latch, a right latch, and an automatic overspeed governor. the left motor, right motor, battery, left latch, right latch, and automatic overspeed governor are connected to the single-chip microcomputer, while the left optoelectronic switch is connected to the left latch and the right optoelectronic switch to the right latch. additionally, the left motor drives the left wheel and the right motor drives the right wheel. this configuration not only guarantees the user’s safety but also provides convenient access to various information messages.

raw: dear friends,self & society is the voice of the association of humanistic psychology (ahp), it offers its global readership broad-ranging, challenging and provocative articles, poems and book revie...
rewritten: dear friends, self & society is the official publication of the association of humanistic psychology (ahp). it delivers an extensive array of thought-provoking and challenging articles, poetry, and book reviews to readers around the world.

raw: the implementation of smart grids has been hindered in developing countries due to the cost of entry. a goal is therefore to design a system that can provide a similar service to a smart grid at a lower cost. an autonomous load controller can capitalize on the relationship between grid frequency and power imbalance to provide distributed demand response. water heaters are controlled in this scheme and used as dispatchable loads when power needs to be consumed and defered loads when consumption needs to be limited. a mathematical model of a heater is developed through testing and a form of control is presented that uses a measurement of the grid frequency and water temperature to regulate power consumption while ensuring service delivery. a monte carlo type simulation shows the viability of the controller on a large scale with variations of the control parameters. results indicate that usable water temperatures are maintained and a secondary effect of frequency regulation is observed
rewritten: in developing countries, the high entry costs have hindered the rollout of smart grids. hence, the goal is to design a system that can deliver services akin to those of a smart grid but at a lower cost. an autonomous load controller leverages the relationship between grid frequency and power imbalance to achieve distributed demand response. in this approach, water heaters are managed as controllable loads—used as dispatchable loads when there is a need to consume extra power and as deferred loads when power consumption should be limited. through testing, a mathematical model of a water heater was developed, along with a control strategy that utilizes measurements of grid frequency and water temperature to regulate power usage while still ensuring reliable service. a monte carlo-style simulation demonstrates the controller’s viability on a large scale across varying control parameters, with the results showing that acceptable water temperatures are maintained and an added benefit of frequency regulation is achieved.

raw: exposure to organic solvents may cause narcotic effects. at the cellular level, these narcotic effects have been associated with a reduction in neuronal excitability caused by changes in membrane structure and function. in order to critically test whether changes in membrane geometry contribute to these narcotic effects, cultured human sh-sy5y neuroblastoma cells have been exposed to selected organic solvents. the solvent-induced changes in cell membrane capacitance were investigated using the whole-cell patch clamp technique for real-time capacitance measurements. exposure of sh-sy5y cells to the cyclic hydrocarbons m-xylene, toluene, and cyclohexane caused a rapid and reversible increase of membrane capacitance. the aliphatic, nonpolar n-hexane did not cause a detectable change of whole-cell membrane capacitance, whereas the amphiphiles n-hexanol and n-hexylamine caused an increase of membrane capacitance and a concomitant reduction in membrane resistance. despite a large difference in dielectric properties, the chlorinated hydrocarbons 1,1,2,2-tetrachoroethane and tetrachloroethylene caused a similar magnitude increase in membrane capacitance. the theory on membrane capacitance has been applied to deduce changes in membrane geometry caused by solvent partitioning. although classical observations have shown that solvents increase the membrane capacitance per unit area of membrane, i.e., increase membrane thickness, the present results demonstrate that solvent partitioning predominantly leads to an increase in membrane surface area and to a lesser degree to an increase in membrane thickness. moreover, the present results indicate that the physicochemical properties of each solvent are important determinants for its specific effects on membrane geometry. this implies that the hypothesis that solvent partitioning is associated with a common perturbation of membrane structure needs to be revisited and cannot account for the commonly observed narcotic effects of different organic solvents.
rewritten: organic solvents can induce narcotic effects, which at the cellular level are linked to diminished neuronal excitability due to alterations in membrane structure and function. to thoroughly examine whether modifications in membrane geometry contribute to these narcotic effects, cultured human sh-sy5y neuroblastoma cells were exposed to various organic solvents. researchers monitored solvent-induced changes in cell membrane capacitance using the whole-cell patch clamp technique for real-time measurements. when sh-sy5y cells were exposed to the cyclic hydrocarbons m-xylene, toluene, and cyclohexane, there was a rapid, reversible increase in membrane capacitance. in contrast, exposure to the aliphatic, nonpolar solvent n-hexane did not produce any noticeable change in whole-cell membrane capacitance, while the amphiphilic agents n-hexanol and n-hexylamine led to an increase in membrane capacitance alongside a decrease in membrane resistance. furthermore, despite significant differences in their dielectric properties, the chlorinated hydrocarbons 1,1,2,2-tetrachloroethane and tetrachloroethylene induced a similar magnitude of increase in membrane capacitance. the established theory of membrane capacitance was then used to infer changes in membrane geometry resulting from solvent partitioning. although traditional findings have indicated that solvents generally increase the capacitance per unit area of the membrane—implying an increase in membrane thickness—the current results suggest that solvent partitioning primarily expands the membrane surface area, with only a minor effect on thickness. moreover, the specific physicochemical properties of each solvent play a crucial role in determining its distinct impact on membrane geometry. this indicates that the idea of a uniform perturbation in membrane structure due to solvent partitioning should be reconsidered, as it does not sufficiently explain the prevalent narcotic effects observed with various organic solvents.

raw: the invention discloses a hollow heat preservation glass fiber reinforced plastic chimney which comprises a cylindrical glass fiber reinforced plastic chimney body. the cylindrical glass fiber reinforced plastic chimney body is formed by fixedly connecting a plurality of arc-shaped glass fiber reinforced plastic monomers through buckle plate structures; each overall arc-shaped glass fiber reinforced plastic monomer adopts hollow design, and a plurality of special-shaped holes which are equally spaced are formed in each arc-shaped glass fiber reinforced plastic monomer; the special-shaped holes of the arc-shaped glass fiber reinforced plastic monomers are filled with high-quality flame-retardant heat preservation cotton layers, the upper end, the lower end, the left end and the right end of each arc-shaped glass fiber reinforced plastic monomer are all provided with the buckle plate structures for connection, the upper ends and the left ends of the arc-shaped glass fiber reinforced plastic monomers are each provided with a convex block structure of which the shape is similar to a semicircle, and the lower ends and the right ends of the arc-shaped glass fiber reinforced plastic monomers are each provided with a groove structure matched with the corresponding convex block structure. the chimney is low in cost, high in benefit and long in service life; the hollow design is adopted, the high-quality flame-retardant heat preservation cotton layers are arranged, and therefore the heat resistance of the chimney is enhanced; the upper ends, the lower ends, the left ends and the right ends are all provided with the buckle plate structures for connection, and therefore it can be guaranteed that no acid liquor is leaked; nano silicon carbide is adopted as auxiliary reinforcing materials, carbon fibers are adopted as main reinforcing materials, and therefore the friction resisting and hydrofluoric acid resisting capacities of the glass fiber reinforced plastic chimney body can be further improved.
rewritten: the invention describes a hollow, heat-insulating chimney made of glass fiber reinforced plastic. it features a cylindrical chimney body constructed by fixedly connecting several arc-shaped modules using buckle plate structures. each arc-shaped module is designed to be hollow and includes multiple equally spaced, specially shaped holes that are packed with top-grade flame-retardant insulation cotton to enhance its heat resistance. additionally, every module is provided with buckle plate structures on its upper, lower, left, and right sides for secure connection. specifically, the upper and left sides are equipped with semicircular convex blocks, while the lower and right sides have grooves that match these convex formations. this design ensures that no acid liquor escapes, offering a cost-effective solution with high performance and long service life. moreover, the use of nano silicon carbide as supplementary reinforcement and carbon fibers as the primary reinforcement further improves the chimney body's resistance to friction and hydrofluoric acid.

raw: the invention discloses a granulating disintegrating agent for producing a round granule mineral fertilizer. the granulating disintegrating agent is prepared from, by mass, 40-70% of bentonite, 25-55% of lignin and lignin derivatives, 2-3% of potassium chloride and 1-2% of calcium chloride. bentonite is partly or completely replaced by attapulgite. lignin derivatives include acetyl lignin, methyl lignin, halogenated lignin, lignin sulfonate and nitrated lignin obtained after lignin is acetylated, methylated, halogenated, sulfonated and nitrated respectively. the granulating disintegrating agent can meet the two requirements for high strength and rapid disintegration of the granule mineral fertilizer at the same time. the granulating disintegrating agent is small in addition amount and low in price, effective components in the granule mineral fertilizer can be kept in high ratio, and the production cost of the granule mineral fertilizer can be effectively controlled.
rewritten: this invention discloses a granulating and disintegrating agent formulated for producing round granule mineral fertilizer. the agent is composed, by weight, of 40–70% bentonite, 25–55% lignin and its derivatives, 2–3% potassium chloride, and 1–2% calcium chloride, with the possibility of partially or completely substituting bentonite with attapulgite. the lignin derivatives encompass acetyl lignin, methyl lignin, halogenated lignin, lignin sulfonate, and nitrated lignin—each produced by acetylating, methylating, halogenating, sulfonating, or nitrating lignin, respectively. this granulating and disintegrating agent meets the dual requirements of delivering both high strength and rapid disintegration for the granule mineral fertilizer. moreover, it requires only a small amount, is cost-effective, preserves a high proportion of the effective fertilizer components, and helps maintain controlled production costs.

raw: the invention discloses a prediction method of beer flavor refreshing time.the method comprises the following steps that 1, the concentration of various aldehydes in beer samples in different storage time intervals is determined, scoring is conducted on an aging flavor through wine tasting, and the contribution rate of the aldehydes on aging is calculated; 2, normalization data of initial concentration of the aldehydes of the newly filled finished product beer samples of different batches and normalization data of variable quantity of the concentration of the aldehydes under the strengthen condition are calculated, and aging indexes of the beer samples of different batches are calculated; 3, the refreshing time of the beer samples of different batches is calculated, fitting is conducted on the refreshing time of the beer samples of different batches and the corresponding aging indexes, a fitting formula is obtained, the newly filled finished product beer samples are taken, the second step is repeated, and according to the fitting formula obtained in the third step, the refreshing time of the beer samples can be obtained.according to the prediction method of the beer flavor refreshing time, prediction is conducted on the refreshing time of the beer flavor on the basis of the aldehydes, the result is reliable, and the prediction method is suitable for promotion in beer industry.
rewritten: the invention outlines a method to predict the refreshing time of beer flavor. the method involves the following steps: 1. determine the concentration of various aldehydes in beer samples over different storage time intervals, perform wine tastings to score the aging flavor, and calculate the contribution rate of the aldehydes to aging. 2. calculate the normalized initial concentrations of aldehydes in newly filled, finished beer samples from different batches, as well as the normalized data for the changes in aldehyde concentrations under intensified conditions, and use these to compute aging indexes for the various batches. 3. compute the refreshing time for beer samples from each batch, then fit the refreshing times to their corresponding aging indexes to develop a fitting equation. next, repeat step 2 for newly filled finished beer samples and use the fitting equation from step 3 to determine their refreshing time. this approach, which predicts the refreshing time of beer flavor based on aldehyde levels, produces reliable results and is well-suited for adoption within the beer industry.

raw: in this study, the design and optimization of a honeycomb energy absorber is performed using genetic algorithm. the main design goal is to absorb almost all the impact energy. simultaneously, reduction of the shock force level is also considered as a main objective. in the first part, the crashworthiness behavior of honeycomb structure is parametrically studied. the results are utilized in the second part to optimize shock absorber design. in this part, aluminum honeycomb structure under dynamic loading is investigated using simulation in ls-dyna finite element code. parametric studies are invoked to identify the influence of different model parameters on crashworthiness characteristics of honeycomb structure. reducing the computational cost, a repeatable model of 'y' cross section column is numerically simulated. the effects of changes in material properties including young's modulus, yield stress, tangent modulus, geometrical properties such as cell size, foil thickness, as well as the effects of impact velocity on the deformation behavior of the structure were investigated. a number of 25 different geometries with same height and various cell sizes and thicknesses are studied and effects of thickness and cell size on the energy absorption properties are investigated. results showed that crashworthiness parameters such as mean and peak stress depend mainly on cell size and thickness values, while the friction coefficient and young's modulus are of less importance. any change in absorber's geometry affects the mean collapse stress more severely than the peak stress. in the meantime, thickness change is more effective in comparison with cell size change.
