raw: the invention relates to a power source with energy amplifier in magnetic field for led lighting units. according to the invention, the source is supplied from the electric energy distribution network (2-1) at the level of a main input module (1-a), via a protection stage (2-2) and a transformation and rectification stage (2-3, 2-4), which provide two working voltages, one of 12 v for some control units, and the other of 24/48 v for the power consuming stages, an energy amplifier module (1-b) in magnetic field, which is made of a control oscillator stage, which controls the switch mode of a power control stage based on mosfet or igbt and which controls/supplies the main inductive stage of the power circuit and a final output module (1-c) for further bringing the so-obtained energy to a useful form.
rewritten: this invention relates to a power source featuring an energy amplifier in a magnetic field, intended for led lighting units. the power source is connected to the electric energy distribution network through a main input module, then passes through a protection stage followed by transformation and rectification stages. these stages generate two operating voltages: one of 12 v for certain control units and another of 24/48 v for power-consuming stages. additionally, the system includes an energy amplifier module, which uses a control oscillator stage to manage the switching mode of a power control stage based on mosfet or igbt technology. this control also drives the main inductive stage of the power circuit, and a final output module then converts the energy into a usable form.

raw: problem solving courts, including drug court, were established to address substance abuse while providing an alternative to prison sentences and traditional corrections supervision. drug courts have been shown to reduce crime in participants and graduates, save the criminal justice and health care systems money, reduce victimization, and restore families. pharmacists in tippecanoe county, indiana, and carlton county, minnesota, have established innovative practices as members of drug court teams; these practices include the provision of a variety of pharmaceutical and health-related services that other drug court team members are not able to provide. the role of the pharmacist on the drug court team deserves exploration in light of the increasing needs of problem-solving courts across the united states and the current substance abuse epidemic that unfortunately includes prescription drugs. conflict of interest "we declare no conflicts of interest or financial interests that the authors or members of their immediate families have in any product or service discussed in the manuscript, including grants (pending or received), employment, gifts, stock holdings or options, honoraria, consultancies, expert testimony, patents and royalties." type: idea paper
rewritten: problem-solving courts, such as drug courts, were created to tackle substance abuse while offering an alternative to imprisonment and conventional corrections supervision. studies have demonstrated that drug courts help lower crime rates among participants and graduates, cut costs for both the criminal justice and healthcare systems, decrease victimization, and mend family relationships. in tippecanoe county, indiana, and carlton county, minnesota, pharmacists have pioneered innovative practices as part of drug court teams. these initiatives include providing a range of pharmaceutical and health-related services that are not typically offered by other team members. given the growing demand for problem-solving courts across the united states and the ongoing substance abuse crisis—which regrettably now includes prescription drugs—the role of the pharmacist on the drug court team merits further investigation. conflict of interest: we have no conflicts of interest or financial ties—whether through grants (pending or received), employment, gifts, stock, options, honoraria, consultancies, expert testimony, patents, or royalties—that we or our immediate families hold in any product or service mentioned in this manuscript. type: idea paper.

raw: a child magic cube intelligence maze is divided into a first layer, a second layer and a third layer from bottom to top and comprises an outer wall, an entrance and an exit. the entrance is located at one corner of the first layer, and the exit is located at one corner of the third layer. the child magic cube intelligence maze is characterized in that each layer of the maze is divided into nine square rooms according to a nine-grid pattern, a small square lattice is arranged in each square room, each corner of the corresponding square lattice is in line connection with the middle point of the side, closest to the corner, of the corresponding square room where the corner is located through a wall, and the portions, making contact with one another, of every four square rooms which are adjacent with one another form a regular octagon; the four sides of each square lattice are provided with four doors respectively, the half side, located in the corresponding regular octagon, of each square room is provided with a door, and the doors are provided with puzzle pictures. the child magic cube intelligence maze is safe, reliable, small in floor area and high in enjoyment and has the high practicability.
rewritten: the child magic cube intelligence maze consists of three layers—first, second, and third from bottom to top—and features an outer wall, an entrance, and an exit. the entrance is positioned at one corner of the first layer, while the exit is at one corner of the third layer. each layer is segmented into nine square rooms arranged in a three-by-three grid, and every room contains a small square lattice. in each room, every corner of the lattice connects in a straight line through a wall to the midpoint of the nearest side of that room. moreover, where four square rooms meet, their contacting portions form a regular octagon. additionally, each square lattice has four doors on its sides, and each square room has an extra door on the half side that aligns with its corresponding octagon; these doors feature puzzle illustrations. overall, the maze is safe, reliable, compact in footprint, highly entertaining, and extremely practical.

raw: the increasing oil price, energy demand, and environmental concern are leading to a global switch towards plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (phevs). in a phev, li-ion battery is considered as the primary propelling source. therefore, an accurate battery model is required to predict the i-v characteristic and dynamic behavior of a battery. this paper presents a highly effective thermoelectric model of li-ion battery developed in simulink. an algorithm is proposed for estimation of state of charge (soc) and open circuit voltage (ocv) adaptively to notify the exact soc level for better utilization of battery power and optimal vehicle performance. thermal behavior of li-ion battery is investigated for wide temperature range and its effect on resistance, capacity, and ocv is recorded. the minimum soc level to which battery can get depleted is calculated using gradient method. the proposed simulation results are analyzed with those of earlier models and found to be better.
rewritten: rising oil prices, growing energy demand, and increasing environmental concerns are prompting a global transition toward plug-in hybrid electric vehicles (phevs). in these vehicles, the li-ion battery serves as the primary driving power source. consequently, an accurate battery model is essential for predicting both the i-v characteristics and the dynamic behavior of the battery. this paper introduces a highly effective thermoelectric model of a li-ion battery developed within simulink. it also proposes an algorithm that adaptively estimates the state of charge (soc) and open circuit voltage (ocv), ensuring precise soc determination for better battery utilization and optimal vehicle performance. the thermal behavior of the li-ion battery is analyzed over a wide range of temperatures, with observed effects on resistance, capacity, and ocv. additionally, the minimum soc level, representing the point of battery depletion, is determined using a gradient method. finally, the simulation results of the proposed model are compared with those of earlier models and are found to be superior.

raw: the invention discloses a natural electrolyte-containing coconut water sports drink and a preparation method thereof. the natural electrolyte-containing coconut water sports drink is prepared from the following components: 0.2% to 2% of coconut water, 0.02% to 2% of acidity adjusting agent, 1% to 8% of white granulated sugar, 0.1% to 2% of salty lemon juice concentrated main agent, 0.01% to 0.3% of edible essence, and the balance of being ro water, wherein the coconut water is a turbid liquid formed by shelling coconuts and concentrating, and contains higher natural electrolyte, so that the product is enabled to be natural and healthful, and the product tastes more natural and refreshing; in addition, before being mixed with the salty lemon juice concentrated main agent, the white granulated sugar, the edible essence and other raw materials, the coconut water is subjected to acid treatment, filtration, rapid cooling, and centrifugation to obtain a coconut water clarified liquid with turbidity of 1 to 20ntu, and then the coconut water clarified liquid is mixed with other raw materials, therefore, the sedimentation flocculation phenomenon of the coconut water sports product in the shelf life can be effectively avoided, and the stability of the product in the shelf life is greatly enhanced.
rewritten: this invention relates to a natural sports drink that includes coconut water, rich in natural electrolytes, along with a method for its preparation. the drink is formulated from the following ingredients: 0.2% to 2% coconut water, 0.02% to 2% acid regulator, 1% to 8% white sugar, 0.1% to 2% concentrated salty lemon juice, 0.01% to 0.3% edible flavor, and the remainder being ro water. here, the coconut water is a cloudy liquid obtained by shelling coconuts and concentrating the liquid, which enhances its natural electrolyte content, making the final product both natural and healthful with a fresh taste. before mixing with the concentrated salty lemon juice, sugar, edible flavor, and other ingredients, the coconut water undergoes a series of processes including acid treatment, filtration, rapid cooling, and centrifugation. this results in a clarified coconut water with a turbidity between 1 and 20 ntu. mixing this clarified liquid with the remaining ingredients not only prevents sedimentation and flocculation during the product’s shelf life but also significantly improves its overall stability.

raw: the invention discloses a manufacturing method for a light emitting diode chip, and belongs to the technical field of a semiconductor. the manufacturing method comprises the steps of growing an n type layer, a light emitting layer and a p type layer on the first surface of a substrate in sequence to form an epitaxial layer; forming a groove which extends from the p type layer to the n type layer in the p type layer; forming a current barrier layer on the p type layer; forming a transparent conductive thin film on the current barrier layer and the p type layer; forming an insulating layer on a region, corresponding to the current barrier layer, on the transparent conductive thin film, wherein the insulating layer comprises multiple insulating units which are arranged at intervals; performing high-temperature thermal annealing on the transparent conductive thin film under the sheltering of the insulating layer; forming a p type electrode on the region, corresponding to the current barrier layer, on the transparent conductive thin film, and forming an n type electrode on the n type layer; thinning the substrate; forming a distributed bragg reflector (dbr) on the second surface of the substrate; and cutting and splitting the dbr, the substrate and the epitaxial layer. by adoption of the manufacturing method, the light emitting efficiency of the light emitting diode can be improved.
rewritten: the invention discloses a manufacturing method for an led chip within the semiconductor field. the method includes the following steps: first, an n-type layer, a light-emitting layer, and a p-type layer are sequentially grown on the first surface of a substrate to form an epitaxial layer. a groove extending from the p-type layer to the n-type layer is then formed within the p-type layer. next, a current barrier layer is established on the p-type layer, followed by the deposition of a transparent conductive thin film on both the current barrier layer and the p-type layer. an insulating layer, comprising multiple insulating units arranged with spaces between them, is applied to the area of the transparent conductive thin film overlying the current barrier layer. high-temperature thermal annealing is performed on the transparent conductive thin film while it is sheltered by the insulating layer. after annealing, a p-type electrode is formed on the portion of the transparent conductive thin film corresponding to the current barrier layer, and an n-type electrode is formed on the n-type layer. the substrate is then thinned, and a distributed bragg reflector (dbr) is formed on the second surface of the substrate. finally, the dbr, substrate, and epitaxial layer are cut and separated. through this method, the light-emitting efficiency of the led is improved.

raw: to justify the use of the external reinforcement with the composite materials in the strengthening of reinforced ferroconcrete structures of hydraulic erections, a complex research was carried out. the method of calculation of strength of ferroconcrete structures of hydraulic erections, reinforced by external reinforcement by composite materials under the action of cross forces was developed. in order to justify the experimental design procedure the strength of reinforced concrete structures of hydraulic structures models, reinforced by an external reinforcement based on carbon tape and carbon composite slats, under the action of shear forces (with bending moments) was studied.
rewritten: a comprehensive study was conducted to validate the application of external composite material reinforcement in strengthening reinforced ferroconcrete structures of hydraulic facilities. a method for calculating the strength of these ferroconcrete structures—when externally reinforced with composite materials and subjected to transverse forces—was developed. additionally, to support the experimental design process, the strength of reinforced concrete models of hydraulic structures, which were strengthened using external reinforcement made from carbon tape and carbon composite slats, was examined under shear forces combined with bending moments.

raw: the invention discloses a laser interferometric lithography system with the application of blazed grating. the laser interferometric lithography system comprises a light source module, a beam spread collimation module, a multiple beam split and beam combination module and a substrate holder. the light source module comprises a coherent light source, a first lens, a second lens and blazed grating. a laser beam emitted from the coherent light source successively passes through the first lens and the second lens and then passes through a reflector to make a light path bend over, and light is illuminated on the blazed grating. a light beam with wave length being equal to first-order blaze wavelength after blazed grating diffraction passes through a small aperture to be emitted out, and then passes through the beam spread collimation module and the multiple beam split and beam combination module to be split into multiple coherent light beams. the multiple coherent light beams are simultaneously converged and illuminated onto the substrate surface on the substrate holder. the system provided by the invention has advantages of high efficiency of light energy utilization and long coherence length. flexibility and tolerance for light path adjustment are enhanced, linewidth requirement of a laser light source is also reduced, and selection range of the laser light source is broadened.
rewritten: the disclosed invention relates to a laser interferometric lithography system that incorporates a blazed grating. this system includes a light source module, a beam spreading and collimation module, a module for multiple beam splitting and recombination, and a substrate holder. within the light source module, there is a coherent light source, a first lens, a second lens, and a blazed grating. light generated by the coherent source first passes through the first lens followed by the second lens, then is redirected by a reflector that changes its course, and subsequently illuminates the blazed grating. after diffraction by the blazed grating, the light beam having a wavelength equivalent to the first-order blaze wavelength passes through a small aperture before being emitted. this emitted beam then travels through the beam spreading and collimation module and the multiple beam splitting and recombination module, where it is divided into several coherent light beams. these beams are simultaneously converged and directed onto the substrate held by the substrate holder. this system offers several benefits, including efficient utilization of light energy, an extended coherence length, improved flexibility and tolerance in light path adjustments, reduced linewidth requirements for the laser light source, and an expanded range of acceptable laser light sources.

raw: the utility model relates to a monitoring technology field, more specifically relate to a liquid level monitoring device, a serial communication port, including liquid level monitoring end, correction data input module and liquid -level monitoring ware (2). pressure monitoring ware (1) and hollow tube (100) is drawn together to liquid level monitoring hand ladle, pressure monitoring ware (1) is including a casing (101), be equipped with an airtight gas chamber (103) in casing (101), airtight gas chamber (103) with hollow tube (100) are linked together, be equipped with pressure sensor (104) in airtight gas chamber (103), pressure sensor (104) are used for detecting the atmospheric pressure in airtight gas chamber (103). liquid -level monitoring ware (2) are used for showing liquid level information. the utility model discloses a hollow tube and coordinate the digital filtering algorithm can the fluctuation of better ground filtering liquid level to liquid level measurement's influence, avoided the sensor direct with surveyed fluid contact, solved corruption and the pollution problem to the sensor of pesticide or auxiliary agent betterly. in addition, in use need not leave a blank in liquid level top basically, and complete equipment is small, light in weight, low power dissipation, is applicable to very much the liquid level monitoring of the so small -size container of agricultural plant protection unmanned aerial vehicle medical kit.
rewritten: the utility model is related to the field of monitoring technology, and more specifically to a liquid level monitoring device. this device features a serial communication port and comprises a liquid level monitoring unit, a correction data input module, a liquid level display component (2), a pressure monitoring component (1), and a hollow tube (100). together, these components form a handheld liquid level monitoring instrument. the pressure monitoring component (1) includes a casing (101) that houses an airtight gas chamber (103). the airtight gas chamber (103) is connected to the hollow tube (100) and contains a pressure sensor (104), which is employed to detect the atmospheric pressure within the chamber. the liquid level display component (2) serves to show the liquid level information. this utility model discloses that the hollow tube, in conjunction with a digital filtering algorithm, effectively mitigates the influence of fluctuation from the ground filtering on the liquid level measurement, and prevents direct contact between the sensor and the measured liquid. this design effectively addresses the problems of sensor contamination and pollution by pesticides or auxiliary agents. moreover, during operation there is essentially no need to leave an empty space at the top of the liquid level. the complete device is compact, lightweight, and exhibits low power consumption, making it ideal for monitoring the liquid level in small containers such as those found in agricultural plant protection equipment, unmanned aerial vehicles, or medical kits.

raw: electric power systems constitute the fundamental infrastructure of modern society. though continental in scale, they have virtually penetrated across places. thus, access to electricity is a challenge during the blackout situation. though failures are rare events, when they occur cause an catastrophic effect on the society on the whole. the services have to be restored as quickly as possible in order to minimize its consequences. therefore, it is essential to be aware of the concepts and issues in the entire restoration process along with the mechanisms that need to be developed for quicker dissemination of information. this paper thus explores the need and the challenges encountered for restoration especially in the transmission sector. the paper further elaborates the use of artificial neural network (ann) for determining the affected nodes and the restoration plan to be executed. this is followed by the providing the quantitative evaluation of the system developed.
rewritten: modern society relies on electric power systems as the backbone of its infrastructure. although these systems cover a vast, often continental area, they have reached nearly every location. therefore, during a blackout, ensuring access to electricity becomes a significant challenge. while failures are infrequent, their occurrence can have devastating consequences for society as a whole. it is imperative to restore services as swiftly as possible to minimize these adverse effects. understanding the concepts and issues inherent in the entire restoration process, as well as establishing efficient mechanisms for rapid information dissemination, is crucial. this paper investigates the necessity and challenges associated with restoration, particularly within the transmission sector. it further discusses the application of artificial neural networks (ann) to identify affected nodes and to devise an effective restoration plan, followed by a quantitative evaluation of the developed system.

raw: pediatric primary care providers (pcps) play a critical role in caring for children with mental health concerns. some states have introduced programs to support pcps in managing these patients more independently. the massachusetts child psychiatry access project consultation program is one example. this study compared responses from pcps in massachusetts (n = 73) with pcps in indiana (n = 33), a state without a consultation program, to vignettes about children with possible attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder or depression. participants from ma indicated a stronger interest in behavioral health issues and were more likely to screen patients. pcps from in were more likely to have completed a rotation in developmental and behavioral pediatrics during residency. in respondents were also more likely to choose the correct diagnosis for vignettes and less likely to refer to a psychiatric provider for psychotropic medication. results suggest greater independence for pcps in in.
rewritten: pediatric primary care providers (pcps) are essential in addressing mental health issues in children. in some states, initiatives have been introduced to help pcps manage these cases more autonomously; one such initiative is the massachusetts child psychiatry access project consultation program. this study compared responses from massachusetts pcps (n = 73) with those from indiana (n = 33)—a state without a similar consultation program—using vignettes involving children with potential attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder or depression. massachusetts participants showed a greater interest in behavioral health issues and were more likely to conduct patient screenings, whereas indiana pcps were more often trained in developmental and behavioral pediatrics during residency. additionally, indiana respondents were more likely to correctly diagnose the vignettes and less inclined to refer patients to psychiatric providers for psychotropic medication. these results suggest that the indiana pcps tend to manage these cases more independently.

raw: paper summarised the proposals of fourteen new alternative indexes intended for road roughness evaluation of longitudinal road profile, which have been introduced in the last decade approximately. the main advantages of proposed indexes are: (1) effort to reflect the most of ride quality aspects such as ride comfort, ride safety and dynamic load of road or cargo; (2) using the in situ measurements of vibration response or subjective perception of vibration; (3) effort to reflect the vehicle responses such as roll and pitch vibration, or longitudinal and lateral vibration; (4) effort to detect the critical parts of road in a spatial domain; and (5) effort to reflect a vehicle velocity. the main limitations of proposed indexes are: (1) many proposals are only alternative to the international roughness index (iri) or are based on the iri procedure; (2) a simple one-dimensional vehicle model is often used with the constant parameters and velocity; and (3) orientation to one vibration response category as ride...
rewritten: this paper summarizes the proposals of approximately fourteen new alternative indexes developed over the past decade for evaluating road roughness using the longitudinal road profile. the key benefits of the proposed indexes include: (1) an effort to capture various aspects of ride quality such as comfort, safety, and the dynamic load on the road or cargo; (2) the use of in situ vibration response measurements or subjective perceptions of vibration; (3) the aim to incorporate vehicle responses, including roll, pitch, as well as longitudinal and lateral vibrations; (4) the attempt to pinpoint critical road segments within a spatial context; and (5) the effort to consider vehicle speed. however, the proposed indexes also have some limitations: (1) many of the proposals serve as alternatives to the international roughness index (iri) or are based on the iri methodology; (2) a simplified one-dimensional vehicle model is frequently applied with fixed parameters and constant velocity; and (3) there is a tendency to focus on a single category of vibration response, such as ride...

raw: the present invention relates to: an oral film preparation obtained by spreading a solution containing a high potency drug and a film forming polymer and then drying the same; a method for manufacturing an oral film preparation containing a high potency drug, said method comprising spreading a solution containing the high potency drug and a film forming polymer and then drying the same; and a package obtained by (a) packaging the oral film preparation in a packaging material and, after nitrogen substitution, sealing, and/or (b) sealing the oral film preparation together with a deoxidizing agent in a packaging material. provided are: an oral film preparation that contains a high potency drug and has excellent uniformity of the content; a method for easily manufacturing an oral film preparation that contains a high potency drug and has excellent uniformity of the content; and a highly stable package that contains the oral film preparation.
rewritten: this invention relates to an oral film preparation that is made by applying a solution containing a high potency drug and a film-forming polymer onto a surface, followed by drying. it also describes a method for making such an oral film preparation, which involves spreading a solution—with the high potency drug and film-forming polymer—and then drying it. additionally, the invention covers a package for the oral film, which is either (a) produced by placing the film in a packaging material, performing a nitrogen substitution, and then sealing it, or (b) produced by sealing the film together with a deoxidizing agent within a packaging material. in summary, the invention provides an oral film preparation that guarantees excellent content uniformity of the high potency drug, a straightforward manufacturing method to achieve this uniformity, and a highly stable packaging solution.

raw: the crack propagation behavior of the material polymethyl methacrylate with flaws under the effects of explosive stress waves were studied using a digital laser dynamic caustics method. four different kinds of experimental conditions were set: open joints, closed joints, confined pressure around the specimen, and double boreholes. a digital high-speed camera was utilized to record a series of dynamic caustics spots at the tip of the propagation wing cracks. the cracks' paths and the dynamic stress intensity factor (dsif) at the tip of the two wing cracks are evaluated. crack patterns, variation of dsif, and the mechanisms of the wing cracking process are analyzed and discussed. the results provided an effective experimental basis for evaluating and designing directional controlled blasting for excavating rock faces and tunnels.
rewritten: the propagation behavior of cracks in polymethyl methacrylate containing flaws under explosive stress waves was investigated using a digital laser dynamic caustics technique. four different experimental setups were employed: open joints, closed joints, confined pressure around the specimen, and double boreholes. a high-speed digital camera captured a series of dynamic caustic patterns at the tips of the propagating wing cracks. researchers evaluated the trajectories of these cracks and calculated the dynamic stress intensity factor (dsif) at the tips of the two wing cracks. the study analyzes and discusses the crack patterns, dsif variations, and the underlying mechanisms of the wing cracking process. ultimately, the findings offer a valuable experimental foundation for assessing and designing directional controlled blasting techniques used in excavating rock faces and tunnels.

raw: the epicardial adipose tissue (eat) is a reservoir of adipose-derived stem cells (ascs), with as yet unknown effects on myocardial and coronary arteries homeostasis. the purpose of this study was to investigate the angiogenic function of epicardial ascs and their regulation by the common cardiovascular risk factors (cvrfs) affecting heart disease. epicardial fat was obtained from a rodent model with clustering of cvrfs [zucker diabetic fatty (zdf)-leprfa] rats and from their lean control (zdf-crl) littermates without cvrfs, ascs were isolated, and their function was assessed by proliferation and differentiation assays, flow cytometry, gene expression, and in vivo matrigel angiogenesis analysis. epicardial ascs from both groups showed adipogenic and osteogenic differentiation capacity; however, epicardial ascs from cvrf animals had a lesser ability to form tubular structures in vitro after endothelial differentiation, as well as a reduced angiogenic potential in vivo compared to control animals. epicardial...
rewritten: epicardial adipose tissue (eat) is a source of adipose-derived stem cells (ascs), whose roles in maintaining the homeostasis of the myocardium and coronary arteries are still not fully understood. this study aimed to explore the angiogenic capabilities of epicardial ascs and to determine how common cardiovascular risk factors (cvrfs) associated with heart disease might regulate these functions. for this purpose, epicardial fat was collected from a rodent model exhibiting clustered cvrfs (zucker diabetic fatty [zdf]-leprfa rats) and from their lean control (zdf-crl) littermates, which do not have these risk factors. the ascs were isolated and their function was evaluated using proliferation and differentiation assays, flow cytometry, gene expression studies, and an in vivo matrigel angiogenesis assay. although ascs from both groups were capable of adipogenic and osteogenic differentiation, those derived from animals with cvrfs showed a reduced ability to form tubular structures in vitro following endothelial differentiation, as well as a diminished angiogenic potential in vivo, compared to the control group.

raw: a work machine control system is configured to control a work machine that travels on a travel route and includes a position detection unit, a non-contact sensor, and a control unit. the position detection unit detects a position of the work machine. the non-contact sensor detects a position of an object around the work machine. the control unit extracts information on an object to be detected from a detection result of the position detection unit and a detection result of the non-contact sensor, and excludes the information on an object to be detected inside a mask region that is set so as to include a terrain change portion that is a portion in which a terrain changes by use of a machine among portions around the travel route.
rewritten: a work machine control system is designed to manage a work machine that moves along a travel route. the system includes a position detection unit, a non-contact sensor, and a control unit. the position detection unit determines the location of the work machine, while the non-contact sensor identifies the positions of objects around the machine. the control unit then takes the detection results from both the position detection unit and the non-contact sensor, extracts information about an object that needs to be detected, and disregards any such information located within a masked region. this mask is defined to cover areas where the terrain changes due to the operation of machinery along the travel route.

raw: a photoacoustic measurement device and probe, wherein artifacts derived from photoacoustic waves generated at the surface portion of a test object are reduced in quantity without any lengthening of the photoacoustic measurement repetition period. a measurement light emitting part 12 emits measurement light at the test object. an acoustic wave detector 11 detects photoacoustic waves generated within the test object as a result of the measurement light. a correction light source 13 emits correction light at the test object. an optical intensity detector 14 detects reflected light produced by the correction light emitted at the test object being reflected by the test object. in a probe 10, the correction light source 13 and the optical intensity detector 14 are arranged between the measurement light emitting part 12 and the acoustic wave detector 11.
rewritten: a photoacoustic measurement device and probe are provided, in which artifacts caused by photoacoustic waves generated at the test object’s surface are reduced without increasing the measurement repetition period. a measurement light emitting component (12) directs measurement light onto the test object, while an acoustic wave detector (11) picks up the photoacoustic waves produced inside the test object by that light. additionally, a correction light source (13) emits correction light onto the test object, and an optical intensity detector (14) monitors the light reflected from the test object as a result. in probe (10), the correction light source (13) and the optical intensity detector (14) are positioned between the measurement light emitter (12) and the acoustic wave detector (11).

raw: the invention discloses a synchronization device and method for a full duplex quantum key distribution system based on the same wavelength. on a transmitting end, a synchronous light laser is used for sending synchronous light with the wavelength of (formula), a synchronous light modulation circuit at the transmitting end is used for modulating the synchronous light, a circulator is used for separating the synchronous light in a receiving direction and the synchronous light in a transmitting direction, and a wavelength division multiplexer wdm is used for sending the synchronous light and the quantum light to the receiving end after polymerization; on the receiving end, a wavelength division multiplexer wdm is used for receiving the synchronous light and the quantum light and respectively carrying out wavelength division on the synchronous light and the quantum light to ports (formula) and (formula), a synchronous light detector is used for carrying out photovoltaic conversion on the synchronous light, and a synchronous light detection post-processing circuit is used for processing an electric signal to form a synchronous signal which is enabled by a quantum light detector and is used for carrying out detection triggering on the detector. according to the device and the method, the wavelength type is decreased, the complexity for a light path system is reduced, and the network structure is simplified; the influence of optical attenuation and chromatic dispersion on the synchronous light and the quantum light is reduced, and the influence of the change of the speed of light due to the different wavelengths on the system is avoided.
rewritten: the invention presents a synchronization device and method for a full duplex quantum key distribution system that uses a single wavelength. on the transmitting side, a synchronous light laser emits light at a specific wavelength (formula), which is then modulated by a synchronous light modulation circuit. a circulator separates the synchronous light meant for transmission from the synchronous light directed toward reception. following this, a wavelength division multiplexer (wdm) combines the synchronous light with the quantum light before sending them to the receiving end. on the receiving side, a wdm initially separates the incoming synchronous light and quantum light into designated ports (formula) and (formula), respectively. the synchronous light is then converted into an electrical signal by a synchronous light detector through photovoltaic conversion, and a subsequent synchronous light detection post-processing circuit processes this signal to generate a synchronous signal. this signal, in turn, triggers the quantum light detector for proper detection. with this design and method, the system reduces the number of wavelengths involved, simplifies the optical path, and streamlines the overall network architecture. moreover, it minimizes the adverse effects of optical attenuation and chromatic dispersion on both the synchronous and quantum light, while also preventing issues arising from variations in light speed due to wavelength differences.

raw: abstract : with long-term fiscal challenges likely to continue, dod must operate strategically and efficiently, to include cost-effective management of its human capital. section 955 of the ndaa for fy 2013 requires dod to, among other things, develop and implement a plan to achieve savings in total funding for civilian and contracted services workforces from fys 2012 through 2017. section 955 also includes a provision that gao review the section 955 status reports dod submits to congress to determine whether the required savings are being achieved and the plan is being implemented consistently with workforce-management laws. this report addresses the extent to which dods february 2016 status report demonstrates dods (1) achievement of savings and (2) development and implementation of its efficiencies plan that is consistent with workforce management laws in fy 2015. gao reviewed dods report and interviewed dod officials. gao previously recommended that dod fully address ongoing section 955 requirements, such as including an efficiencies plan, among other things, in its subsequent reports. dod agreed but has not yet implemented them. gao is not making any new recommendations, but believes fully implementing the previous ones would better inform congress. in comments, dod stated it had implemented gaos previous recommendations. dod has taken some action, but gao disagrees the recommendations have been fully implemented, as discussed in this report.
rewritten: abstract: with ongoing long-term fiscal challenges, the department of defense must operate both strategically and efficiently, including the cost-effective management of its human capital. section 955 of the national defense authorization act for fiscal year 2013 mandates, among other things, that the department develop and implement a plan to generate savings in total funding for its civilian and contracted services workforces from fys 2012 to 2017. additionally, section 955 requires the government accountability office (gao) to review the status reports submitted by the department to congress to assess whether these required savings are being achieved and whether the plan is being implemented in accordance with workforce-management laws. this report examines the extent to which the department’s february 2016 status report demonstrates (1) the achievement of the required savings and (2) the development and implementation of an efficiencies plan in compliance with workforce-management laws for fy 2015. gao reviewed the department’s report and conducted interviews with department officials. previously, gao recommended that the department fully address the ongoing requirements of section 955—such as incorporating an efficiencies plan in future reports. although the department agreed to these recommendations, they have not yet been completely implemented. gao is not introducing new recommendations but maintains that fully implementing the earlier suggestions would provide congress with better insight. in its comments, the department stated that it had implemented gao’s previous recommendations; however, while some steps have been taken, gao disagrees that the recommendations have been fully implemented, as discussed in this report.

raw: problem to be solved: to provide an optical connector that is easy to assemble and is reduced in size.solution: a plug-side optical connector 10 is designed to be coupled to a coupling part 122 of a receptacle-side optical connector 100 and includes; a plug-side coupling part 22; a ferrule 11 having a flanged section; a housing that covers at least a portion of an optical fiber extending from the ferrule 11; and an elastic member 42 located further on a side of the receptacle-side optical connector 100 from the flanged section and designed to exert repulsive force by compressively deforming between the housing and the receptacle-side optical connector 100 when being connected to the receptacle-side optical connector 100.selected drawing: figure 2
rewritten: problem to be solved: provide an optical connector that is both easy to assemble and compact. solution: the plug-side optical connector 10 is designed to mate with the coupling part 122 of the receptacle-side optical connector 100. it comprises: • a plug-side coupling part 22. • a ferrule 11 that includes a flanged section. • a housing that covers at least part of an optical fiber extending from the ferrule 11. • an elastic member 42, which is positioned on the side farther from the receptacle-side optical connector 100 compared to the flanged section. this elastic member is engineered to compress and deform, thereby exerting a repulsive force between the housing and the receptacle-side optical connector 100 during the connection process. selected drawing: figure 2.

raw: the utility model discloses an apparatus for producing of bio -feritlizer belongs to the production facility field, including mixing arrangement, fermenting installation, crushing mixing arrangement, the device of pelletizing, sieve device and automatic packing device, its characterized in that: mixing arrangement, fermenting installation, smash mixing arrangement, the device of pelletizing, sieve device and automatic packing device connect gradually through conveyer, the mixing arrangement bottom is connected with the steam drum who is used for steam sterilization. the utility model discloses can avoid in the fermentation iron rust to the pollution of fermentation, whole production process is smooth, simple.
rewritten: the utility model presents an apparatus for the production of bio-fertilizer, which falls within the field of production facilities. the apparatus comprises a mixing assembly, a fermentation unit, a crushing and mixing system, a pelletizing device, a screening component, and an automatic packing system. these units are sequentially connected using conveyors, and the bottom of the mixing assembly is linked to a steam drum for steam sterilization. this design effectively prevents iron rust from contaminating the fermentation process, ensuring that the entire production process remains smooth and straightforward.

raw: this article is devoted to the architecture analysis of the lost astrakhan church of the nativity of the blessed virgin (17071722) which distinctive feature is application of an element of the west european volume and spatial composition two belltowers on the western facade. the question of emergence of this type construction in astrakhan temple architecture of the beginning of the xviii century remained beyond the scope of scientific researches earlier. the analysis of the publications opening a subject of the known temples having the similar volume and spatial decision gives the chance to claim that the considered monument is the first stone orthodox church with two belfries in the territory of russia. in the offered publication possible influences on conditions of emergence of this unique monument in astrakhan are investigated.
rewritten: this article examines the architectural features of the lost astrakhan church of the nativity of the blessed virgin (1707–1722), which is notable for integrating an element of west european design—a pair of belltowers on the western façade—into its volume and spatial composition. until now, the emergence of this construction type within early 18th-century astrakhan temple architecture had not been thoroughly explored in academic studies. a review of literature on similar temples with comparable spatial and volumetric solutions suggests that this monument was likely the first stone orthodox church in russia to feature two belfries. the article also investigates the possible factors and influences that led to the creation of this unique monument in astrakhan.

raw: the feasibility of efficient focusing of high-power pulsed x-ray radiation generated by explosive electron emission from carbon nanoclusters is shown by direct experiments with the use of polycapillary x-ray optics. it is shown that the x-ray spot in the focus of the polycapillary lens can be reduced to 1/20 of its initial size.
rewritten: direct experiments demonstrate that high-power pulsed x-ray radiation—produced through explosive electron emission from carbon nanoclusters—can be efficiently focused using polycapillary x-ray optics. moreover, these experiments show that the x-ray spot at the focal point of the polycapillary lens can be narrowed to just one-twentieth of its original size.

raw: the utility model discloses a tealeaves frying pan that jet stir -fry system is more even, including electric stove body and embedded frying pan in the electric stove body, electric stove body bottom is equipped with the base, electric stove body top articulates there is the upper cover, the upper cover middle part is equipped with the through -hole, be equipped with the horizontal pole of fixed connection in the through -hole inner wall in the through -hole, the horizontal pole middle part is equipped with the connecting hole, the upper cover top is equipped with the support, the support top is equipped with the air pump, the support bottom is equipped with the trachea that runs through in the connecting hole, be equipped with the gas pocket on the trachea, electric stove body one side is equipped with the block terminal, be equipped with electric stove control switch and air pump control switch on the block terminal, the air pump can lead to the air passing hole blowout with gas, and spun gas makes the interior tealeaves of frying pan obtain upset incessantly for tealeaves is more even with the frying pan contact, avoids the tealeaves system of frying uneven, and same frying process does not need the artifical system of frying, saves a large amount of labours, improves the efficiency of the tealeaves system of frying.
rewritten: the utility model describes a tea leaves frying pan with a jet stir-fry system for more even cooking. the system comprises an electric stove body with an embedded frying pan. the bottom of the stove is fitted with a base, while the top features a pivoted upper cover that includes a central through-hole. inside this through-hole, a fixed horizontal pole is attached to the inner wall, and the middle of this pole has a connecting hole. on the top of the upper cover, a support is installed, which holds an air pump at its apex. the bottom of the support connects to a conduit that passes through the connecting hole, and this conduit is equipped with a gas pocket. one side of the stove body has a block terminal housing both an electric stove control switch and an air pump control switch. the air pump directs air through the passage to blow gas, causing the gas to spin and continuously stir the tea leaves within the frying pan. this action ensures consistent contact between the tea leaves and the frying pan, preventing uneven frying. consequently, the system eliminates the need for manual stirring during the frying process, saving labor and improving overall frying efficiency.

raw: new classes of exact solutions which could serve as sources for the reissner-nordstrom metric representing the exterior gravitational field of an isolated charged sphere are derived. firstly, we sacrifice the requirement that the stellar centre is free of a singularity and then obtain a core-envelope model. the charged fluid envelope is matched suitably to the neutral core and the vacuum exterior solution. next we investigate models of charged stars that are regular at the stellar centre. the einstein-maxwell system of partial differential equations is reduced to the study of a single first-order differential equation in which two of the matter or geometrical variables must be specified at the outset. in each case mentioned above, new exact models are found by choosing functional forms for the electric field intensity and one of the gravitational potentials. a riccati equation is then solved to obtain the remaining potential. the charged spherical shell model as well as the non-singular models are shown to display necessary qualitative features that are demanded for physical acceptability. it is shown that the regular model has a vanishing pressure-free hypersurface. the density and pressure profiles are positive and monotonically decreasing outwards from the centre of the sphere for a chosen set of parameters. the weak strong and dominant energy conditions are also satisfied. a drawback of the model is that the causality criterion is not satisfied within the fluid boundary.
rewritten: new families of exact solutions have been derived that can act as sources for the reissner-nordström metric, which represents the exterior gravitational field of an isolated charged sphere. initially, by relinquishing the requirement of a singularity-free stellar center, a core-envelope model is obtained. in this model, the charged fluid envelope is appropriately matched to both the neutral core and the vacuum exterior solution. subsequently, models of charged stars that remain regular at the center are explored. the einstein-maxwell system of partial differential equations is simplified to a single first-order differential equation, with two matter or geometrical variables specified in advance. in each case, new exact solutions emerge by choosing particular functional forms for the electric field intensity and one of the gravitational potentials, and a riccati equation is then solved to determine the remaining potential. both the charged spherical shell model and the nonsingular models exhibit the necessary qualitative features required for physical acceptability. it is demonstrated that the regular model possesses a hypersurface where the pressure vanishes. moreover, for a chosen set of parameters, the density and pressure profiles are positive and decrease monotonically from the center of the sphere outward. the weak, strong, and dominant energy conditions are also satisfied. however, one drawback of the model is that the causality criterion is not met within the fluid boundary.

raw: the invention relates to the technical field of steel plate manufacturing, in particular to a preparing method for film formation treating fluid used for phosphating steel plates. firstly, 5 parts of maleic anhydride and 20 parts of deionized water are added into a container and stirred for 5 minutes; then 2 parts of nitric acid is slowly added into and stirred and is continuously stirred for 5 minutes after being added; 7 parts of ammonium phosphate and 10 parts of deionized water are slowly added into and stirred and are continuously stirred for 5 minutes after being added; 0.5 part of anthracene is slowly added and stirred and is continuously stirred for 10 minutes after being added; and finally 6 parts of postassium hypochlorite and 10 parts of deionized water are quickly added into and stirred for 10 minutes. according to the preparing method for the film formation treating fluid, the dissolving property between all materials is improved by adding step by step and reasonably choosing material adding sequence, the possibility of particle aggregation is avoided, and the phosphating efficiency of the film formation treating fluid is obviously improved.
rewritten: this invention belongs to the technical field of steel plate manufacturing, specifically addressing a method for preparing a film formation treating fluid used in the phosphating of steel plates. first, 5 parts maleic anhydride and 20 parts deionized water are added to a container and stirred for 5 minutes. next, 2 parts nitric acid are gradually introduced while stirring, and the mixture is continuously stirred for an additional 5 minutes after the acid has been added. then, 7 parts ammonium phosphate and 10 parts deionized water are slowly incorporated with stirring, followed by continuous stirring for 5 more minutes. after that, 0.5 part anthracene is slowly added with stirring, and the mixture is stirred continuously for 10 minutes. finally, 6 parts potassium hypochlorite and 10 parts deionized water are quickly added and stirred for 10 minutes. this method improves the dissolving properties of all components by employing a step-by-step addition and a carefully selected sequence for adding materials, thereby preventing particle aggregation and significantly enhancing the phosphating efficiency of the film formation treating fluid.

raw: the invention provides an estriol-specificity-resistant monoclonal antibody hybridoma cell strain nan-2 and application thereof and belongs to the technical field of food safety immune detection. the estriol-specificity-resistant monoclonal antibody hybridoma cell strain nan-2 is preserved in general microbiology center, microbial preservation management committee, china, and the preservation number is cgmcc no. 12016. an estriol-specificity-resistant monoclonal antibody is generated by secretion of the hybridoma cell strain nan-2. the monoclonal antibody secreted by the cell strain has good specificity to estriol (the ic 50 value is 0.25 ng/ml) and can be used for estriol specificity detection in food safety. the obtained estriol-resistant monoclonal antibody cell strain has good detection sensitivity and appetency to estriol, a novel method for synthesizing estriol immunogen is further provided, the synthesis step of hapten is more simplified and effective, and a thought and method for synthesizing immunogen are provided for people to conduct research in the future.
rewritten: this invention relates to an estriol-specificity-resistant monoclonal antibody hybridoma cell strain named nan-2 and its application in the field of food safety immune detection. the nan-2 cell strain is maintained by the general microbiology center of the microbial preservation management committee in china under preservation number cgmcc no. 12016. the hybridoma cell strain nan-2 produces an estriol-specificity-resistant monoclonal antibody, which shows excellent specificity for estriol (with an ic50 value of 0.25 ng/ml) and can therefore be utilized for detecting estriol in food safety applications. moreover, this estriol-resistant monoclonal antibody cell strain demonstrates high detection sensitivity and strong binding to estriol. the invention also provides a new method for synthesizing an estriol immunogen with a simplified and efficient hapten synthesis process, offering a fresh approach for future research into immunogen synthesis.

raw: the matter-antimatter asymmetry problem, corresponding to the virtual nonexistence of antimatter in the universe, is one of the greatest mysteries of cosmology. within the framework of the generation model (gm) of particle physics, it is demonstrated that the matter-antimatter asymmetry problem may be understood in terms of the composite leptons and quarks of the gm. it is concluded that there is essentially no matter-antimatter asymmetry in the present universe and that the observed hydrogen-antihydrogen asymmetry may be understood in terms of statistical fluctuations associated with the complex many-body processes involved in the formation of either a hydrogen atom or an antihydrogen atom.
rewritten: one of the biggest puzzles in cosmology is the matter-antimatter asymmetry problem, which refers to the virtually complete absence of antimatter in the universe. within the framework of the generation model (gm) in particle physics, it is shown that this asymmetry can be explained by the composite nature of leptons and quarks described by the gm. the conclusion is that the current universe essentially lacks a true matter-antimatter imbalance and that the observed discrepancy between hydrogen and antihydrogen is likely due to statistical fluctuations related to the complex many-body processes involved in forming a hydrogen or an antihydrogen atom.

raw: the sternalis muscle, an uncommon anatomical variant of the chest wall musculature, though perhaps well known to anatomists, is quite unfamiliar to clinicians and radiologists despite attempts to highlight its clinical importance in recent years. during routine dissection for undergraduate medical teaching, in the department of anatomy, we came across two cases of sternalis muscle. the first was a unique case of unilateral right sternalis with contralateral insertion on the left sternocleidomastoid, and the second case where bilateral presence of the muscle was noted with ipsilateral insertion. the former was supplied by medial pectoral nerve and the latter by lower intercostal nerves. usually present between the pectoral and superficial fasciae, wide ranging prevalence and morphology have been attributed to this muscular variant. opinions differ on its development and nerve supply. its presence can be misdiagnosed as a wide range of benign and malignant anterior chest wall lesions and tumours, but it is also of great use as a pedicle flap or flap microvascular anastomosis in reconstructive surgeries of anterior chest wall, head and neck and breast. in this paper, two cases of sternalis muscle which presented very differently from each other are discussed.
rewritten: the sternalis muscle is an uncommon variant of chest wall anatomy that, while perhaps familiar to anatomists, remains largely unknown among clinicians and radiologists despite recent efforts to emphasize its clinical significance. during routine dissections for undergraduate medical instruction in the anatomy department, we identified two cases of the sternalis muscle. in the first case, there was a unique presentation involving a unilateral right sternalis muscle that inserted contralaterally on the left sternocleidomastoid muscle, while the second case showed the muscle present bilaterally with ipsilateral insertions. the first case received its nerve supply from the medial pectoral nerve, whereas the second was innervated by the lower intercostal nerves. typically located between the pectoral fascia and the superficial fascia, the sternalis muscle is known for its variable prevalence and morphology. there is ongoing debate regarding its developmental origin and nerve supply. although its presence might be mistaken for a range of benign or malignant anterior chest wall lesions and tumors, it also proves beneficial as a pedicle flap or source for flap microvascular anastomosis in reconstructive surgeries of the anterior chest wall, head and neck, and breasts. this paper discusses two distinctly different presentations of the sternalis muscle.

raw: provided are compositions and methods for inducing expression of human beta-globin in erythrocytes for use in prophylaxis and/or therapy of a hemoglobinopathy in an individual. the method generally entails introducing into cd34+ cells a polynucleotide encoding: i) a 5' long terminal repeat (ltr) and a self-inactivating 3' ltr; ii) at least one polyadenylation signal; iii) at least one promoter; iv) a globin gene locus control region (lcr); v) an ankyrin insulator element (ank); vi) a woodchuck post-regulatory element (wpre) configured such that the wpre does not integrate into a target genome; and vii) a sequence that is a reverse complement of a sequence encoding human beta-globin, and can include beta-globin that has a pt87q mutation. intron 2 of the beta globin gene can be a complete intron. modified erythrocyte progenitor cells, recombinant vectors and virions comprising recombinant polynucleotides, and methods of making the vectors and virions are included.
rewritten: the invention relates to compositions and techniques for inducing the expression of human beta-globin in erythrocytes, which can be applied for the prevention and/or treatment of hemoglobin disorders in individuals. generally, the method involves introducing into cd34+ cells a polynucleotide that encodes the following components: (i) a 5' long terminal repeat (ltr) along with a self-inactivating 3' ltr; (ii) at least one polyadenylation signal; (iii) at least one promoter; (iv) a locus control region (lcr) for the globin gene; (v) an ankyrin insulator element (ank); (vi) a woodchuck post-regulatory element (wpre) designed so that the wpre does not become integrated into the target genome; and (vii) a sequence corresponding to the reverse complement of a sequence encoding human beta-globin, which can include a beta-globin gene with a pt87q mutation. in this context, intron 2 of the beta-globin gene may be a full-length intron. the scope of the invention also covers modified erythrocyte progenitor cells, recombinant vectors and virions that include these recombinant polynucleotides, as well as methods for producing these vectors and virions.

raw: since the 1990s, south korea has been rapidly changing into a multicultural society. this change means young learners must be taught how to become regional, national, and international citizens. this paper describes the notion of global citizenship by analyzing cosmopolitan citizens and the limitations of early childhood teacher education programs in south korea. additionally, it suggests three methods through which pre/in-service early childhood teachers can become cosmopolitan citizens and can appropriately educate (future) children on global citizenship: (1) becoming a teacher with multiple identities, (2) becoming a socially aware teacher, and (3) becoming a teacher who is a participatory citizen. lastly, this paper contains considerations on early childhood teacher education policy and future research in regard to global citizenship.
rewritten: since the 1990s, south korea has been rapidly evolving into a multicultural society. this transformation necessitates that young learners be educated to function as regional, national, and international citizens. this paper explores the concept of global citizenship by examining cosmopolitan citizens and identifying the limitations present within early childhood teacher education programs in south korea. moreover, it proposes three approaches through which pre-service and in-service early childhood educators can evolve into cosmopolitan citizens and effectively teach (future) children about global citizenship: (1) adopting multiple teacher identities, (2) cultivating a socially conscious educator, and (3) embracing the role of a participatory citizen in teaching. finally, the paper offers reflections on early childhood teacher education policies and suggests areas for future research related to global citizenship.

raw: the utility model discloses a bbservation elevator's sliding support device, including cab wall panel and well wallboard, there is the direction extension board in cab wall panel's the outside through the bolt fastening, the middle part of direction extension board is equipped with the slide rail, the direction extension board about both ends all with the perpendicular pneumatic cylinder that is equipped with of extension board that leads, there is the guide rail in the outside of well wallboard through the bolt fastening, the top intermediate position of guide rail be equipped with with slide rail matched with track groove, both ends all are equipped with and stop a layer guide rail about the guide rail, the piston rod top of each pneumatic cylinder all is equipped with and stops a layer guide rail matched with u type guide slot, each u type guide slot lateral wall tip all is equipped with the bistable switch, each stop layer guide rail lateral wall all be equipped with with the bistable switch practical magnetism post that cooperatees, the utility model discloses simple structure, two pneumatic cylinders with stop 8 mutual brakings on layer guide rail, slide rail 3 and 6 mutual brakings on the guide rail stop layer braking 3 o'clock, it is fast that the car stops the interval velocity, it is high to stop layer stability, motion stability on the guide rail is high for the slide rail.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a sliding support device for an observation elevator. this device comprises a cab wall panel and a well wallboard. on the exterior of the cab wall panel, a direction extension board is bolted in place, and a slide rail is fixed along the middle section of this board. at both ends of the extension board, perpendicular pneumatic cylinders are installed. on the outside of the well wallboard, a guide rail is secured with bolts. near the top middle of this guide rail, another slide rail—designed to match a corresponding track groove—is provided, and both ends of the guide rail are fitted with stop layer guide rails. furthermore, at the top of the piston rod of each pneumatic cylinder, a stop layer guide rail is mounted that aligns with a u-type guide slot. each u-type guide slot features a bistable switch mounted at its lateral wall tip, while each stop layer guide rail has a cooperating magnetic post for the bistable switch attached to its lateral wall. overall, the design is characterized by its simple structure. with two pneumatic cylinders engaging eight contact points on the stop layer guide rail and additional engagements at positions corresponding to 3 and 6 o’clock on the guide rail stop layer, the system enables the car to stop rapidly while maintaining high stability at the stop layer and ensuring excellent motion stability along the guide rail.

raw: the present invention relates to an ore drawing experiment model employing a caving mining method. the ore drawing experiment model employing the caving mining method comprises: a pedestal, side stands, support frames, an angle adjustment frame, assembling plates, a bottom support device, a base plate, side fixed plates, a top surface fixed plate, a bottom panel, a plug board, route supports, a stable support, route supporting plates, stop blocks, route plug boards and route end plates. a plurality of ore drawing experiments with different ore bodies, mining parameters and mining methods may be achieved only by one ore drawing experiment device provided by the invention, therefore the manufacture cost of the model is saved, the required time of the experiment is reduced, and students may perform independently designed experiments by employing the model provided by the invention. the ore drawing experiment model employing a caving mining method may be used for scientific researches and also for teaching.
rewritten: the present invention relates to an ore drawing experimental model that utilizes a caving mining method. this experimental model includes a pedestal, side stands, support frames, an angle adjustment frame, assembling plates, a bottom support device, a base plate, side fixed plates, a top surface fixed plate, a bottom panel, a plug board, route supports, a stable support, route supporting plates, stop blocks, route plug boards, and route end plates. with this single device, it is possible to conduct multiple ore drawing experiments featuring different ore bodies, mining parameters, and mining methods. consequently, the invention helps reduce manufacturing costs, shorten the duration required for experiments, and allows students to conduct independently designed experiments. the ore drawing experimental model using a caving mining method can be applied in both scientific research and educational settings.

raw: the utility model relates to an on -vehicle technical field especially relates to an automobile -used high -power steady voltage delay timer, include: form the casing in a space, set up circuit board in the casing, detachably sets up casing one side and with the delay control ware that the circuit board is connected, and set firmly in the casing and with the relay that the circuit board is connected, the circuit board includes: preceding delay circuit module, with the back delay circuit module that preceding delay circuit module is connected, with the output control circuit module that back delay circuit module is connected, and with the high -power voltage stabilizing circuit module that the output control circuit module is connected, compared with the prior art, the utility model discloses have the functions such as emergence that realize mobile unit and the isolation of car storage battery, two delay control, steady voltage power supply and avoid automotive power decline phenomenon.
rewritten: the utility model pertains to the on-vehicle technical field and specifically to a high-power steady voltage delay timer designed for automobiles. its structure includes a casing arranged within a space, inside of which a circuit board is installed. one side of the casing is detachably fitted with a delay control device that is connected to the circuit board, while a relay, also connected to the circuit board, is firmly secured within the casing. the circuit board itself comprises several modules arranged in sequence: a preceding delay circuit module; connected thereto is a subsequent delay circuit module; following which, an output control circuit module is connected; and finally, a high-power voltage stabilizing circuit module is connected to the output control module. compared to the prior art, this utility model offers functions such as emergency operation with a mobile unit, isolation of the car storage battery, dual delay control, stabilized voltage supply, and mitigation of voltage drops in automotive power systems.

raw: the invention provides a whole-space synchronous monitoring camera system and a video stitching method. the system comprises at least two cameras, a video acquisition unit, a time synchronization unit, a transmission unit and a central processing unit. through enabling optical center axes of the at least two cameras to be intersected at the same point, whole-space photographing covering vertical 360-deg and horizontal 360-deg is realized; the time synchronization unit is used for time correction on video frames acquired by the cameras; and thus, the central processing unit can package video frame information with time stamps given by the time synchronization unit to form a video data packet with whole-space information. thus, a user terminal can synchronously monitor any direction in the whole space surrounding the camera in one video, a monitoring person can master the monitoring direction from the whole point of view, and technical effects of unified command and dispatch are achieved.
rewritten: the invention relates to a whole-space synchronous monitoring camera system and a video stitching method. this system includes at least two cameras, a video acquisition unit, a time synchronization unit, a transmission unit, and a central processing unit. by aligning the optical center axes of the cameras so that they intersect at a common point, the system achieves comprehensive photography, covering 360 degrees both vertically and horizontally. the time synchronization unit adjusts the video frame timing acquired by the cameras, allowing the central processing unit to combine the frame information with timestamps from the synchronization unit into a cohesive video data packet that represents the entire surrounding space. consequently, a user terminal can display a live monitor of any direction within the complete space in a single video feed, enabling a monitoring operator to oversee the environment from a unified perspective and ensuring coordinated command and dispatch.

raw: the present invention proposes a hydroelectric turbogenerator (10) comprising an outer tubular shell (12) with an inlet end (122) and an outlet end (124), a generator shell (14) defining an envelope with an inner region (ri), the generator shell (14) being centred relative to the outer shell (12) by supporting means in order to provide a passage region (rp) through which water can pass from the inlet end (122) to the outlet end (124). the hydroelectric turbogenerator (10) further comprises a shaft (20) coupled to a generator (24, 24'), in the inner region (ri) of the generator shell (14), and also coupled to a turbine (22) having a plurality of blades (222), the shaft (20) being rotatably mounted relative to the generator shell (14). according to the invention, the inner region (ri) of the generator shell (14) is filled with a liquid and the generator shell (14) has at least one equalising filter (16) allowing an exchange of liquid between the passage region (rp) and the inner region (ri) of the generator shell (14). advantageously, the liquid in the inner region (ri) of the generator shell (14) cools the generator (24, 24'), which is important to improve the performance of the generator (24, 24') and to preserve the integrity of the components of the hydroelectric turbogenerator (10).
rewritten: the invention relates to a hydroelectric turbogenerator that includes an outer tubular shell with designated inlet and outlet ends, and a generator shell defining an envelope with an internal region. this generator shell is centered within the outer shell using support structures, creating a passage through which water flows from the inlet to the outlet. the turbogenerator also features a shaft—situated in the generator shell’s internal region—that connects to both a generator and a turbine equipped with multiple blades; this shaft is mounted so that it can rotate relative to the generator shell. according to the invention, the generator shell’s internal region is immersed in a liquid, and the shell is equipped with at least one equalizing filter to allow liquid to circulate between the passageway and the internal region. this design advantageously uses the liquid to cool the generator, thereby enhancing its performance and maintaining the integrity of the turbogenerator's components.
