rewritten: the utility model concerns a lighting system that avoids dead angles. it features an led pen designed for convenient charging through a wireless system that operates while writing. in this system, a pair of led pen chargers uses electromagnetic induction to generate current for the pen’s power module, enabling wireless charging. additionally, the led pen is equipped with led lamp beads located near its nib, which focus light specifically on the writing area to ensure complete illumination without any unlit zones. the wireless charging system includes a pen container that houses a circuit for generating a magnetic field. this circuit, powered by external commercial power, creates a varying magnetic field that induces current in the led pen’s electromagnetic induction coil, subsequently charging the power module. as a result, the system provides a fast and convenient method for wireless charging.

raw: we report on the numerical design optimization of a new kind of relatively simple porous-core photonic crystal fiber (pcf) for terahertz (thz) waveguiding. a novel twist is introduced in the regular hexagonal pcf by including a diamond-shaped porous-core inside the hexagonal cladding. the numerical results obtained from an efficient finite-element method, which confirms a high birefringence of the order $10^{\mathrm {-2}}$ and low effective material loss of 0.07 cm $^{\mathrm {-1}}$ at 0.7-thz operating frequency. the proposed pcf is anticipated to be useful in polarization sensitive thz appliances.
rewritten: we present the numerical design optimization of a new, relatively simple porous-core photonic crystal fiber (pcf) geared toward terahertz (thz) waveguiding. this design incorporates a novel twist: a diamond-shaped porous core is embedded within a regular hexagonal cladding. our numerical analysis, performed using an efficient finite-element method, demonstrates a high birefringence on the order of 10⁻² and a low effective material loss of 0.07 cm⁻¹ at an operating frequency of 0.7 thz. the proposed pcf is expected to be valuable for polarization-sensitive thz applications.

raw: group signatures allow a group member to sign messages anonymously on behalf of the group. generally, group signatures have anonymity, traceability and authentication. it has been well applied in practical distributed security communication environments. however, very few schemes can achieve the non-frameability and support dynamic membership management. in this paper, we propose a new group signature scheme. our scheme achieves the non-frameability without the trusted issuer. meanwhile, this scheme can support dynamic members join and revocation without incurring other secure threats. furthermore, in our scheme, the size of group member's private key and the size of group public key are shorter than other schemes while the costs to be kept constant for signing and verifying. in particular, we prove that our scheme achieves anonymity, traceability and non-frameability under the random oracle model.
rewritten: group signatures enable a member to sign messages anonymously on behalf of the entire group. typically, these signatures are characterized by properties such as anonymity, traceability, and authentication, making them well-suited for secure, distributed communication environments. however, only a few schemes manage to provide non-frameability in addition to dynamic membership management. in this paper, we introduce a new group signature scheme that achieves non-frameability without relying on a trusted issuer. moreover, our scheme allows for the dynamic addition and revocation of members while still upholding strong security guarantees. notably, it features shorter private keys for group members and a smaller group public key compared to existing schemes, with constant costs for both signing and verification processes. we also prove that our scheme meets the anonymity, traceability, and non-frameability requirements within the random oracle model.

raw: due to the growing importance of science for the economy and hard budget constraints in russia the issue of increasing the efficiency of public funding of research activities is becoming increasingly urgent. the planned transition to a system of effective contracts in science requires regular assessment of the scientific staff's performance, resulting in the need for such an assessment methodology. as part of this article presents an analysis of the individual evaluation of researchers working in the oecd results on the example of new zealand's experience of the countries and the ways to apply this experience in russia in the development of methodology for assessing the performance of researchers.
rewritten: owing to science's rising significance for the economy and russia's strict budget constraints, enhancing the efficiency of public research funding has become increasingly critical. the planned shift toward a system based on effective contracts in science mandates regular assessments of scientific personnel, thereby creating a need for robust evaluation methodologies. this article examines the individual evaluation of researchers within the oecd framework, using new zealand as a case study, and discusses how this experience could be adapted to develop an assessment methodology for researchers in russia.

raw: the utility model discloses a breed pond sewage and absorb structure, including cell body, bottom of the pool, absorb water tub, the filter screen, the cell body build by the fragment of brick, and cell body bottom be the bottom of the pool, the bottom of the pool is reverse pyramid form setting, the pipe that absorbs water is the right angle form, outside one end extends to the cell body, other end connection suction pump, the bottom of the pool center is arranged in to the suction pump, the filter screen has been tied up outward to the suction pump. the utility model discloses a cell body is built by the fragment of brick, high convenience in construction, aquatic product farming is in the cell body, when aquatic products sell the mouth in need be with the cell body pond log raft remove, through the suction pump with chi shui through absorbing water the bank of tubes except that the cell body, and the effect of filter screen prevents that great debris from getting into the suction pump and damaging the suction pump, bottom of the pool reverse pyramid's design, make the interior waste material of cell body gather to the bottom of the pool center, and when further clearing up, at the bottom of the squirt cleaning tank, the waste material assembles the bottom of the pool center naturally, it can to recycle the suction pump suction, the operation is only turned over, it is clear quick.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a structure for a breeding pond that handles sewage and absorption. it comprises a cell body, a pond bottom, an absorption tub, and a filter screen. the cell body is constructed using brick fragments, and its lower part forms the pond's base, which is designed in an inverted pyramid shape. a right-angled water suction pipe extends from within the cell body to connect with a suction pump, which is installed at the center of the pond bottom. the filter screen is arranged outward from the suction pump. additionally, the cell body—built from brick fragments—offers high construction convenience, making it suitable for aquatic product farming. when the pond needs to be cleared for selling aquatic products, including the removal of pond logs, water along with suspended debris is drawn from the cell body through the absorption tub using the suction pump. the filter screen effectively prevents large debris from entering and damaging the suction pump. the inverted pyramid design of the pond bottom causes waste materials to accumulate at the center, allowing them to be easily collected during cleaning. the process is efficient, as the suction pump can quickly remove the accumulated waste when activated.

raw: the invention provides a method and a system for train network communication control. the method comprises steps that, the position of vehicle network node equipment relative to a locomotive is acquired by locomotive network management equipment; according to the position of the vehicle network node equipment relative to the locomotive, at least one vehicle network node equipment is marked by the locomotive network management equipment to be information forwarding equipment; an operation instruction is sent by the locomotive network management equipment to the vehicle network node equipment; the operation instruction is responded by the vehicle network node equipment, and the vehicle network node equipment which is marked as the information forwarding equipment forwards the operation instruction to other vehicle network node equipment. through the method, a problem of influence on the vehicle marshalling number caused by limit of the network report transmission distance existing in the prior art can be solved.
rewritten: the invention presents both a method and a system for managing communications within a train network. in this approach, the locomotive network management equipment first determines the location of each vehicle network node relative to the locomotive. based on these positions, it then designates at least one node as the information forwarding equipment. next, the locomotive network management equipment transmits an operation instruction to the vehicle network node, which responds accordingly. the designated node, acting as the information forwarder, propagates the operation instruction to other vehicle network nodes. this method effectively addresses the previous limitation of network report transmission distance that affected the vehicle marshalling number.

raw: mergers and acquisitions (m&as) have been increasingly used in the past decade as a strategic means for companies to gain competitive advantages (lakshman 2011), such as knowledge capital management and international market penetration. economic synergies obtained through domestic or international ma weber and fried 2011). notwithstanding this, m&as also come with challenges. it is well recognized that m&as are one of the most extreme forms of organizational change (hogan and overmyer-day 1994). research shows that approximately half of all m&as fail to achieve their anticipated outcomes and that the consequences of m&a failure are detrimental (cartwright and schoenberg 2006; rees and edwards 2009; thanos and papadakis 2012). the dysfunctional impact of m&a failure is not only evident in organizational outcomes, such as reduced productivity and market reputation (paruchuri et al. 2006), but also in the reduced well-being of organizational members, as reflected in increased job insecurity and stress (schweiger and denisi 1991; terry et al.1996).
rewritten: over the past decade, mergers and acquisitions have increasingly been utilized as strategic tools for organizations striving to secure competitive benefits (lakshman 2011). these deals facilitate advantages like improved management of knowledge capital and expanded presence in international markets, as well as generating economic synergies on both domestic and global scales (weber and fried 2011). nonetheless, mergers and acquisitions also introduce significant challenges. they are widely acknowledged as one of the most drastic forms of organizational change (hogan and overmyer-day 1994). studies reveal that nearly half of all mergers and acquisitions do not achieve their expected benefits, leading to harmful consequences (cartwright and schoenberg 2006; rees and edwards 2009; thanos and papadakis 2012). the adverse effects of merger and acquisition failures extend beyond organizational performance—resulting in reduced productivity and tarnished market reputation (paruchuri et al. 2006)—and also diminish the well-being of employees, reflected in increased job insecurity and elevated stress levels (schweiger and denisi 1991; terry et al. 1996).

rewritten: ammonia (nh3 or r717) is a key refrigerant for which determining the flow boiling heat transfer is crucial across various engineering applications. previous studies have assessed correlations for nh3 flow boiling heat transfer coefficients; however, these analyses were based on limited correlations or data points, leading to inconsistent findings. in this study, we provide a thorough evaluation of existing correlations for nh3 flow boiling heat transfer coefficients. a database of 1,157 experimental data points, collected from seven independent laboratories, is used in this analysis. the experiments span a wide range of conditions, with mass fluxes between 10 and 600 kg/m²·s, heat fluxes from 2.0 to 240 kw/m², vapor qualities from 0.002 to 0.997, saturation pressures ranging from 0.19 to 1.6 mpa, and channel inner diameters from 1.224 to 32 mm. using this comprehensive nh3 database, 37 correlations are evaluated and analyzed, with results indicating that the most accurate correlation exhibits a mean absolute error of...

raw: abstract. whereas the structure of individual differences in personal attributes is well understood in adults, much less work has been done in children and adolescents. on the assessment side, numerous instruments are in use for children but they measure discordant attributes, ranging from one single factor (self-esteem; grit) to three factors (social, emotional, and academic self-efficacy) to five factors (strength and difficulties; big five traits). to construct a comprehensive measure for large-scale studies in brazilian schools, we selected the eight most promising instruments and studied their structure at the item level (study 1; n = 3,023). the resulting six-factor structure captures the major domains of child differences represented in these instruments and resembles the well-known big five personality dimensions plus a negative self-evaluation factor. in a large representative sample in rio de janeiro state (study 2; n = 24,605), we tested a self-report inventory (senna1.0) assessing these six di...
rewritten: abstract. while the organization of individual differences in personal attributes is well understood in adults, considerably less research has been conducted with children and adolescents. in the realm of assessment, many instruments used with children measure a variety of attributes—from a single factor (such as self-esteem or grit) to three factors (including social, emotional, and academic self-efficacy) and even to five factors (like those in the strengths and difficulties questionnaire or the big five traits). to develop a comprehensive measure suitable for large-scale studies in brazilian schools, we chose the eight most promising instruments and examined their structure at the item level (study 1; n = 3,023). the analysis yielded a six-factor structure that encompasses the major domains of child differences as represented in these instruments, and it bears similarity to the well-known big five personality dimensions along with an additional factor representing negative self-evaluation. in a substantial representative sample from the state of rio de janeiro (study 2; n = 24,605), we evaluated a self-report inventory (senna 1.0) designed to assess these six dimensions.

raw: the present invention relates to a method for preparing a membrane by using an active layer prepared by support-free interfacial polymerization in a free surface, and more specifically, to a method for preparing a reverse osmosis membrane free of the characteristic of a support, which is configured to prepare a polymer active layer by causing an organic monomer to spontaneously react in an interface between an aqueous solution and an organic solvent and then combine the polymer active layer with a support. reverse osmosis membranes having various supports in addition to an existing polysulfone porous support can be manufactured by using the method for preparing a membrane by using an active layer prepared by support-free interfacial polymerization in a free surface according to the present invention. this enables a limitation to the application of a reverse osmosis membrane attributable to relatively low chemical resistance and water permeability of polysulfone to be overcome. furthermore, the method of the present invention can perform more elaborate control during preparation of the active layer than a conventional method, and, in particular, can be advantageously applied to a task for improvement in performance, such as introduction of nano-particles or the like.
rewritten: the invention describes a method for making a membrane by forming an active layer through support-free interfacial polymerization on a free surface. more specifically, it details a process for preparing a reverse osmosis membrane that lacks inherent support characteristics. in this process, a polymer active layer is created by triggering a spontaneous reaction of an organic monomer at the interface between an aqueous solution and an organic solvent, and then this layer is combined with a support. using this approach, reverse osmosis membranes can be produced with supports other than the conventional porous polysulfone, thereby overcoming its inherent limitations, such as low chemical resistance and reduced water permeability. moreover, this method allows for more precise control during the formation of the active layer compared to traditional techniques, making it especially useful for performance enhancements like incorporating nanoparticles.

raw: a system for greening a high and steep slope surface through drainage pipelines comprises the drainage pipelines installed on the high and steep slope surface. in a greening pipeline, one end of a u-type communication pipe is communicated with a main pipeline, the other end of the u-type communication pipe is communicated with a plant growth pipe, the plant growth pipe comprises at least one pipe body, the pipe bodies are internally provided with porous partition boards, soil collecting blocks are placed on the upper surfaces of the porous partition boards, geotextile layers are laid between the porous partition boards and the soil collecting blocks, the top of the u-type communication pipe is lower than the bottoms of the soil collecting blocks, water-absorbing cotton ropes are arranged in the soil collecting blocks, and the bottom ends of the water-absorbing cotton ropes extend into the u-type communication pipe. by means of the system for greening the high and steep slope surface through the drainage pipelines and a greening method, rainwater erosion on a slope can be reduced, rainwater seepage is reduced, landslide risk is reduced, water and soil loss and weathering stripping of the slope surface can be reduced, rock soil slopes are indirectly beautified, and greening protection of slope engineering is achieved.
rewritten: a system designed for greening steep and high slopes utilizes drainage pipelines installed on such surfaces. in this system, a greening pipeline is used where one end of a u-shaped communication pipe is connected to a main pipeline, while its other end links to a plant growth pipe. the plant growth pipe consists of at least one pipe section that features internal porous partition boards. soil collection blocks are placed on top of these boards with geotextile layers installed in between. notably, the top of the u-shaped communication pipe is positioned lower than the bottoms of the soil collecting blocks. additionally, water-absorbing cotton ropes are arranged inside the soil collection blocks, with their lower ends extending into the u-shaped communication pipe. this system and its corresponding greening method help reduce rainwater erosion and seepage on slopes, lower landslide risks, minimize water and soil loss as well as weathering, indirectly enhance the appearance of rocky slopes, and protect slope engineering through effective greening.

raw: the utility model provides a birds animal manure is solid -liquid separation machine just, includes casing, spiral extrusion axis, filter screen, speed reducer and motor, the casing setting is equipped with feed inlet, discharge gate, liquid outlet on the casing on the support, be equipped with the feeder hopper on the feed inlet, be equipped with on the discharge gate and scrape the flitch, be equipped with the tube -shape filter screen in the casing, spiral extrusion axis adopt the double helix structure, spiral extrusion axis sets up in the filter screen, spiral extrusion axis front end is connected with speed reducer and motor in proper order, the casing includes and casing anterior segment and casing back end is equipped with a flowing back section of thick bamboo between casing anterior segment and the casing back end, and a flowing back section of thick bamboo and casing anterior segment and casing back end are sealing connection, and part that spiral extrusion axis and speed reducer main shaft meet is equipped with at least one leakage fluid dram in locating a flowing back section of thick bamboo on the flowing back section of thick bamboo. compared with the prior art, the utility model apparent advantage and beneficial effect have: solid -liquid separation is effectual, effectively avoids the speed reducer to suffer the corruption, and the discharge gate is equipped with scrapes the flitch, and the ejection of compact is smooth and easy, and work efficiency is high.
rewritten: the utility model introduces a solid-liquid separation machine designed for processing bird and animal manure. the machine comprises a casing, a spiral extrusion shaft with a double helix structure, a filter screen, a speed reducer, and a motor. the casing features a feed inlet, a discharge gate, and a liquid outlet, all arranged on a supporting structure. a feeding hopper is attached to the feed inlet, and a scraper is installed at the discharge gate. inside the casing, a tube-shaped filter screen is arranged with the spiral extrusion shaft positioned within it. the front end of the spiral extrusion shaft is connected in sequence to the speed reducer and the motor. the casing itself is divided into a front section and a rear section, with a thick bamboo flow-back section situated between them, ensuring a sealed connection with both the front and rear sections. additionally, at least one leakage fluid drain is provided at the junction where the spiral extrusion shaft meets the main shaft of the speed reducer on the thick bamboo flow-back section. compared to prior art, this utility model offers clear advantages: it achieves effective solid-liquid separation, minimizes the risk of corrosion to the speed reducer, and, with the inclusion of a scraper at the discharge gate, promotes smooth and efficient ejection of compacted material, thus enhancing overall operational efficiency.

raw: the invention discloses an antenna frequency band adjusting apparatus and method. the antenna frequency band adjusting apparatus comprises an antenna body, a parasitic antenna, a cpu arranged on a pcb, a radio frequency transceiving module and a selection control module, wherein the cpu controls the connecting state of the selection control module according to a current working frequency band, and connects the parasitic antenna or the antenna body with the radio frequency transceiving module through the selection control module so as to enable the parasitic antenna or the antenna body to transmit and receive signals; therefore, the length of the antenna can be changed automatically; consequently, the bandwidth of the antenna can be widened effectively without changing the antenna space and the antenna size; and in addition, the working frequency band of the antenna can be changed, and the radiation performance of the antenna can be improved.
rewritten: the invention relates to an apparatus and method for adjusting an antenna's frequency band. the apparatus includes an antenna body, a parasitic antenna, a cpu mounted on a pcb, a radio frequency transceiving module, and a selection control module. the cpu manages the connection state of the selection control module based on the current operating frequency band, linking either the parasitic antenna or the antenna body to the radio frequency transceiving module to enable signal transmission and reception. this setup allows the antenna's effective length to be automatically modified, thereby widening its bandwidth without altering its physical dimensions or space. additionally, the apparatus allows for adjustments to the antenna's operating frequency band, leading to improved radiation performance.

raw: using pervasive provenance to secure mainstream systems has recently attracted interest from industry and government. recording, storing and managing all of the provenance associated with a system is a considerable challenge. analyzing the resulting noisy, heterogeneous, continuously-growing provenance graph adds to this challenge, and apparently necessitates segmentation, that is, approximating, compressing or summarizing part or all of the graph in order to identify patterns or features. in this paper, we describe this new problem space for provenance data management, contrast it with related problem spaces addressed by prior work on provenance abstraction and sanitization, and highlight challenges and future directions toward solutions to the provenance segmentation problem.
rewritten: recent attention from both industry and government focuses on using pervasive provenance to secure mainstream systems. however, recording, storing, and managing every bit of provenance for a system poses a significant challenge. the task becomes even more complex when analyzing the ever-growing, heterogeneous, and noisy provenance graph—a process that seemingly requires segmentation, meaning the approximation, compression, or summarization of parts or the entirety of the graph to reveal patterns or features. in this paper, we explore this emerging problem area in provenance data management, compare it with related fields that have been addressed in earlier work on provenance abstraction and sanitization, and discuss the challenges and future directions for solutions to the provenance segmentation problem.

raw: technologies for enhancing credit transactions include a point of sale computing system. the point of sale computing system receives payment vehicle data for a credit transaction associated with a purchase event. the point of sale computing system determines whether the credit transaction is an alternate routing candidate. the point of sale computing system routes an authorization request message to an issuer computing system via a payment card network in response to a determination that the credit transaction is not an alternate routing candidate. alternatively, the point of sale computing system routes the authorization request message directly to the issuer computing system via a pin debit network in response to a determination that the credit transaction is an alternate routing candidate. a corresponding authorization response message is received by the point of sale computing system via the payment card network or the pin debit network. other embodiments are described and claimed.
rewritten: technologies designed to improve credit transactions involve a point of sale (pos) computing system. this system obtains payment vehicle data for a credit transaction linked to a purchase event and then assesses whether the transaction is eligible for alternate routing. if the transaction is not a candidate for alternate routing, the pos system forwards an authorization request message to an issuer computing system through a payment card network. conversely, if the transaction qualifies for alternate routing, the pos system sends the authorization request directly to the issuer computing system using a pin debit network. in both cases, the pos system eventually receives an authorization response message via the appropriate network—either the payment card network or the pin debit network. additional embodiments are also described and claimed.

raw: the present invention relates to a blade fixating device for a crushing rotary plate of a wood crushing device with excellent resistance to the abrasion of a blade and a wood crushing load. in the blade fixating device for the crushing unit of the wood crushing device wherein a part of the blade is projected out of the cutter rotary plate, the blade fixating device includes: the cutter rotary plate installed in the wood crushing device; a blade stand coupled to the cutter rotary plate; the blade coupled to a coupling surface of the blade stand; an uneven coupler coupled to the blade stand while supporting a top surface of the blade in an upper side of the blade; an uneven supporter formed in a rear surface of the uneven coupler; and a supporting plate coupled to a top surface of the blade stand.
rewritten: the present invention pertains to a blade fixation device used in a wood crushing apparatus, specifically for securing a crushing rotary plate. this device is designed to provide excellent resistance against both blade abrasion and the applied wood crushing load. in this blade fixation mechanism for the wood crushing unit, a portion of the blade projects out from the cutter rotary plate. the device comprises the following components: a cutter rotary plate installed within the wood crushing apparatus; a blade stand that is coupled to this rotary plate; the blade itself, which is attached to a coupling surface of the blade stand; an uneven coupler that is connected with the blade stand to support the upper side of the blade's top surface; an uneven supporter formed on the rear surface of the uneven coupler; and finally, a supporting plate coupled to the top surface of the blade stand.

raw: structure (1) for stabilizing humidity for air sanitation, comprising an outer covering casing (2) with longitudinal shape along a vertical axis, with a lower air intake opening (3), a top opening (4) exit from it and, inside which has a means of forced circulation of air along an interior passage between said lower and outer openings (3, 4) and air filtering means, characterized in that understands - means for generating humidity (8), arranged inside the casing (2), in the lower part of the structure (1), located in the interior passage zone of the forced air circulation means, such that the air entering through the lower opening (3) passes through the moisture generating means, and; - means for generating uv rays (5), arranged inside the housing (2), in the upper part of the structure (1), located in the interior passage zone of the forced air circulation means, such that the air before its exit through the upper opening (4) passes through the means for generating uv rays; - where the air filtering means comprise a storage device for reactive material, arranged between the humidity generating means (8) and the means for generating uv rays (5) and formed by at least one pressure tube ( 6) of transparent methacrylate, longitudinally and vertically, comprising in its interior a plurality of transparent filter capsules (7) accommodating the reactive material arranged consecutively along the pressure tube (6). rewritten: the structure (1) for controlling humidity in air purification includes an outer casing (2) with an elongated vertical shape. this casing features a bottom air intake opening (3) and a top exit opening (4). inside, a forced-air circulation system establishes an interior passage linking the lower and upper openings (3, 4), along with an air filtration system. the structure is distinguished by the inclusion of: • a humidity generating unit (8) positioned inside the casing (2) at the lower portion of the structure (1) within the air circulation passage, ensuring that air entering through the bottom opening (3) passes through it. • a uv ray generating unit (5) located inside the casing (2) at the upper part of the structure (1) also within the air passage, so that air flows through it before exiting through the top opening (4). • an air filtration system that incorporates a reactive material storage device placed between the humidity generating unit (8) and the uv ray generating unit (5). this device consists of at least one transparent methacrylate pressure tube (6), aligned vertically, containing several transparent filter capsules (7) arranged consecutively along the tube to hold the reactive material.

raw: a membrane fractionation procedure for the major whey proteins a-la and b-lg in pilot scale was developed. the obtained fractions were characterized in terms of thermal denaturation kinetics, gelling properties, microparticulation, spray-drying and functionality when compared to their native mixture. microparticles from the isolated major whey proteins showed different functional properties than those from the protein mixture in whey.
rewritten: a pilot-scale membrane fractionation process was developed to isolate the major whey proteins α-la and β-lg. the resulting fractions were then evaluated for thermal denaturation kinetics, gelling behavior, microparticulation, spray-drying characteristics, and overall functionality in comparison with the native whey mixture. additionally, the microparticles produced from these isolated whey proteins exhibited functional properties that differed from those obtained from the whole whey protein blend.

raw: abstract this paper presents the production and characterization of polymeric nanocomposite foams based on low density polyethylene (ldpe) and different contents of silica nanoparticles. the properties of these foamed materials are conditioned by the properties of the polymer matrix and by the characteristics of the cellular structure. in general, when adding nanoparticles several improvements are obtained in both the solid nanocomposite and the cellular structure. however, the achievement of these potential improvements is conditioned by the level of filler dispersion and by the compatibilization degree between the particles and the polymer. this work analyzes the effects on the dispersion and compatibilization levels of adding, or not, a compatibilizer agent (linear low density polyethylene grafted with maleic anhydride, lldpe-g-ma), with the aim of understanding the structure and properties of the foamed materials produced from these composites. a modified version of the pressure quench method was used to produce the foamed samples. this method allows obtaining net-shaped foams adequate for analyzing both their microstructure and mechanical properties. results show that for this particular system, the incorporation of the lldpe-g-ma compatibilizer does not promote a better dispersion but implies significant differences in terms of nucleating efficiency and reinforcing effect of the nanoparticles. while for solid nanocomposites the higher degree of bonding polymer/nanoparticle promoted by the presence of the compatibilizer translates into a positive mechanical reinforcing effect, for foamed nanocomposites, such high level of compatiblization mitigates the nucleating effect of the nanoparticles. this translates into poorer mechanical properties in the foamed samples containing the compatibilizer agent.
rewritten: this paper focuses on creating and characterizing polymeric nanocomposite foams made from low-density polyethylene (ldpe) combined with various amounts of silica nanoparticles. the material properties of these foams are influenced not only by the inherent properties of the polymer matrix but also by the features of their cellular structure. typically, introducing nanoparticles enhances both the solid nanocomposite and the foam’s cellular network. however, realizing these improvements depends on how well the filler is dispersed and the degree of compatibility between the nanoparticles and the polymer. specifically, this study examines the impact on dispersion and compatibility when a compatibilizer agent—linear low-density polyethylene grafted with maleic anhydride (lldpe-g-ma)—is either added or omitted. the goal is to understand the relationship between the composite structure and the resulting foam properties. foamed samples were prepared using a modified version of the pressure quench method, which produces net-shaped foams suitable for analyzing both their microstructure and mechanical performance. the results indicate that, in this system, incorporating the lldpe-g-ma compatibilizer does not yield better nanoparticle dispersion. instead, it causes notable differences in the nanoparticles’ nucleating efficiency and reinforcing effect. in solid nanocomposites, the enhanced polymer/nanoparticle bonding due to the compatibilizer leads to improved mechanical properties. in contrast, for foamed nanocomposites, the high level of compatibilization reduces the nanoparticles’ nucleating effect, resulting in inferior mechanical properties in the foams that contain the compatibilizer.

raw: objectives: the current practice of prescribing psychotropic medication for the management of dementia-related behavioral disturbances is under substantial debate. using pearlin's stress process model as theoretical underpinning, the aim of this investigation is to identify caregiver and care recipient characteristics as predictors of anxiolytic, antipsychotic, and antidepressant use among community-dwelling dementia patients. we hypothesized that caregiving burden and patient characteristics, particularly behavior disturbances and pain, would be positively associated with psychotropic medication use.methods: data for this exploratory, cross-sectional study were drawn from the baseline assessment of the resources for enhancing alzheimer's caregiver health ii trial. only participants with full baseline information were examined (n = 598). caregiver characteristics, such as confidence managing problematic behaviors, and care recipient characteristics including pain, problem behaviors, cognitive impairment, ...
rewritten: objectives: the current practice of prescribing psychotropic medications to manage behavioral disturbances related to dementia is being hotly debated. grounded in pearlin’s stress process model, this study seeks to determine which characteristics of both caregivers and care recipients serve as predictors for the use of anxiolytics, antipsychotics, and antidepressants among community-dwelling dementia patients. we hypothesized that both the burden of caregiving and specific patient factors—particularly behavioral disturbances and pain—would be positively linked to the use of psychotropic medications. methods: data for this exploratory cross-sectional study were obtained from the baseline assessment of the resources for enhancing alzheimer’s caregiver health ii trial. the analysis focused on participants who had complete baseline information (n = 598). we examined a range of variables, including caregiver characteristics such as confidence in managing problematic behaviors, as well as care recipient features like pain, behavioral issues, and cognitive impairment.

raw: the purpose of this study was to verify the relationship between participation motivation, satisfaction, and attraction of the century-old guanziling hot spring music festival. methods: this study examined cross validity by verifying the consistency of the models in the two research groups in order to increase external validity. we used spss 12.0 and amos 20.0 for all statistical analyses. the research results supported several of our hypotheses. motivation significantly influenced satisfaction and had a positive association with attraction. the participation model of the century-old guanziling hot spring music festival in 2012 and 2013 possessed measurement invariance. discussion: our findings suggest that enhancing the quality of entertainment activities as well as satisfaction of the tourists in festivals would motivate tourists to participate in festival activities and thus promote local tourism.
rewritten: this study aimed to investigate the relationship among participation motivation, satisfaction, and attraction at the century-old guanziling hot spring music festival. methods: to enhance external validity, we assessed cross-validity by testing the consistency of the models between two research groups, utilizing spss 12.0 and amos 20.0 for all statistical analyses. the results confirmed several hypotheses, revealing that motivation strongly influenced satisfaction and was positively associated with attraction. furthermore, the participation models for the 2012 and 2013 festivals exhibited measurement invariance. discussion: these findings suggest that by improving the quality of entertainment offerings and boosting tourist satisfaction at festivals, participation rates may increase, thereby promoting local tourism.

raw: the invention discloses a four-channel bearing flexibility vision identification machine which comprises a rectangular-ambulatory-plane automatic flow detection line. the detection pipeline comprises an inlet stopper which is arranged on the tail end of a first bracket, a first transfer gripper which is arranged on the front end of a second bracket, a pan-core spindle assembly which is arranged behind the transfer gripper, a flexible ng door which is arranged behind the pan-core spindle, a second stopper which is arranged on the tail end of the second bracket, a second transfer gripper, a corresponding vision detection position, an external appearance ng door which is arranged behind the vision detection position, an outlet pushing head which is arranged behind the external appearance ng door and an ejection station, wherein the second transfer gripper and the corresponding vision detection position are arranged on the front end of a third bracket. according to the invention, bearing flexibility and automatic appearance detection are realized; the detection efficiency is high; the quality of quality inspection is ensured; and the device has the advantage of small floor area and is suitable for various occasions.
rewritten: the invention describes a four-channel bearing flexibility vision identification machine that includes an automatic flow detection line arranged on a rectangular moving plane. this detection line consists of the following components: an inlet stopper positioned at the rear end of a first bracket; a first transfer gripper mounted at the front end of a second bracket; a pan-core spindle assembly located immediately behind the transfer gripper; a flexible ng door placed behind the pan-core spindle assembly; a second stopper situated at the rear end of the second bracket; a second transfer gripper; a designated vision detection station; an external appearance ng door positioned behind this vision detection station; an outlet pushing head arranged behind the external appearance ng door; and finally, an ejection station. notably, the second transfer gripper and the corresponding vision detection station are located at the front end of a third bracket. this apparatus achieves bearing flexibility and automatic appearance detection efficiently, ensures high detection accuracy, and occupies minimal floor space, making it suitable for a variety of applications.

raw: the main aim of this study was to biomonitor mercury (hg), arsenic (as), cadmium (cd), lead (pb) and copper (cu) concentrations in the arvand river using heteropnestis fossilis and parasesarma persicum comparison of heavy metals among the stations indicated that the concentrations of hg, as, cd, cu and pb in sediment samples were apparently different among the stations. the results of linear regression analyses showed that there were significant correlations (p < 0.05) between hg, as and pb elements in sediment and hepatopancreas of p. persicum and between as in sediment and liver of h. fossilis these findings showed that p. persicum could be considered as a biomonitor of hg, as and pb and h. fossilis as a biomonitor of as contamination in sediment of the arvand river.
rewritten: the primary objective of this research was to monitor mercury (hg), arsenic (as), cadmium (cd), lead (pb), and copper (cu) concentrations in the arvand river using heteropnestis fossilis and parasesarma persicum. a comparison of heavy metal levels at various stations revealed that the concentrations of hg, as, cd, cu, and pb in sediment samples significantly differed from station to station. moreover, linear regression analyses demonstrated statistically significant correlations (p < 0.05) between the levels of hg, as, and pb in sediments and the hepatopancreas of p. persicum, as well as between as in sediments and the liver of h. fossilis. these findings indicate that p. persicum can serve as an effective biomonitor for hg, as, and pb, while h. fossilis may be used as a biomonitor for as contamination in the sediments of the arvand river.

raw: abstract. recent studies on the formation of a quasi-permanent layer of enhanced static stability above the thermal tropopause revealed the contributions of dynamical and radiative processes. dry dynamics leads to the evolution of a tropopause inversion layer (til), which is, however, too weak compared to observations and thus diabatic contributions are required. in this study we aim to assess the importance of diabatic processes in the understanding of til formation at midlatitudes. the non-hydrostatic model cosmo (consortium for small-scale modelling) is applied in an idealized midlatitude channel configuration to simulate baroclinic life cycles. the effect of individual diabatic processes related to humidity, radiation, and turbulence is studied first to estimate the contribution of each of these processes to the til formation in addition to dry dynamics. in a second step these processes are stepwise included in the model to increase the complexity and finally estimate the relative importance of each process. the results suggest that including turbulence leads to a weaker til than in a dry reference simulation. in contrast, the til evolves stronger when radiation is included but the temporal evolution is still comparable to the reference. using various cloud schemes in the model shows that latent heat release and consecutive increased vertical motions foster an earlier and stronger appearance of the til than in all other life cycles. furthermore, updrafts moisten the upper troposphere and as such increase the radiative effect from water vapor. particularly, this process becomes more relevant for maintaining the til during later stages of the life cycles. increased convergence of the vertical wind induced by updrafts and by propagating inertia-gravity waves, which potentially dissipate, further contributes to the enhanced stability of the lower stratosphere. finally, radiative feedback of ice clouds reaching up to the tropopause is identified to potentially further affect the strength of the til in the region of the clouds.
rewritten: abstract. recent research on the formation of a long-lasting layer of increased static stability above the thermal tropopause has highlighted the roles of both dynamical and radiative processes. dry dynamical processes lead to the development of a tropopause inversion layer (til), yet this mechanism alone produces a til that is too weak compared to what is observed, necessitating the involvement of diabatic processes. this study seeks to evaluate the significance of diabatic processes in understanding til formation in midlatitude regions. to this end, the non-hydrostatic model cosmo (consortium for small-scale modelling) is used in an idealized midlatitude channel configuration to simulate baroclinic life cycles. initially, the effects of individual diabatic processes related to humidity, radiation, and turbulence are examined separately to gauge their contributions to til formation alongside dry dynamics. in a subsequent phase, these processes are incrementally introduced into the model to enhance its complexity, allowing for an estimation of each process's relative importance. the results indicate that incorporating turbulence results in a weaker til compared to the dry reference simulation. conversely, the inclusion of radiation yields a stronger til, although its temporal evolution remains similar to the reference scenario. when various cloud schemes are implemented, the release of latent heat and subsequent increases in vertical motion promote an earlier and more pronounced til than seen in the other simulated life cycles. moreover, updrafts contribute to the moistening of the upper troposphere, thereby enhancing the radiative impact of water vapor—a process that becomes increasingly significant in sustaining the til during the later stages of the life cycles. additionally, the increased convergence of vertical wind, driven by updrafts and propagating inertia-gravity waves (which may eventually dissipate), further bolsters the stability of the lower stratosphere. finally, radiative feedback from ice clouds extending up to the tropopause is identified as a potential factor that may further influence the strength of the til in the vicinity of the clouds.

raw: the utility model provides a mound holding device for transplanting forest, its includes at least one an annular fastener and a holding device, it includes a water injection route and one keeps the body, keep the body to have an inside wall, a lateral wall, an at least drainage channel and an at least fastening groove the upper portion that keeps the body the integrative ground of inside wall and extend crookedly in the lateral wall, with the inside wall with form a water storage chamber between the lateral wall, drainage channel set up in the inside wall, the fastening groove set up in the lateral wall, the water injection route set up in the inside wall with the junction of lateral wall, so that the water injection route communicate in the water storage chamber, keep the body extend crookedly so that two free ends that keep the body are close to each other, from keeping the space in order to form one to the confession keeps being transplanted the mound of forest, drainage channel communicate in the water storage chamber with the space keeps, the fastener detachably be fixed in the fastening groove.
rewritten: a utility model is provided for a forest transplant mound holding device, which includes at least one annular fastener and a holding device. the holding device comprises a water injection channel and a body. the body features an inner wall, a lateral wall, at least one drainage channel, and at least one fastening groove. the upper portion of the body has an integrally-formed ground with the inner wall and extends obliquely along the lateral wall. the inner wall and lateral wall form a water storage chamber between them. the drainage channel is arranged on the inner wall, while the fastening groove is positioned on the lateral wall. the water injection channel is set along the junction of the inner wall and the lateral wall, ensuring communication with the water storage chamber. additionally, the body extends obliquely so that its two free ends are located near each other, creating a space intended to secure the forest transplant mound. the drainage channel is in communication with this space through the water storage chamber, and the fastener is detachably secured within the fastening groove.

raw: the utility model provides an automatic feeding system for powder materials on vacuum condition, include the workbin, inhale material pipe, vacuum tube, vortex air pump, dust remover, feed bin, its characterized in that: the top of feed bin is equipped with the opening, is connected with the discharge opening of dust remover, and the vortex air pump passes through the vacuum tube and links to each other with the dust remover, and the inside conic section part of feed bin is equipped with brokenly encircles the mechanism, and feed bin bottom discharge mouth is connected with spiral conveying mechanism's feed inlet. the problem of current artifical material loading mode, serious pollution, intensity of labour are big is solved.
rewritten: the utility model presents an automatic feeding system for powder materials under vacuum conditions. this system comprises a workbin, an air inlet pipe for material intake, a vacuum tube, a vortex air pump, a dust remover, and a feed bin. in this design, the top of the feed bin features an opening that connects to the discharge opening of the dust remover; the vortex air pump is connected to the dust remover via the vacuum tube. additionally, the interior conical section of the feed bin is equipped with a surrounding mechanism, and the bottom discharge port of the feed bin is linked to the feed inlet of a spiral conveying mechanism. this configuration addresses issues associated with current manual material loading methods, such as severe pollution and high labor intensity.

raw: the utility model discloses a bearing seat of fan, including the bearing room, pass through lid, gland, lock female, set up at the labyrinth ring who covers thoroughly, pass through and be provided with sealed felt between lid and the gland, bearing room right -hand member is covered thoroughly and is provided with the first food tray that connects, welds the first oil scraper ring of setting with the lock generatrix, bearing room left end is provided with the second and connects food tray and second oil scraper ring, it is as an organic whole that the second connects food tray and labyrinth ring to design, labyrinth ring's lower part has been offered and has been unloaded the oilhole. the slot has the advantages of reasonable structural device, connect food tray and oil scraper ring through what set up, make the bearing room form a closed loop, the oil bath is at loop -locked bottom, it is connect the food tray to catch to fall back to the oil bath to get rid of a large amount of liquid oil in whereabouts on the bearing, the liquid oil of minute quantity is through connecing food tray and the lapped fit clearance of oil scraper ring to flow through, the setting of oil scraper ring, play the damping action when making the liquid oil stream cross the clearance, labyrinth ring and felt then play two, three sealed effects, unload the setting of oilhole, it gets back to in the oil bath again to guarantee the outer drainage oil of labyrinth ring.
rewritten: the utility model discloses a fan bearing seat comprising a bearing chamber with a through lid, a gland, and a locking female component. within the bearing chamber, a labyrinth ring is fully enclosed, and a sealed felt is arranged between the lid and the gland. on the right side of the bearing chamber, a first food tray is provided and is welded with a first oil scraper ring on the locking generatrix. on the left side, a second food tray is installed, which connects with a second oil scraper ring. together, the second food tray and the labyrinth ring form an integrated structure, and the lower portion of the labyrinth ring features an oil outlet. this design has several advantages: the structure is configured so that the food tray and oil scraper ring form a closed loop within the bearing chamber. an oil bath is located at the bottom of this loop, allowing the oil falling from the food tray to return to the oil bath, thereby removing a significant amount of oil from around the bearing. a smaller amount of residual oil flows through a clearance created by the mated fit of the food tray and the oil scraper ring. as the oil passes through this clearance, the oil scraper ring exerts a damping effect. in combination with the labyrinth ring and the felt, a two- or three-stage sealing effect is achieved, directing any oil from the outlet back into the oil bath and ensuring effective drainage of excess oil from the labyrinth ring.

raw: thermal power stations are one of the main pollution sources in baghdad that release many toxic substances in the environment and cause toxic effects on public health. three selected sites were selected with gradual distances from al-daura thermal power station within (0.5 km (st. 1), 1 km (st. 2) and 2 km (st. 3), respectively) according to the direction of downwind of site. in addition, one of unpolluted site was chosen for comparison as a control site around 4 km upwind from al-daura thermal power station. the samples were taken for two seasons,winter 2014 and spring 2015; the first season was in december 2014 and the second season was in march 2015. the concentrations of some pollutants that originated from al-daura thermal power station as air pollutants were measured. the results of air analysis showed high concentrations of sulphur dioxide (so 2 ), nitrogen dioxide (no 2 ), hydrogen sulfide (h 2 s) and volatile organic components (vocs) in all three sites in comparison with control site, and the higher values for so 2 , no 2 and h 2 s were shown in site 3; while the concentrations of voc were higher in site 2. there are no significant differences in concentrations between the air pollutants in the two seasons, except for so 2, which were increased in the first season than in the second season.
rewritten: thermal power stations are one of the main sources of pollution in baghdad, releasing numerous toxic substances into the environment and posing serious health risks. in this study, three sites were chosen at increasing distances from the al-daura thermal power station—0.5 km (site 1), 1 km (site 2), and 2 km (site 3)—all located downwind of the station. additionally, a control site was selected approximately 4 km upwind from the power station to serve as a non-polluted reference. samples were collected during two seasons: winter (december 2014) and spring (march 2015). air analysis measured the concentrations of pollutants emitted by the power station, including sulphur dioxide (so2), nitrogen dioxide (no2), hydrogen sulfide (h2s), and volatile organic compounds (vocs). the results revealed elevated levels of these pollutants at all three sites compared to the control site. notably, site 3 exhibited the highest concentrations of so2, no2, and h2s, while site 2 recorded the highest level of vocs. there were no significant seasonal variations in pollutant concentrations, except for so2, which was higher in the first season than in the second.
